title: Social Media Video Editor
description:
We are hiring a creative Social Media Video Editor to turn raw video footage into engaging short-form and long-form content. The ideal candidate has a strong sense of pacing and storytelling, and knows how to produce videos that grab attention and keep viewers watching. This is a great fit for someone who blends technical editing skills with creative thinking.



Key Responsibilities:

- Edit raw footage into short-form videos (1 to 2 minutes) for TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts

- Produce longer-form edited videos for YouTube

- Apply engaging editing techniques that maximize viewer retention

- Work closely with the content creator on style, pacing, and creative direction

- Cut and arrange raw footage into compelling video narratives

- Add transitions, captions, music, and sound effects when appropriate

- Export and deliver videos in proper format for each platform

- Keep up with short-form video trends and apply them to fresh content

- Share creative ideas and suggestions to improve content performance



Mandatory Skills:

- Proven experience editing short-form videos for TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts

- Proficient in video editing software such as CapCut, Premiere Pro, Final Cut, or DaVinci Resolve

- Strong sense of timing, rhythm, and visual storytelling

- Ability to create attention-grabbing edits that hold viewers

- Familiar with platform-specific formats and best practices

- Self-motivated, detail-oriented, and capable of working independently

- Clear communication and strong collaboration skills

- Able to handle multiple projects and meet deadlines



Preferred Skills:

- Experience editing longer-form YouTube content

- Up-to-date awareness of viral video trends and formats

- Skilled in captions, text animations, and motion graphics

- Willingness to contribute creative direction and ideas

- Track record of helping creators grow engagement organically

- Flexible around varying content production schedules



Why Join Us:

This role offers the chance to work directly with a creator who values collaboration and creative input. You will have the freedom to bring your ideas to life and play a meaningful role in building a strong social media presence. With the opportunity for the role to grow over time, this is a great fit for someone looking to develop alongside the content.

title: video Editor
description:
Role Summary  

We are seeking a skilled Part-Time Video Editor to join our team and elevate our video content. You’ll be responsible for editing batches of 8 to 10 long-form (10–15 minute) YouTube videos every two weeks, as well as supplementary B-roll and related content. Your creative input will directly impact our brand’s online presence and audience engagement.



 Responsibilities  

- Edit and assemble batches of 8–10 long-form (10–15 minute) YouTube videos every two weeks.

create clips to repurpose for shrts, IG or TikTok

- Add graphics, text overlays, effects, and royalty-free music to ensure videos are engaging and on-brand.

- Edit B-roll and supplementary material to support core video content.

- Ensure all content meets our quality standards and is optimized for each platform.

- Collaborate with our team to align on creative direction and feedback.

- Export videos in formats suitable for YouTube and social media.

- Stay up to date with editing trends, YouTube best practices, and storytelling techniques.



 Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)  

- Consistent, high-quality video edits as measured by internal review and audience engagement.

- Adherence to project-specific turnaround times (may range from 24 hours to 14 days, depending on the assignment).

- Reliable delivery of all assigned videos and B-roll within agreed timelines.

- Responsiveness to feedback and minimal revision cycles.

- Positive audience growth and engagement attributable to your content.



 Growth Opportunities  

- Potential to increase hours or transition to a full-time role as our channel grows.

- Opportunity to take on leadership in video strategy or manage other creative contributors.

- Ongoing feedback and professional development.



 Qualifications  

Required:  

- Proven experience editing YouTube videos (portfolio or demo reel required).

- Proficiency in Adobe Premiere Pro, Final Cut Pro, or similar editing software.

- Strong sense of pacing, storytelling, and attention to detail.

- Experience editing for YouTube and social media channels (TikTok, Reels, Shorts, etc.).

- Basic motion graphics and animation skills.

- Experience sourcing and integrating B-roll and royalty-free music.

- Ability to work independently, communicate clearly, and reliably meet deadlines.

- Creative, collaborative, and solution-oriented attitude

title: Freelance video editor
description:
We’re looking for a freelance Video Editor to support video production for one of our clients in the gut health space. This role is best suited for someone who has experience editing videos specifically for paid Meta ads and understands how to make content feel native, engaging, and conversion-focused.



About the Role



This is a remote freelance position for around 20-30 hours per week, with flexible scheduling as long as deadlines are met.



You’ll be editing short-form video ads from raw footage, turning creative briefs into polished assets for paid social campaigns. Most projects will be for Meta, with potential additional edits for TikTok and YouTube Shorts.



Your responsibilities will include:

- Editing raw footage into high-performing social ad creatives

- Creating videos for paid Meta ads, with a focus on strong hooks, pacing, retention, and clarity

- Adding B-roll, text overlays, transitions, effects, and simple motion graphics

- Creating and syncing AI voiceovers where needed

- Color grading footage for a clean, consistent, polished look

- Following creative briefs, brand guidelines, and revision notes closely

- Collaborating async with the Creative Director and implementing feedback accurately



What We’re Looking For

- Strong experience editing videos for paid Meta ads

- Adobe Premiere Pro experience — this is our main editing tool

- A portfolio that shows performance-driven social ad work

- Experience editing for TikTok and YouTube Shorts is a plus

- Fluent English, written and spoken

- Strong understanding of pacing, hooks, retention, and direct-response creative

- Detail-oriented and able to follow briefs precisely

- Comfortable working remotely and managing deadlines independently

- Open to feedback and able to apply revision notes without needing the same feedback repeatedly

- Bonus: Experience with After Effects



What Makes You a Good Fit

You’ll probably enjoy this role if you:

- Read creative briefs carefully before opening Premiere Pro

- Ask smart questions before starting instead of guessing

- Understand that a good ad is not just “nice editing,” but editing that supports the message and objective

- Care about details like captions, pacing, sound design, visual hierarchy, and clean exports

- Can work independently without needing constant check-ins

- Are reliable, responsive, and easy to collaborate with



Rate: $5–$8/hour, depending on experience and portfolio quality.



Application Process

- Send your portfolio and resume.

- Include a short note, max 5 sentences, explaining your workflow when you receive a new brief. How do you make sure you -  fully understand it before you start editing?

- Shortlisted candidates will be asked to complete a short test edit.

- Selected candidates will start remote freelance work.



IMPORTANT:

Use the following line when applying



[Your Name] – Brief First, Edit Second



Applications without this subject line will not be reviewed.

title: Online Product Sourcing
description:
Position Details



Position: Sourcing Virtual Assistant

Platform: Walmart (Online Reselling)

Employment Type: Full-Time

Location: Remote – Philippines

Hours: 40 hours/week (aligned with employer's time zone)



About Us

We are a growing e-commerce business focused on online retail arbitrage and reselling through Walmart's marketplace. Our mission is to identify profitable product opportunities, build smart sourcing systems, and scale our business efficiently. We believe in investing in our people — we're looking for a long-term tea
mber who wants to grow alongside the business, not just fill a role.



Role Summary

As a Sourcing Virtual Assistant, you will be the engine behind our product discovery pipeline. You will research, analyze, and identify products from online retailers and suppliers that can be profitably resold on Walmart's platform. You will work closely with the business owner, receive ongoing coaching and training, and play a key role in driving the business forward.

This is a full-time, long-term position ideal for someone who is detail-oriented, analytical, and genuinely excited about e-commerce.



Key Responsibilities

Product Sourcing & Research



Search online retailers, clearance sites, and supplier catalogs to find resellable products

Identify products with strong sell-through rates and healthy profit margins on Walmart

title: Amazon PPC & Profitability Strategist (Senior Level)
description:
Who We Are

Southshore Fine Linens is a fast-growing home textiles brand with over 3,500 SKUs across sheets, quilts, duvet sets, comforters, and seasonal collections.

We operate at scale across Amazon, Shopify, and wholesale—and we take profitability seriously.

We are not looking for someone to “run ads.”

We are looking for someone who understands how to deploy capital inside Amazon.

The Mission of This Role

Drive profitable growth across our Amazon catalog.

Not just more sales.

Not just lower ACOS.

Growth that improves contribution margin and long-term ranking.

What You Will Own

:moneybag: 

PPC Strategy & Profitability



Own total ad spend and performance across the catalog

Manage and improve TACOS, ACOS, and contribution margin

Define break-even ACOS targets per SKU

Allocate budget based on profitability and growth potential

Identify where to scale aggressively vs reduce spend

:jigsaw: 

Campaign Structure & Architecture



Build and maintain structured campaigns:

Discovery (Auto / Broad)

Ranking (Exact / High-intent)

Branded defense

Competitor targeting



Segment campaigns by intent and performance stage

Continuously restructure accounts for efficiency and scale

:chart_with_upwards_trend: 

Scaling & Optimization



Scale winning campaigns while maintaining profitability

Optimize bids, placements, and budgets based on data—not guesswork

Identify high-performing search terms and isolate them

Reduce wasted spend and eliminate non-performing keywords

Improve CTR and CVR through collaboration with listing team

:mag: 

Data Analysis & Decision Making



Analyze:

TACOS trends

Conversion rates

CPC inflation

Placement performance

Search term profitability



Make decisions based on profit, not vanity metrics

Provide clear insights—not just reports

:hammer_and_wrench: 

Execution Excellence



Manage campaigns inside Amazon Advertising Console

Use bulk sheets and structured workflows for efficiency

Implement bid adjustments and placement strategies

Maintain clean, scalable campaign structures

:handshake: 

Cross-Team Collaboration



Work closely with Listing Growth Specialists to:

Align keyword strategy

Improve conversion rates

Support ranking initiatives



Provide input on:

Product launches

Pricing strategy

Promotional planning



:bar_chart: 

Reporting & Accountability

Provide weekly reporting on:



TACOS and profitability trends

Campaign performance breakdown

Budget allocation decisions

Scaling opportunities

Risks and issues

Non-Negotiable Requirements



4–6+ years hands-on Amazon PPC experience

Proven experience managing large-scale catalogs (500+ SKUs minimum)

Strong understanding of:

TACOS vs ACOS

Contribution margin

Break-even ACOS

Campaign structure strategy



Deep experience inside Amazon Advertising Console

Strong analytical and decision-making skills

Ability to work PST hours full-time

What We Are NOT Looking For



Task-based PPC VAs

Candidates focused only on ACOS

People who “optimize bids” without understanding profitability

Anyone without a clear campaign structure strategy

Who You Are

You:



Think in terms of profit, not spend

Understand when to scale vs protect margin

Can diagnose performance issues quickly

Make decisions using data, not opinions

Take ownership of results—not just tasks

What Success Looks Like (First 60–90 Days)



Clear understanding of account structure and performance

Campaigns restructured for efficiency and scalability

Wasteful spend reduced

High-performing keywords identified and scaled

Improved TACOS and overall profitability

Strong alignment with listing and SEO strategy

How to Apply (IMPORTANT)



Send:



Your resume

A short case study of a PPC account you managed:

What was the problem?

What actions did you take?

What was the impact on profitability?



Answer this question:

A product sells for $40 with a landed cost of $18.

Current ACOS is 30%.

What would you do?

Applications without this will not be considered.



Compensation & Growth



Competitive salary based on experience

Performance-based incentives tied to profitability improvements

Opportunity to manage and scale a large, complex catalog

Long-term growth into senior leadership role

Clear increase in visibility and conversion

title: Experienced Transaction Coordinator
description:
We are a Transaction Coordinator Team in the Bay Area, CA. We are looking to add an additional EXPERIENCED Transaction Coordinator who's attention to detail and customer service are second to none! Our ideal candidate would thrive in a structured environment, have rapid problem solving ability and be highly responsive.



To be considered for the position, please make sure to send your resume and intro video or recording. Also, please note. You MUST HAVE RECENT TC EXPERIENCE PREFERABLY IN CALIFORNIA TO BE CONSIDERED. RATE TBD DEPENDING ON EXPERIENCE. PLEASE DO NOT APPLY IF YOU DO NOT HAVE ANY TC EXPERIENCE. PLEASE DO NOT APPLY IF YOU ARE WORKING FOR MULTIPLE CLIENTS. WE ARE LOOKING FOR SOMEONE WHO IS GOING TO BE PART OF OUR TEAM AND GROW WITH OUR TEAM. REFERENCES  WILL BE REQUIRED AND VERIFIED.



Primary Objectives:



Keep Agents and the team protected through compliance and document accuracy with a high level of detail.



Respond to all incoming client communications the same day within business hours



Audit all transaction files within required timelines with 100% touches up to date



Must have experience using KW Command, Skyslope, and other known RE Platforms. Must have experience using Glide, Open to close and MLS listings.



Manage the transaction process from contract to close.



Develop effective ways for better communication and increased customer satisfaction



Conflict resolution - think independently and be proactive. Get coaching from tea
mbers when stuck and do not give your agents the job back



Have RECENT Transaction Coordinator experience working with CA Agents, preferably in Norther California. Able to read and understand a CA Purchase Agreement.



Regular Work Activities



Managing all incoming calls & communications pertaining to transactions



CAR contract processing in Brokerage processing system, create timeline & document it in teams systems and perform signature audit



Communicate with clients, Agents, Lenders and Escrow throughout transaction regarding updates, timeline, initial deposit, signing and other account needs



Add fully executed Residential Purchase Contract to the brokerages system



Daily audit of files - reporting what was done





o Managing all pending contract files and ensuring proper touches/connection through file audit process. All files kept up to date and maintained with the highest level of customer service, communication, and expectations across all channels of the transaction. Co-op and agent spoken to twice a week, lender twice a week, title twice a week



Order Home Warranty, send Invoice to Escrow



Submit DA requests/Broker Demands. Verify with Agent(s) DA’s are correct prior to Close of Escrow submit to Escrow for disbursement.



The position will start part time for training purposes but will convert into full time.

We offer Holiday pay (10 days) after 90 day probationary period.

PTO after one year of Employment.

title: Video Editor / Graphic Designer - Viral Organic + D2C Meta Ads (Remote, Full-Time)
description:
Hypetribe Asia is hiring a Video Editor / Graphic Designer (ideally one person who does both) to join one of our portfolio brands or agencies.



We're a venture studio running viral organic content and high-converting UGC-style D2C Meta ads for US and international brands. This is not a trainee role, we're looking for someone who's already made organic channels go viral through editing, or driven real conversion numbers on paid ads, and can walk into our team and tell us why things work.



If you've worked with US-based companies, sat through enough client feedback loops to have your own strong POV on what scrolls past vs. what stops the scroll, keep reading.



What You'll Actually Do

-Edit short-form video content (Reels, TikToks, Shorts) for viral organic and paid ad performance

-Design static ads, thumbnails, and social graphics across our portfolio brands

-Cut UGC-style D2C Meta ads from raw creator footage (hook-forward, conversion-driven)

-Bring your own POV on hooks, pacing, captions, and visual trends — we want your taste, not just your hands

-Teach the team what you've learned from past US-client work about what converts and what goes viral

-Collaborate with our creative directors, producers, and media buyers across time zones

-Iterate fast based on performance data (you'll actually see the numbers on your work most agencies don't show you this)

-Working knowledge of AI tools in your daily workflow — you're already using them to move faster, not resisting them. Think: generative image tools (Midjourney, Nano Banana, Higgsfield, Flux), AI video tools (Runway, Kling, Sora, Veo), AI audio (ElevenLabs, Suno), and AI-assisted editing



Nice to Have

-Motion graphics / After Effects template building

-Color grading experience (DaVinci Resolve or Premiere Lumetri)

-Experience editing for health, wellness, beauty, or D2C consumer brands

-Understanding of Meta Ads Manager basics (you don't need to buy, but you should know what the media buyer is asking for)

-Basic copywriting instinct for captions and on-screen text



Who This Is NOT For

-Entry-level editors looking for their first remote gig

-People who want step-by-step briefs with no creative input expected

-Anyone who hasn't worked with international clients before

-Editors who've never seen performance data on their own work

title: Business Development Representative (BDR)
description:
Role Overview



We are looking for two part-time Business Development Representatives to support the Executive Producer with outbound prospecting, CRM management, and appointment setting. This is a ground-floor opportunity because there is no existing lead list. The right candidates will be resourceful self-starters who know how to find, qualify, and engage prospects independently, while maintaining discipline in time tracking and productivity.



Key Responsibilities



Research and generate leads using LinkedIn, AI tools, and online research, guided by a detailed Ideal Customer Profile (ICP)

Manage HubSpot CRM: organize the pipeline, classify leads, build and run workflows, and log all activity

Conduct outbound calls using the HubSpot dialer during EST business hours

Send LinkedIn messages and outreach
s on behalf of the Executive Producer

Book qualified discovery appointments directly onto the Executive Producer's calendar

Maintain complete relationship tracking across all touchpoints in HubSpot

Work toward a combined running average of 5 qualified appointments per week

Execute approximately 500 manual outreach touchpoints per month across all channels

Accurately track work hours and activity using Hubstaff, ensuring transparency and accountability



Required Qualifications



Hands-on HubSpot experience: workflows, sequences, lead classification, dialer, and calendar integration are required, not preferred

Proven outbound B2B sales background: cold calling, objection handling, and appointment setting

Excellent spoken and written English with no communication barrier

Strong independent research skills using LinkedIn and AI tools

Ability to work without day-to-day supervision

Availability during 10:00 AM – 2:00 PM EST, and 12:00 PM - 4:00 PM EST, Monday through Friday



Evaluation Criteria



Candidates will be assessed based on the following:



Relevant Work Experience

Software & Technical Proficiency

Remote Work Experience & Adaptability

English Proficiency (Spoken & Written)

Professionalism & Attitude

Response Time & Clarity

Internet & Work Setup

Commitment to Role & Availability

Time Management & Dependability

Problem-Solving Skills

Willingness to Learn & Adapt

Hubstaff Usage (accuracy, consistency, and integrity in time tracking)



Ideal Candidate Profile



Has built B2B pipelines before and not just worked pre-existing ones

Understands long sales cycles and relationship-driven outreach

Tracks their own activity and output without being prompted

Receives feedback and adjusts quickly

Has experience in events, hospitality, tech, pharma, or professional services (a plus, not a requirement)



Application Instructions



To be considered for this role, please complete the application form and submit the required materials:



Fill out the application form here: 

Submit your most recent CV

Submit a short introduction video (1–2 minutes) highlighting your relevant experience and communication skills



Only applicants who complete all requirements will be reviewed.

title: E-commerce Operations Manager (Account Setup + Product & Listing) Location: Remote
description:
Position: E-commerce Operations Manager (Account Setup + Product & Listing)

Location: Remote



“We are looking for someone who can grow with the company”



We are a U.S.-based wholesale company (16 years) currently expanding into online sales.

At the 
nt, we do not have active online store channels, and we are looking for a reliable and proactive tea
mber to help us build and manage our e-commerce operations from scratch.



?



???? About the Business:



Our core business is wholesale distribution in the U.S.



We are now looking to:



• Build new online sales channels (Amazon, eBay, Walmart, WooCommerce, etc.)

• Clear returned, overstock, and excess inventory through online platforms

• Identify new profitable products and opportunities for expansion



This role will play a key part in launching and growing our online business.



?



???? About the Role:



You will be responsible for setting up our online stores, researching products, creating listings, and managing product performance.



Our U.S. team will handle purchasing, inventory, and shipping.

You will focus on the online side of the business.



?



???? Key Responsibilities:



• Set up and launch seller accounts on platforms such as Amazon, eBay, and Walmart Marketplace

• Assist with account verification and ensure compliance

• Build and organize store structure (categories, policies, basic setup)

• Research products in the U.S. market and identify profitable opportunities

• Analyze demand, pricing, and competition

• Identify opportunities to sell returned, overstock, or clearance items

• Create and optimize product listings (titles, keywords, descriptions)

• Suggest pricing strategies and monitor product performance

• Track sales and recommend restocking or new product investments

• Support launching new online stores or expanding to new platforms when needed



?



???? Requirements:



• Proven experience with Amazon, eBay, WooCommerce, or similar platforms

• Experience setting up seller accounts from scratch is highly preferred

• Strong understanding of the U.S. e-commerce market

• Experience in product research and listing optimization

• Good analytical and problem-solving skills

• Good English communication

• Responsible, detail-oriented, and proactive



?



???? Nice to Have:



• Experience with product research tools (Keepa, Helium 10, Jungle Scout)

• Experience in reselling, arbitrage, or liquidation products

• Familiar with electronics or consumer products

• Experience launching new stores or scaling online channels



?



???? Compensation:



Base Salary: $700 – $900/month (based on experience)



* Performance Bonus (Profit Sharing):



• Earn 5% – 10% of net profit from new products you research and help launch

• Bonus is calculated and paid monthly based on actual product performance

• Only profitable products qualify for bonus

• Net profit is calculated after product cost, platform fees, and related expenses

• Bonus applies only to products approved and assigned to you before launch



High performers can earn $2,000+ per month based on results.



We are looking for someone who is motivated by performance and wants to grow with the business.



?



???? Work Structure:



• Remote position

• Long-term opportunity

• Workload may vary depending on business needs

• Opportunity to grow into a key operator role



?



???? To Apply:



Please send:



• Your resume

• Details of accounts you have set up before

• Platforms you have worked with

• Examples of products you have researched or listed

• Tools you have used for product research



Additionally, please answer this question:



Describe ONE product you researched before and explain why you believed it would sell in the U.S. market.

title: Video Editor — DaVinci Resolve — Premium Automotive Content (Part-Time with Chance for FULL Time, Long-Term)
description:
We are a premium auto detailing and paint protection shop in Kirkland, Washington. We work on high-end vehicles — ceramic coatings, PPF, paint correction — and we document every job on camera.

We are looking for a video editor who can take our raw footage and turn it into clean, cinematic content for Instagram Reels and YouTube. We shoot on a Sony ZV-E10 and iPhone. The footage is good. Your job is to cut it well.

What you will be doing:



Editing 3–5 videos per week from raw bucketed footage following a provided script and shot list

Adding synced captions and text overlays in our brand style

Adding trending Instagram audio at low volume

Saving finished videos as Instagram drafts for my review

Posting approved videos following our Milanote content calendar



What we are looking for:



Proven DaVinci Resolve experience — not CapCut, not Premiere. DaVinci is a must.

A portfolio that includes premium, cinematic content — automotive, luxury, lifestyle, or similar

Strong understanding of pacing — you hold shots, you do not over-cut

Clean caption work — synced to speech, minimal, single line

Reliable turnaround — 24 to 48 hours from receiving footage to finished draft

Good internet connection with a backup



You do not need to:



Write scripts or captions

Come up with content ideas

Manage the channel strategy



Everything is provided. Your job is precise, high-quality execution.

Hours: 20–25 hours per week

Pay: $500–$550/month depending on experience

To apply, start your message with the words "I read the full post" and send a link to 2–3 videos you have edited. Automotive content preferred but not required — show us your best cinematic work.

title: Ecommerce Operations Assistant
description:
About the Role



We operate multiple Shopify eCommerce brands and are hiring an Operations Specialist (Execution-Focused).



This is not a customer support role.



Your responsibility is to handle day-to-day operational execution across our stores—ensuring systems are updated, tasks are completed, and nothing falls through the cracks.

What You’ll Be Doing

-Monitoring Shopify stores (orders, flags, operational issues)

-Updating and maintaining Google Sheets (finance, tracking, reporting)

-Uploading and managing products in Shopify

-Keeping internal systems clean, accurate, and organized



Who This Is For

Experienced with Shopify (basic to intermediate level)

Comfortable working with Google Sheets

HIGHLY organized and detail-oriented

Reliable and consistent in execution

Able to follow processes and instructions precisely

$6–$9/hour

Full-time (Mon-Sat)

Long-term opportunity

We only review applicants who follow instructions.

title: Part Time Virtual Assistant for Text Lead Follow Up and Scheduling
description:
Pittsburgh Mobile Detailing is hiring a part time Virtual Assistant to handle inbound text leads, follow up with old leads, help schedule appointments, and keep our CRM updated.

Main tasks:

- Reply to inbound leads after the automatic first message

- Gather missing information like vehicle type, package, photos, address, and name

- Send quotes using our pricing system

- Follow up with unbooked leads

- Reactivate older leads

- Schedule booked customers in Square

- Update CRM statuses and notes correctly

- Escalate unusual situations when needed



Work schedule:

- 11:30 AM to 1:30 PM Eastern Time

- 6:00 PM to 8:00 PM Eastern Time

- Monday through Friday

- Around 20 hours per week



Requirements:

- Strong written English

- Good attention to detail

- Able to follow SOPs exactly

- Comfortable with repetitive process based work

- Reliable internet

- Comfortable using text messaging, Square, and spreadsheets/CRM

- No phone calls required



Important:

This role is mainly text based. Spoken English does not need to be perfect, but written English must be clear and professional.



To apply, send:

1. Your experience as a VA or customer support/admin assistant

2. Your time zone

3. Your written English level

4. Whether you have used Square, CRMs, or appointment scheduling tools before

5. A short sample reply to this lead:



“Hi I have a 2019 Honda CRV and I need the interior cleaned. What would it cost?”



Start your reply with: PMD VA

title: Operations + Content Manager (Simplero, Podcast, Social, Writing Quality)
description:
Operations + Content Manager (Simplero, Podcast, Social, Writing Quality)





Anne Ribley (author, speaker, and host of the “Remarkable Souls” podcast) is hiring a highly organized, detail-obsessed right-hand to run her digital business and protect the integrity of her writing voice.



This role is perfect for someone who loves systems and words.





Responsibilities



1. Simplero Ownership (must-have)



- Organize and maintain Simplero: tags, lists, automations, products,
s, funnels, and assets.



- Learn Simplero deeply and become the go-to person for troubleshooting + improvements.



- Build and manage courses: structure modules/lessons, upload content, format pages, QA links, and publish updates.



2. Executive/Admin & Business Organization



3. Podcast Management (Remarkable Souls)



4. Social Media & Content Support



5. Canva Mastery





The #1 non-negotiable: writing discernment + detail



You must be: Articulate with strong editorial instincts.



- Able to differentiate AI writing from human writing (tone, rhythm, specificity, emotional truth, and “over-polished” patterns).

- Extremely detail-oriented: grammar, formatting, brand consistency, and follow-through.



Requirements:

- Genuinely loves organizing

- Proven experience with Simplero (or equivalent platform expertise + willingness to become a Simplero power user fast).

- Strong project management and “make it happen” execution.

- Comfortable juggling admin + creative production without dropping details.

- Strong writing/editing skills (you catch awkward phrasing and preserve the author’s voice).

- Reliable communication, proactive updates, and good judgment.





Bonus points:

- Podcast ops experience.

- Pinterest strategy experience.

- Wordpress VA

- Experience supporting authors, coaches, or spiritual/wellness brands.

title: GRAPHIC DESIGNER — LONG-TERM PARTNERSHIP
description:
Let me be upfront with you, because that's how we operate.



We're a D2C e-commerce brand in the women's health space. We run paid ads on Meta. We sell a product that genuinely helps people, and every visual we produce reflects that.



Transparency and honesty aren't buzzwords here, they're the reason our customers trust us, and the reason we're still growing.



We've worked with designers before. Some were talented. Most were treated like vendors, asset in, asset out, goodbye.

That's not what we're building.



We're in this for the long game. We want you to be too.



- THE ROLE



Position: Direct Response Graphic Designer for Meta Ads

Commitment: Full-time, long-term (this is not a freelance gig)

Hours: 40h/week

Location: 100% remote

Market: English-speaking (US primary)

Compensation: $600–$800/month base + performance bonuses



- WHAT LONG-TERM ACTUALLY MEANS HERE



Year-over-year salary increases of 10–20% for strong performers.

Performance bonuses tied directly to ad performance and ROAS.

Creative ownership: you'll understand the strategy, the avatar, the psychology behind every visual.

A real team: you'll work closely with the founder and marketing lead, not disappear into a ticket queue.



- WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR



Non-negotiable:



3+ years as a graphic designer in DTC e-commerce or digital marketing

Proven experience creating ad creatives, landing page visuals, and social content that actually ran

Strong command of Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator, After Effects)

Experience with AI image generation tools (MidJourney, Leonardo, DALL·E, etc.)

Understanding of conversion-focused design, you know why visual hierarchy matters for an ad



Strong preference:



Health or wellness brand experience

Knowledge of direct-response marketing and what makes someone stop scrolling

Motion graphics or light video editing capability



- WHO THRIVES HERE:



You look at a high-performing ad and instinctively break down why it works.

You care about what happens after the asset goes live, not just whether the client approved it.

You understand that empathy, trust, and clarity aren't soft concepts in health marketing, they're conversion levers.

You want to help build a brand's visual identity over years, not just deliver a batch of assets.



- WHO THIS IS NOT FOR



If you're managing 8 clients simultaneously and fitting us in between, this isn't the right fit.

We want someone who is genuinely invested in one brand's growth, because that's where the real upside is.



- THE PROCESS



We review every application carefully. Portfolio quality matters far more than volume. If your work shows real DTC and direct-response experience, you'll hear from us fast.



We move quickly, but we don't rush decisions on people.



IMPORTANT: We don't check the chat. To apply, please fill out this form: 



Thank you!

We expect this role to increase in hours (up to 20 hours a week) within 90 days. There is a possibility to go full-time within 12 months.

Experience Required: At least 4 years of customer support experience



About the Brand:

Authentic Ego is a US-based direct-to-consumer skincare brand with proprietary formulations targeting hormonal acne and sensitive skin. We are a small, fast-growing team that treats every customer interaction as a brand-defining 
nt. 

Every
, every order issue, and every touchpoint should feel personal, knowledgeable, and elevated. Our goal is to create a high-touch, concierge-level experience for all our customers and to create a ‘wow’ 
nt with every interaction. 



What You'll Do:

- Respond to all customer service
s (inquiries, order status, shipping questions, product questions, refund requests, cancellations, and sensitive situations including formulation transparency requests). 

- Coordinate directly with our 3PL fulfillment partner on customer orders, including tracking, shipping issues, address corrections, lost packages, and replacement orders. Create and manage discount codes in Shopify as directed. 

- Process refunds, and order modifications in Shopify. 

- Escalate complex issues to leadership with clear context and a recommended resolution. 

- Maintain and update customer service response templates as the brand voice evolves. Flag recurring customer issues or product feedback patterns to leadership weekly.



What We Require:

- Demonstrated proficiency with Shopify (order management, discount creation, customer lookup, refund processing.

- Previous experience in a customer-facing role for a DTC or ecommerce brand.

- Exceptional written English with a warm but professional tone.

- Ability to handle sensitive customer situations (product reactions, complaints, upset customers) with empathy and composure. 

- Familiarity with 3PL coordination. 

- Experience with helpdesk tools and AI agents (We use Lyro AI + Tidio)

- Reliable internet connection and availability for 2 hours daily Monday to Friday.

- Self-directed and proactive attitude



Strong Preferences:

- Experience with a beauty, skincare, wellness, or health brand.

- Understanding of or genuine interest in skincare ingredients and science-forward products.



What we provide:

- 1-on-1 escalation support and training from our Founder (Our Founder is available 9am-10pm EST daily!)

- Fully paid training on our customer experience processes, SOPs and platforms

- Full playbook with our response SOPs

- Full repository of common FAQs

- A caring & respectful work environment where you will be treated with kindness and care

title: Video Editor
description:
We're looking for a highly skilled, experienced video editor who genuinely understands what makes people stop scrolling.



You'll be working on paid Meta ads for info product clients, which means every edit has to earn attention in the first two seconds and hold it long enough to convert. You understand why pacing kills or saves a video and how to retain audiences. 



You've spent enough time watching short-form content that you have a feel for what's working right now on TikTok and Instagram. You can take raw footage and shape it into something that feels native to the feed, not like an ad that interrupted someone's evening.



You're also someone who takes their craft seriously enough to want to improve it. We invest in our team, paid courses, AI video training, and real creative responsibility as you grow. The last thing we want is someone comfortable doing the minimum. If you saw an AI tool that could make your edits better and didn't tell us about it, this probably isn't the right fit.



You'll receive:



Strong salary ($1,325/month)

Consistent income with performance bonuses for winning ads

Full schedule flexibility  - deliver on time and work when you want

Paid courses in any skill relevant to your role

Training in AI video generation

A path into a creative strategist role for the right person





Skills you need:

Deep understanding of retention, pacing, and engagement — this is the job

Current knowledge of organic formats and trends on TikTok and Instagram

High level of written and spoken English

Ability to generate AI B-roll, or genuine willingness to learn fast 





How to apply:

title: Online Math/Science Teacher(Near-Native Accent)
description:
About Pomelo Academy

Pomelo Academy is an innovative online international school dedicated to delivering high-quality education to students worldwide. We provide a dynamic and engaging learning environment, catering to individualized instruction that transcends geographical boundaries.



Job Description

We are seeking passionate and experienced Near-Native English-speaking Online K-12 Math and/or Science Teachers with verifiable teaching certifications. The ideal candidates will have strong academic backgrounds in Mathematics and/or Science, experience teaching young learners (ages 5–18), and a commitment to creating a supportive, inquiry-based, and engaging online learning environment.



Responsibilities



Deliver interactive and engaging Math and/or Science lessons to individuals and small groups of 2–6 students aged 5–18.

Teach using internationally recognized curricula such as A Closer Look, Glencoe Science, Pearson Interactive Science, NGSS-aligned resources, Singapore Math, or IB/AP/A Level Math programs.

Create age-appropriate lesson plans focused on conceptual understanding, inquiry, problem-solving, and real-world applications.

Incorporate visuals, multimedia, and hands-on virtual activities to make abstract concepts accessible and engaging.

Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback to students and parents.

Foster curiosity, discussion, and active learning in a safe and supportive space.



Qualifications



Professional teacher with at least 2 years of teaching experience (Kindergarten–Grade 12).

Must hold a valid teaching license/certification (e.g., Teaching License, State Certification). TESOL/TEFL is a plus.

Near-native English accent with excellent spoken and written communication skills.

Strong academic background in Mathematics and/or Science (Biology, Physics, Chemistry, General Science).

Experience teaching in public/international schools or reputable online platforms.

Familiarity with inquiry-based and/or interdisciplinary approaches (e.g., STEM/STEAM).

Comfortable working between 07:00–22:00 (Weekdays) and 9:00–22:00 (Weekends), GMT+8.

Proficiency with digital platforms such as ClassIn, Microsoft Office, and other educational technologies.

Must have a stable and fast internet connection and a PC/laptop with at least Windows 10 or Mac OS Catalina.



Benefits



Flexible working hours.

Opportunity to teach using globally respected Math and Science curricula.

Be part of an international, passionate team of educators.

Access to training and professional development.

Regular enrollment model (not a booking system), ensuring schedule stability and consistency

title: Cold Calling & Lead Management Specialist (Real Estate)
description:
I’m a real estate agent based in New York (Queens, Brooklyn, Nassau County) looking to bring on someone who can help me consistently generate and convert leads.



This is a part-time position to start, with the opportunity to grow into full-time as the business scales.



?



???? What You’ll Be Doing



You’ll play a key role in helping generate business daily. Your responsibilities include:



* Making outbound cold calls (expired listings, FSBO, homeowner data)

* Following up with leads and updating CRM with detailed notes

* Scheduling appointments directly on my calendar

* Managing and responding to
s

* Assisting with
 marketing / social media marketing

* Using AI tools to improve lead generation and efficiency

* Keeping all lead activity organized and moving forward



?



???? Performance Expectations (Important)



This is a results-driven role. Here’s what success looks like:



Daily:



* 150–250 dials

* 15–25 conversations

* 3–5 interested leads



Weekly Goal:



* Help generate 5–8 qualified leads

* Set 2–3 appointments



Your work directly contributes to 1 new listing per week, so consistency matters.



?



? Schedule



* Eastern Standard Time (EST)

* 8:00 AM – 11:00 AM

* Part-time to start ? Full-time opportunity



?



???? Pay



* $4.00 – $5.50/hour (based on experience)

* Opportunity for raises + long-term growth



?



???? What I’m Looking For



* Strong English communication skills

* Confident speaking on the phone

* Organized and able to track and update leads properly

* Familiar with or willing to learn:

    * CRM systems

    *
 marketing

    * AI tools (ChatGPT or similar)

* Reliable, consistent, and coachable



?



???? Important



Everyone says “I’m detail-oriented and a hard worker.”



Don’t say that.



Show it through your experience and answers.



?



???? How to Apply



1. Use this subject line:

    Phone Specialist – [Your Name]

2. Include in your application:

    * Your experience with cold calling or sales

    * Any real estate experience (if applicable)

3. Answer this question:

    ???? Why should I hire you for this role?

    (Again — don’t say “because I’m detail oriented and a hard worker”)

4. Include this code at the top of your application:

    8AP



?



? Final Note



I’m looking for someone long-term who wants to grow with the business.



If you’re consistent, take initiative, and help move leads forward daily, this can turn into a full-time position quickly.

title: Healthcare Outreach & Relationship Coordinator (Remote, Part-Time)
description:
Healthcare Outreach & Relationship Coordinator (Remote, Part-Time)



About Us:

We are a U.S.-based clinical nutrition company working with surgeons and physicians to improve patient outcomes before and after procedures. Our mission is to support doctors by helping educate and guide their patients—without adding extra work to their office.



We are growing quickly and looking for a reliable, detail-oriented tea
mber to help us connect with physicians and schedule introductory calls.



About the Role:

This is a part-time remote position focused on outreach, communication, and organization.



Your primary responsibility is to connect with doctors’ offices and schedule short introductory calls for our leadership team. You will not be responsible for “selling”—your role is to open doors and create opportunities.



Key Responsibilities:



Contact medical offices via phone,
, and/or LinkedIn

Speak with front desk staff, office managers, or providers professionally

Briefly introduce our company using provided scripts

Schedule introductory calls with interested physicians

Track all outreach and responses in our CRM system

Follow up consistently with offices that have been contacted

Maintain organized records of all communication



What We’re Looking For:



Strong English communication skills (spoken and written)

Professional and confident phone presence

Organized, detail-oriented, and reliable

Comfortable following scripts and systems

Able to work independently and stay consistent daily

Positive attitude and willingness to learn



Nice to Have (Not Required):



Experience working with U.S. healthcare offices

Experience in appointment setting or outreach roles

Familiarity with CRM systems



Work Schedule:



Part-time (approximately 15–25 hours per week)

Flexible schedule, but must overlap partially with U.S. business hours



Compensation:



Hourly pay (based on experience)

Performance bonuses for scheduled calls and successful connections



Important Instructions (Read Carefully):

To apply, please include the following:



A short paragraph about your experience with outreach, calls, or communication roles

A voice recording (1–2 minutes) introducing yourself as if you were calling a medical office

Your favorite productivity tool and why

The word “Vital360” at the top of your application so we know you read this fully



Applications without these items will not be considered.



We are looking for someone who is reliable, professional, and ready to grow with us long-term. If that’s you, we look forward to hearing from you!

title: Dispatcher & Invoicing Administrator
description:
Location: Remote – Pacific Time (8:00 AM – 5:00 PM Pacific Time) | Wednesday – Sunday



Company Overview: Alltemp is a leading provider of HVAC solutions dedicated to providing exceptional service and quality installations to our customers in California and Hawaii. We specialize in residential and commercial HVAC systems, as well as commercial refrigeration, offering comprehensive installation, repair, and maintenance services.



Job Description: We are looking for a reliable and detail-oriented Dispatcher & Invoicing Administrator to support the daily operations of our HVAC company. This is a dual-function remote role: Wednesday through Friday, the candidate will focus on invoicing, billing accuracy, and administrative reporting; Saturday and Sunday, the candidate will serve as our primary dispatcher, coordinating field technicians and delivering exceptional customer service. The ideal candidate is highly organized, has strong attention to detail, and thrives in a fast-paced environment. This position requires strong communication, time management, and problem-solving skills, and is essential to keeping our operations running smoothly.



Responsibilities:

Dispatching (Saturday – Sunday)

• Schedule and dispatch HVAC Technicians to service calls, installations, and maintenance jobs based on availability, skillset, and location.

• Monitor technician progress throughout the day to ensure timely job completion and adjust schedules as needed.

• Serve as the main point of contact for field technicians, providing support and updates in real-time.

• Communicate with customers to confirm appointments, provide updates, and follow up on service issues.

• Maintain accurate and up-to-date records of jobs dispatching software, ServiceTitan

• Collaborate with the service manager and customer service team to prioritize emergency calls and reschedule as necessary.

• Ensure that all service tickets are closed and invoices are sent out properly with detailed information and customer feedback.

• Properly schedule recalls as necessary

• Follow up on unsold estimates on a timely basis and keep accurate, detailed notes about the unsold estimates

• Timely and efficiently schedule preventative maintenance calls.

• Accurately and timely tag all incoming phone calls indicating the source of the call, reason for the call, etc. 

• Follow up on “abandoned calls” list daily. 

• Send timely, accurate daily and weekly reports to the executive team as required

• Maintain a high level of professionalism and customer service in all interactions.

• Assist with special projects and initiatives as needed to support the overall goals of the company.

• Other responsibilities as assigned.



Invoicing & Administrative Reporting (Wednesday – Friday)

• Review and process all completed job invoices in ServiceTitan and Quickbooks, ensuring accuracy of labor, parts, and pricing before sending to customers.

• Follow up on outstanding and unpaid invoices, coordinating with customers and the accounting team to resolve billing discrepancies.

• Prepare and submit accurate daily and weekly administrative reports to the executive team, including job summaries, revenue snapshots, and technician productivity metrics.

• Audit closed service tickets to confirm all required documentation, customer signatures, and notes are complete and properly recorded in ServiceTitan.

• Track and follow up on unsold estimates with accurate, detailed notes; escalate high-value estimates to the service manager as appropriate.

• Assist with special projects and administrative initiatives as needed to support overall business operations.



Qualifications:

• Proven experience in a dispatch, scheduling, or administrative role (HVAC or trades industry preferred).

• Strong organizational and multitasking abilities in a fast-paced environment.

• Excellent communication skills including fluency in English (written and verbal).

• Proficiency with dispatching or CRM software (e.g., ServiceTitan, Housecall Pro, FieldEdge, etc.).

• Have basic computer skills and knowledge of how to use Excel.

• Ability to stay calm under pressure and resolve conflicts or unexpected challenges quickly.

• Strong attention to detail and a proactive mindset.

• Proficiency in invoicing, billing, and basic accounting tasks; experience with accounts receivable or billing software is a plus.

• Must be available to work Wednesday through Sunday, 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM Pacific Time, with consistent schedule adherence.

• Reliable high-speed internet connection required for all remote work; candidates must provide proof of stable connectivity.

• Quiet, distraction-free home office environment suitable for customer-facing calls and video meetings.



Benefits:

• Hourly rate of $8/hr

• Opportunities for advancement and professional development

title: Sales Development Representative
description:
Remote Sales Development Representative

Kelly Agency: Allstate – Pottstown, PA



Our challenge:

The Kelly Agency, a leading Allstate Insurance Agency, is looking for a dynamic Remote Sales Development

Representative to join our Outside Sales Team. Earn a 240 PHP base wage plus daily and monthly bonuses, with

top performers averaging 10,000+ PHP/month in bonuses.



Who we are:

At the Kelly Agency, we are driven by passion and teamwork, committed to building strong personal

relationships. As one of Pennsylvania’s largest remote-friendly Allstate Agencies, we rank in the top 10%

nationwide for new business growth and customer satisfaction. Our team thrives on shared incentives and

continuous improvement, all while maintaining a healthy work-life balance. Embracing cutting-edge technology,

we utilize digital tools such as social media, texting, video, online quoting, and lead management software to

enhance our operations.

We take immense pride in our customer experience, safeguarding what matters most to our clients and their

families. Our core values are: putting customers first, staying positive, being honest, embracing growth, and

working together.



Follow us on Social 

Visit our Website: 



The job description:

Insurance is essential, yet often confusing. As a Sales Development Representative, you'll provide a friendly,

reliable, and informative experience to prospective customers, by connecting with them on the phone and

introducing them to our licensed agents for quoting. This entry-level position offers a career path within our

agency, with opportunities for growth and advancement.



The traits we are looking for:

- Passion for helping people protect their assets and gain peace of mind.

- Highly motivated with a hunter’s mentality.

- Skilled at handling objections while prioritizing customer interests.

- Strong computer skills and the ability to multitask across various programs.

- Drive to win and a willingness to follow our proven success system.



The core job requirements:

- Must have ability to work from home. This includes: a quiet working space, computer, monitor, headset, mouse.

- Make 475+ calls daily to provide warm leads to our licensed agents.

- Pre-qualify insurance prospects for insurability and quality of risk.

- Transfer a minimum of 8 qualified leads to our Outside Sales Team daily.

- Collect and maintain accurate data in the CRM system, including contact information, market data, and

qualifiers.

- Participate in daily meetings to ensure team alignment.



Some benefits we provide:

- Work from home

- 13th Month Bonus

- Paid time off after 180 days

- Health Insurance



Join us at the Kelly Agency and be a part of a forward-thinking, tech-driven team dedicated to customer

excellence and personal growth.

title: AI Video Expert
description:
Looking for full time video editor for AI videos to market products.



Reference for the videos and what we're looking for from you: 
/reel/DXe-hRsscgB/



You will be editing and making AI videos using AI tools like Veo3, Gemini, Higgsfield, Heygen, and ElevenLabs. You will be generating video clips / AI characters talking and editing them with Capcut.

title: Creative Strategist — U.S. Digital Marketing Agency
description:
About Us

Candor Marketing is a U.S.-based done-for-you digital marketing agency. We run paid ads, content, and full-funnel marketing for health/wellness clinics across the United States. We operate on a pod model — small, tight teams of specialists who own client outcomes together.



We move fast, we expect ownership, and we don't tolerate hedging or half-finished work. If you take pride in your craft and want to grow inside a serious agency environment, keep reading.



The Role

We're hiring a Creative Strategist to own the creative side of our paid media engine. You will be responsible for producing every ad asset our clients run — static images, motion graphics, short-form video edits, UGC-style ads, carousels, and concept variations.



You will work directly with our Media Buyer, who will brief you on what's needed (angles, hooks, offers, audiences). Your job is to translate that brief into scroll-stopping creative that performs.

This is not a "make it pretty" role. This is a performance creative role. You're building ads that need to convert — not ads that just look nice.



You will produce all creative inside ZuOps (our creative production platform). Prior ZuOps experience is a strong plus but not required if you have strong fundamentals.



What You'll Do



Produce 20–40+ ad creatives per week across multiple clients

Take briefs from the media buyer and translate them into finished assets

Build static image ads, carousels, motion ads, and short-form video edits

Iterate on winning creatives — produce variations, swap hooks, test new angles

Adapt raw client footage (UGC, B-roll, testimonials) into ad-ready assets

Maintain on-brand consistency across each client account

Stay current on what's working in paid social (Meta, TikTok, YouTube)

Submit work through our pod's project management system (ClickUp)





What We're Looking For

Required:



2+ years producing paid social creative (Meta/Facebook ads especially)

Strong portfolio of ad creative — static AND video

Fluency in Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, Premiere, After Effects) OR equivalent (CapCut Pro, Canva Pro, Figma)

Understanding of direct response principles — hooks, pattern interrupts, CTAs

Ability to take feedback fast and iterate without ego

Excellent written English

Reliable internet, modern computer, quiet workspace



Strong Plus:



Experience with ZuOps

Experience working inside a U.S. agency

Background in health/wellness, med spa, or clinic vertical

Motion graphics / After Effects skills

Familiarity with TikTok-native and UGC ad styles





What We Offer



Competitive hourly salary, paid on time, every time

Long-term role with real growth path

Direct mentorship from agency leadership

Work on real U.S. accounts with real budgets — your creative will run





How to Apply

Send the following to be considered:



Subject line: "Creative Strategist — [Your Name]"

Link to your portfolio (must include paid ad creative — not just brand work)

5-10 examples of ads you produced that performed well (include results if possible)

Your current full-time availability and earliest start date

Your expected hourly salary in USD

Answer this question in 2–3 sentences: "What separates a good ad creative from a great one?"



Applications without a portfolio will not be reviewed. AI produced applications will not be reviewed.

title: Customer Service Representative – Speed-to-Lead Caller for US Clients (Native-Sounding American Accent Required)
description:
About Us

Luxa Marketing is a marketing agency based in Kentucky, USA. We run lead generation campaigns on
 for our clients across the United States: home service businesses and growing brands. Our edge is speed: when a lead comes in, we call within 30 seconds. That’s where you come in.



The Role

You will be the first voice our clients’ leads hear. When someone fills out a
 form or messages one of our clients’ pages, you’ll call them back immediately, introduce yourself on behalf of that client, qualify the lead, and either book the appointment or hand it off according to that client’s playbook.



You’ll be representing several different US businesses throughout the day, so you need to be sharp about switching context, different scripts, different services, different tones. We’ll train you on each client and give you clear playbooks. Your job is to execute them consistently.



This is a phone-heavy role. If you don’t love being on the phone, this isn’t the job for you.

Schedule

 • Full-time, 40 hours per week

 • Monday–Friday, 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM Central Time (US)

 • You must be available to work these hours consistently

Compensation

 • $900 USD/month base

 • Up to $300/month in performance bonuses (based on speed-to-lead response time, lead-to-booking conversion, and attendance)

 • Paid weekly via direct bank deposit 

 • Paid time off after 90 days

 • 13th-month bonus



What We’re Looking For

 1. Native or near-native American accent. This is the single most important requirement. Our clients’ customers are American homeowners and business owners, and they need to feel like they’re talking to a local. If your accent is anything less than excellent, please don’t apply — we will screen carefully.



 2. Highly organized. You’ll be juggling multiple clients, multiple scripts, a CRM, and a calendar. Things cannot fall through the cracks.



 3. Consistent and reliable. Show up on time, every day. Speed-to-lead only works if you’re at your desk when the leads come in.



 4. Adaptable. You’ll switch between representing different businesses throughout the day. You need to keep each client’s name, offer, and tone straight.



 5. Friendly and natural on the phone. Not scripted-sounding. Not stiff. Warm, confident, and quick to build rapport.



 6. Strong written English for follow-up texts and
s.



 7. Stable internet and a quiet work environment (no background noise, no roosters, no kids).



 8. Reliable computer and noise-canceling headset.



Bonus Points If You Have

 • Previous experience with US-based clients (BPO, appointment setting, real estate, home services, etc.)

 • Experience working as a virtual receptionist or with multiple accounts at once

 • Experience with CRMs, dialers, or any speed-to-lead workflow

 • Sales or appointment-setting background



HOW TO APPLY (READ CAREFULLY - APPLICATIONS THAT SKIP THIS WILL BE IGNORED)

To apply, send us the following:

 1. A short video (preferred) or MP3 voice recording — 60 to 90 seconds — answering these three questions in English:

 • Why are you a good fit for this role?

 • Introduce yourself briefly like you would on a real lead call for a roofing company. 

 • What’s your home internet speed and your work setup? 



 2. Your resume with at least two references from past clients or employers.



 3. In the first line of your application message, type: “I read the whole post Murray” so we know you actually read this.

We will not respond to generic applications, copy-paste cover letters, or applications missing the audio/video. Send the audio or video as a Google Drive, Dropbox, or YouTube (unlisted) link.



Looking forward to hearing from you!

title: Graphic Designer Needed (Quick Project – Hand-Drawn Logo to SVG Conversion)
description:
We are looking for a skilled and detail-oriented Graphic Designer to convert a hand-drawn company logo into a clean, scalable SVG file.



This is a small, fast-turnaround project, so we are specifically looking for someone who is experienced, efficient, and precise.



If you do great work on this project, there will be ongoing opportunities for future design work.



Project Scope



You will be provided with a hand-drawn logo image, and your task is to:



Recreate the logo as a clean, professional SVG file

Maintain the exact style and proportions of the original drawing

Ensure smooth curves, proper alignment, and scalability



Deliver TWO final SVG versions:

Version 1: Clean black SVG (matching the original design)

Version 2: Same SVG with a thin outline border around the entire design

This outline will allow for dual-color usage

Border should be clean, consistent, and properly spaced



Requirements

Strong experience with Adobe Illustrator (or equivalent vector software)

Proven ability to trace and recreate hand-drawn artwork accurately

High attention to detail, spacing, and line consistency

Ability to deliver clean, optimized SVG files

Fast turnaround time (preferably within 24–48 hours)

Good communication and responsiveness



Nice to Have

Experience preparing logos for branding and print use

Understanding of stroke expansion, path cleanup, and SVG optimization



Deliverables

2 SVG files:

Black version (original style)

Outlined version (thin border for dual-color use)

Files should be:

Cleanly structured (no unnecessary anchor points)

Fully scalable without distortion

Ready for web and print use



Project Type

One-time project (with potential for ongoing work if performance is strong)



Timeline

Immediate start

Fast delivery preferred



To Apply



Please include:



Links or samples of similar logo/vector work

Confirmation that you can deliver within 24–48 hours

A short note on your process for converting hand-drawn designs into SVG



We’re looking for someone who can execute quickly without sacrificing quality.

If that’s you, we’d like to work with you.

title: CRM & Automation Specialist (Sales & Recruiting Systems)
description:
L’EVATE is building a scalable offshore talent platform serving North American businesses.



We’re now focused on building the internal systems that power how we sell, recruit, and operate.



We’re looking for a CRM & Automation Specialist who can take ownership of our systems across sales and recruiting and help us research, recommend, build, and optimize the systems that drive our operations.



This is not a basic admin role.

This is a systems-building role with real ownership and impact.



WHAT YOU’LL DO



Tech Stack Research and Recommendation

- Take ownership of evaluating and recommending the right CRM and sales tools for our business

- Compare options based on cost, scalability, integrations, and usability

- Present clear recommendations with reasoning (not just tool lists)

- Help us avoid overcomplicating or overpaying for tools



Build and Structure Systems

- Set up and manage CRM workflows for outbound sales (lead to call to meeting to deal)

- Organize and optimize our ATS in Manatal (candidate to screened to shortlisted to hired)

- Design clean pipelines, stages, and data structures



Automation and Workflows

- Build automations using Zapier, Make, or similar tools

- Automate lead routing, follow-ups, task creation, and notifications

- Reduce manual work and improve team efficiency



Integrations

- Connect CRM, ATS, communication tools, and scheduling systems

- Ensure data flows cleanly across platforms

- Troubleshoot and improve system performance



Reporting

- Build dashboards for sales activity, conversion rates, pipeline visibility, and recruiting performance



Ongoing Optimization

- Identify bottlenecks in workflows

- Improve systems over time

- Help onboard new tea
mbers into clean processes



WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR



Must-Have

- Experience with CRM systems and workflow setup

- Experience with an ATS or recruiting system

- Strong experience with automation tools (Zapier, Make, etc.)

- Ability to research, evaluate, and recommend tools independently

- Strong problem-solving and attention to detail

- Clear English communication



Nice-to-Have

- Experience supporting outbound sales teams

- Experience in recruiting or staffing environments

- Experience using AI tools to build or improve systems

- Familiarity with tools like Lovable or Claude Code

- Basic understanding of APIs or integrations



WHAT SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE

- A CRM and system setup that fits our business (not overbuilt)

- Clean, organized workflows for sales and recruiting

- Automations that reduce manual work

- Clear visibility into pipeline and performance

- Systems that scale as the team grows



HOW TO APPLY



To be considered, please include:

Brief Summary (3 to 5 sentences)

What systems have you built related to CRM, ATS, or automation? Focus on what you personally implemented



Loom Video (2 to 4 minutes) Required

Answer this:

If our goal is to have sales reps consistently booking meetings and recruiters efficiently placing candidates, how would you design the systems and workflows to support that? Walk through your thinking step by step, including what you would prioritize first and why



Important: Include the word BUILDER-Your Name at the top of your application to be considered



FINAL NOTE



We are looking for someone who can think in systems, not just tools, and take ownership of building and improving how our business operates



If you prefer step-by-step instructions for every task, this role is not the right fit

title: AI Video Specialist (AI generative Content - Full-time)
description:
About Hustl

Hustl is a holding group behind a portfolio of consumer brands spanning home decor, wellness, and smart home security. We're an operator-led team of 60+ across 10 countries, doing over $20M+ in annual revenue with more than $30M deployed into paid social since inception. Our brands have shipped to 42+ countries and been seen over a billion times on social feeds. We're not an agency. We're operators building the next generation of consumer brands.



The Role

We're hiring a full-time AI Video Specialist to create high-performing video ads across our entire portfolio. One day you're producing a lifestyle ad for our home decor brand, the next a wellness reel, the next a security-camera demo. Every concept lives and dies on the feed, and you own the entire creative pipeline from script to final cut.

No prior AI video experience required. If you have taste, hustle, and the drive to learn, we'll train you on every tool in the stack (Kling, Runway, Sora, Seedream, Nano Banana Pro, Premiere, After Effects, CapCut).



What You'll Do

Write scripts and storyboards that hook in the first two seconds. Generate, edit, and refine AI-powered video ads for Meta, TikTok, and YouTube. Produce scroll-stopping short-form content across all of our brands. Iterate on winners using real ad performance data. Ship volume. Own visual consistency across each brand's identity.



What You Bring

A sharp eye for what makes an ad actually perform. A hunger to learn. Solid video editing fundamentals (Premiere, After Effects, CapCut, or DaVinci). Written communication strong enough to pitch a concept in three sentences. Strong internet connection and a quiet workspace. Bias for action.



Nice to Have

UGC-style content experience. Photography or videography background. Familiarity with Meta Ads Library and ad performance metrics. A portfolio you're proud of, AI-generated or otherwise.

Compensation & Perks



?100,
,000 PHP monthly base salary. Performance bonus for every winning ad you ship, uncapped. 9am - 6pm Philippines Time, no graveyard shifts. Remote-first. Full AI tool stack covered. Friday team hangouts with games, giveaways, and espresso machines as prizes.



Why This Role Matters

Our ads have been seen over 1.4 billion times. Every one was built by a small creative team that believes in speed, taste, and obsessive iteration. Your work ships to millions, gets measured in real data, and shapes how our brands grow.



At Hustl we plant a tree for every order placed across our portfolio. We're on track to hit 1 million trees planted by the end of 2026. Join us, make ads that matter, and help us get there.



Only Apply Here -> 
/ai-video

title: Operations Assistant — (Remote, Full-Time)
description:
9 Line Agency is a veteran-owned company that provides non-conventional TDY lodging for military personnel. We source private homes and vacation rentals for teams on temporary duty assignments, handling everything from property sourcing to JTR-compliant invoicing. We're a small, fast-moving team that values ownership, clear communication, and getting things right the first time.



Important Information

1. WE DO NOT PROVIDE ANY TECH FOR THIS ROLE. You will need to have these things already.

2. Ideally you can work 5 days a week (Austin Texas time CST is our timezone, but possibly could have you working off set hours but will require a training period on our schedule, flexible on days.



The Role

We're hiring a full-time Operations Assistant to take ownership of our financial tracking, receipt management, and eventually grow into client-facing communications and invoicing.

This is not a "set tasks and forget" role. You'll be embedded in daily operations, working directly with leadership, and expected to flag problems before they become issues. We have documented SOPs for most processes — your job is to follow them precisely, ask questions when something doesn't make sense, and suggest improvements when you see them.

Starting responsibilities (Week 1-4):



P&L data cleanup and maintenance in Excel

Gathering and correctly labeling missing receipts from Airbnb and

Organizing financial records across multiple trips

Learning our systems: GHL, Asana, Google Drive, Square



Growth responsibilities (Month 2+):



Property manager communications (availability checks, booking confirmations)

Guest communications (post-booking support, check-in coordination)

GHL contact tagging and CRM management

Inbox triage and drafting
 responses for review

Asana task management

Invoicing support via Square

Housing flyer creation in Canva (SOPs provided)





Requirements



Excellent written English — You'll communicate with US-based clients and property managers. Grammar, tone, and professionalism matter.

Strong spoken English — Phone calls with property managers will be part of the role as you grow.

Excel proficiency — Formulas, data cleanup, basic bookkeeping logic. You should be comfortable with VLOOKUP, SUMIF, and conditional formatting at minimum.

Detail-oriented — Receipts need correct labels. Data needs to be accurate. Small mistakes create big problems downstream.

Decisive but knows when to check in — We want you to solve problems, but never commit us to a property, rate, refund, or cancellation without approval.

Reliable availability — 40 hours/week, with overlap during 7 AM – 3 PM Central Time (US). Two days off per week; weekend work is expected.







To Apply

We're filtering for attention to detail and communication skills. AFTER we select your applicant we will include the following tests.



A short video introducing yourself.



A written response to scenarios regarding property management communications.



Confirm you can complete an Excel proficiency test as the next step if we move forward.



About You



You're organized, you take pride in getting details right, and you don't need to be micromanaged. You're comfortable asking clarifying questions but also comfortable making judgment calls within your lane. You want a stable, long-term role where you can grow — not a gig you'll leave in three months.

title: B2C Sales Setter + Low-Ticket Closer — Trading Education (Remote, Full-Time)
description:
Hiring a B2C sales rep for my trading education company, AllWin Academy. Role is appointment setting first, low-ticket closing second. Speed-to-lead is the whole game — when a lead opts in, you’re on the phone with them in 1–3 minutes. Not 10. Not 30. One to three.

What you’ll own

 • Inbound opt-in response within 1–3 minutes (call + SMS)

 • Setting qualified 60-min appointments on my calendar

 • Closing low-ticket offers when assigned

 • Daily pipeline follow-up — every lead in the system gets touched

 • Logging activity in our CRM (GoHighLevel) and tracking sheets

Schedule

8 AM – 8 PM EST coverage. Flexible on the exact split, but the 1–3 minute response window during that range is non-negotiable.

Pay

$500/month flat.

Requirements

 • Minimum 1 year B2C phone sales (setting and closing)

 • Crystal clear spoken English

 • Comfortable with CRMs and spreadsheets — daily data entry is part of the job

 • Day trading, forex, or HFX exposure preferred (knowledge counts, you don’t need to be a pro trader)

 • Your own setting framework and your own low-ticket close framework

 • Reliable internet, quiet space, headset

To apply, send:

 1. Loom video (2–4 min) introducing yourself

 2. Years in B2C sales and what industries

 3. Your trading / forex / HFX background, if any

 4. Your appointment-setting framework — walk me through it step by step

 5. Your low-ticket close framework — including how you handle payment setup and objections at the close

 6. CRMs and tracking tools you’ve used

 7. Fastest lead response time you’ve personally hit, and how you held that pace

 8. Hours you can commit to inside the 8 AM – 8 PM EST window

9. WHY SHOULD I HIRE YOU! What do you bring to the table especially compared to all the other applicants?

Applications missing the Loom or that skip questions will be passed over.

This is not a social media manager role.

 sequences


 marketing systems:

 campaigns

 Subject:

title: Finance & Reporting Virtual Assistant
description:
Overview:

We’re looking for a highly detail-oriented Virtual Assistant to support our finance and reporting operations. This role involves working with commission data, generating reports, and communicating with insurance carriers. Accuracy, organization, and strong English communication skills are essential.



Key Responsibilities:
