Log into various insurance carrier portals to retrieve commission statements

Upload commission statements into Comtrack

Cross-reference and validate commission data with AgencyBloc

Upload and maintain accurate records in AgencyBloc when needed

Identify discrepancies and ensure data consistency across platforms

Contact insurance carriers to resolve commission-related questions or issues

Maintain organized documentation and follow reporting workflows



Requirements:



Strong proficiency in Google Sheets (formulas, organization, data accuracy)

Experience working with financial data, reporting, or commissions

Excellent attention to detail and ability to catch errors

Strong written and spoken English (comfortable making phone calls to carriers)

Ability to follow structured processes and meet deadlines

Reliable and responsive communication



Nice to Have:



Experience with Comtrack and/or AgencyBloc

Familiarity with insurance industry workflows or commission structures

Experience with CRM systems (such as GoHighLevel)

Basic understanding of bookkeeping or financial reconciliation



Work Details:



Remote (Virtual)

Ongoing work with potential for growth and increased responsibility

title: Property & Casualty Personal Lines Virtual Assistant
description:
*PLEASE DO NOT APPLY FOR THIS POSITION IF YOU DON'T NOT MEET THE EXPERIENCE REQUIREMENTS - we are looking for a personal lines VA JEDI!



Overview:

Seeking an experienced Personal Lines Virtual Assistant to support a fast-paced insurance agency. This role requires strong technical proficiency, carrier familiarity, and the ability to manage day-to-day servicing tasks efficiently with minimal supervision.



-The ability to comprehend teachings and instructions with the ability to implement those learnings over time and to do them independently is huge

-Thinking independently is vital for this role. (for example if we sell a policy and you are told to attach the policy to the AMS system 5x, you should then know to always do it without being told)



Mandatory Requirements (Non-Negotiable):

-Minimum 3 years of hands-on experience with HawkSoft OR SIMILAR AMS

-Minimum 5 years of Personal Lines insurance experience

If you do not meet both of these requirements, do not apply.



Preferred Carrier Experience:

-Safeco

-Travelers

-PURE

-Chubb

-Nationwide

-Progressive

-Acuity

-GEICO



Core Responsibilities:

-Data entry

-ability to obtain underwriting information on homes independently via online information.

-Policy servicing (endorsements, changes, cancellations, reinstatements)

-Quoting and remarketing personal lines policies

-Handling client service requests via
 and phone

-Processing renewals and reviewing policies for accuracy

-Managing certificates, ID cards, and documentation

-Following up on underwriting requirements

-Maintaining accurate client records in HawkSoft

-Assisting with billing inquiries and carrier communications

-Supporting producers with new business and cross-selling opportunities

-assistance with claims handling



Systems & Tools:

-HawkSoft (preferred) but am open to experience with other AMS systems

-Experience with Personal Lines rating tools, specifically PL Rater, is strongly preferred

-Familiarity with the Microsoft 365 platform is required

-AI familiarity



Additional Qualifications:

-Strong attention to detail and organizational skills

-Ability to work independently and meet deadlines

-Clear and professional written and verbal communication

-Familiarity with multiple carrier portals



Application Requirement:

Please clearly outline your experience with:

-HawkSoft (years and level of use)

-Personal Lines insurance (years and scope)

-Any of the listed carriers

-PL Rater or other rating tools

-VA/Resume



Applications that do not meet the required experience thresholds will not be considered.

title: eCommerce Operations Officer
description:
eCommerce Operations Officer



We’re looking for a detail-oriented and highly organized eCommerce Operations Officer to manage day-to-day operations across our online sales channels. This role is critical in ensuring smooth order processing, accurate product listings, and an excellent end-to-end customer experience.

Track and resolve operational issues such as order discrepancies, delays, or system errors

Coordinate with customer service, marketing, and supply chain teams

Analyze operational performance and suggest process improvements

Generate reports on sales, inventory, and fulfillment metrics



Requirements:



Proven experience in eCommerce operations, admin, or similar role

Familiarity with platforms like Shopify and Amazon

Strong organizational and multitasking skills

High attention to detail and accuracy

Ability to work in a fast-paced, deadline-driven environment

Strong communication and coordination skills



What We Offer:



Key role in a growing eCommerce business

Hands-on experience across multiple functions

Collaborative and fast-paced work environment

Competitive salary and growth opportunities

title: eCommerce Virtual Assistant
description:
We are expanding our remote team and looking for a reliable, disciplined, and ambitious eCommerce Virtual Assistant who wants long-term growth.



Our agency manages multiple eCommerce brands for international clients. This role is for someone who takes work seriously, learns fast, and wants to build a real career in digital work, not just a short-term VA job.



If you are organized, proactive, and can work independently, this is a strong opportunity.



About the Role



Start Date

Immediate



Schedule

Graveyard shift Philippine time

Monday to Friday

Weekends off



Responsibilities



You will support daily operations across multiple eCommerce brands. Tasks include:



• Managing and updating Shopify, WooCommerce, and Amazon stores

• Writing, editing, and optimizing product listings

• Conducting product, competitor, and market research

• Handling basic customer service and order processing

• Completing website updates and admin tasks

• Assisting with marketing and content-related tasks

• Creating simple graphics and visuals using Canva

• Helping with basic website layout and design improvements

• Using ChatGPT and AI tools to improve speed and accuracy

• Following systems, checklists, and instructions precisely



As you improve, you will manage client accounts more independently and take on higher-value tasks.



Requirements



• Fast learner with strong problem-solving skills

• Organized, detail-oriented, and accountable

• Able to follow instructions and meet deadlines

• Strong communication and reliability

• Proactive mindset and good work ethic

• Own laptop or desktop

• Stable, high-speed internet connection

• Fully available during assigned working hours



Preferred but Not Required



• Experience with Shopify

• Basic graphic design skills or Canva experience

• Understanding of layout, spacing, and clean design

• Familiarity with ChatGPT or other AI tools

• Basic video editing skills using CapCut

• Previous VA, or admin



We prioritize attitude, discipline, and consistency over years of experience.



Compensation and Growth



• Monthly Range: 25,000 to 30,000

• Performance Bonus: 5,000 to 8,000 per month

• Clear path for raises, promotions, and leadership roles

• Long-term stability for consistent top performers



Why Join Us



• Stable long-term work with a structured eCommerce agency

• Clear systems, feedback, and guidance

• Learn Shopify, Amazon, and TikTok Shop operations

• Work with automation and AI tools daily

• Real opportunity to grow into senior or leadership roles



Application Instructions



Please submit the following:



1. Resume

2. Internet speed test result

3. Laptop or PC specifications (model, processor, RAM, storage)

4. Short cover letter explaining who you are, what you’ve done, and why you are a strong fit



NOTE:

This is a long-term position with strong potential for career growth. We are looking for someone fully committed to the role. You must not have other jobs or commitments that may interfere with your schedule, focus, or performance.

title: Operations Manager for eCommerce Agency
description:
We are a growing eCommerce agency working with multiple international clients, and we are looking for a sharp, highly organized, and high-energy Operations Manager who can also handle project management at a strong level.



This is a very important role inside the business.



You will be the person responsible for helping keep the agency organized, making sure tasks are clearly delegated, deadlines are met, communication is strong, and team output is high quality. This is not a passive role and not a basic admin role. We need someone who can think fast, move fast, lead properly, and keep the team aligned.



This role is best for someone who has real experience in operations, team management, project management, eCommerce, and client communication.



What You’ll Be Responsible For

Operations and Team Management



-Manage the day-to-day operations of the agency

-Oversee remote tea
mbers and make sure everyone is aligned and productive

-Delegate tasks clearly and properly based on priority and skill level

-Follow up with tea
mbers to make sure tasks are moving and deadlines are being met

-Spot bottlenecks, delays, and weak performance early and address them fast

-Help improve accountability, structure, and overall team discipline



Project Management



-Take client requests, meeting notes, Loom videos, and feedback and turn them into clear, actionable tasks

-Assign tasks inside ClickUp or other project management tools with proper context, deadlines, and priorities

-Make sure tasks are not just posted, but actually understood by the team

-Keep projects moving forward without needing constant follow-up from the owner

-Ensure urgent tasks are handled on time and important items do not get delayed



Quality Control and Delivery



-Review work before it goes back to the client

-Make sure deliverables are accurate, polished, and aligned with what the client asked for

-Catch mistakes, weak output, or missing details before submission

-Maintain strong internal quality control across all active client projects



Client Communication



-Help manage client communication in a professional, clear, and confident way

-Send updates, follow-ups, and replies on time

-Make sure clients feel taken care of, updated, and supported

-Understand the client’s priorities and communicate them clearly to the team



Systems and Process Improvement



-Improve internal workflows and agency systems

-Help build better SOPs, structure, and processes

-Suggest ways to make the business more efficient

-Identify areas where automation or better systems can save time and improve delivery



What We’re Looking For



-Proven experience as an Operations Manager, Project Manager, or similar leadership role

-Strong experience in eCommerce, websites, and digital marketing environments

-Excellent written and verbal English communication

-Strong leadership and delegation skills

-Very organized, detail-oriented, and proactive

-Able to work with urgency and manage multiple moving parts

-Strong problem-solving ability

-Comfortable managing remote teams

-Comfortable using tools like ClickUp, Slack, Google Workspace, Loom, and similar platforms

-Able to take ownership and reduce the owner’s workload, not add to it



Big Plus If You Have Experience With



-Shopify

-WordPress

-Klaviyo

-Customer support workflows

-Order processing

-Inventory updates

-Canva or basic design coordination

-CRM and automation tools

-Agency operations

-Managing multiple client accounts at once



Important for This Role



This is a full-time, high-focus role inside a small but growing agency.



Because this position is crucial to daily operations, we are looking for someone who can give this role their full attention and energy. You must not have other jobs or active side commitments that will affect your focus, availability, or performance here.



We need someone fully committed, dependable, responsive, and ready to take real ownership.



Who This Role Is For



This role is for someone who:



-likes structure

-can lead people properly

-knows how to manage pressure

-can keep projects organized

-communicates clearly

-has strong urgency

-takes pride in keeping the business running smoothly



This is not for someone who only wants to post tasks, wait for instructions, or do the bare minimum.



Position Details



-Full-time

-Long-term

-Remote

-High ownership role

-Growth opportunity for the right person



How to Apply



To show that you actually read this job post, include the word juice in your cover letter.



Please send:



-Your resume

-A short cover letter explaining your relevant experience

-Why you are a strong fit for this role

-The tools and platforms you have worked with

-Your previous experience managing teams, projects, or agency operations

-If you have strong operations and project management experience in an eCommerce or digital agency setting, we’d love to hear from you.

title: Inside Sales Associate
description:
(Lead Qualification & Pipeline Management)



We’re looking for a results-driven Inside Sales Associate who can manage the full sales cycle—from qualifying inbound and outbound leads to closing deals. This role is ideal for someone who is proactive, organized, and comfortable owning the sales pipeline end-to-end.

title: eBay Product Listing Specialist
description:
We are hiring an experienced eBay Product Listing Specialist to help build and grow an eBay dropshipping store. This role is centered on product research using ZIK Analytics, sourcing from dropshipping suppliers like AppScenic, and creating high-quality eBay listings that go live only after approval. The ideal candidate is sharp, detail-oriented, and committed to quality over volume.



Key Responsibilities:

- Research and validate products using ZIK Analytics to identify strong eBay opportunities

- Source products from dropshipping suppliers such as AppScenic and other FBM platforms

- Build optimized eBay listings with strong titles, descriptions, images, and item specifics

- Score and present each product for approval before publishing using a structured workflow

- Cross-check products through ZIK data, supplier performance, and competitor research

- Maintain and update existing listings to keep them accurate and competitive

- Track supplier inventory, pricing, and stock changes to prevent listing issues

- Apply a sniper approach to listings - quality first, volume second

- Work closely with the owner on strategy and ongoing optimization

- Review listing performance and suggest data-driven improvements



Mandatory Skills:

- Proven hands-on experience managing eBay listings and the eBay Seller Hub

- Working knowledge of ZIK Analytics for product validation

- Strong understanding of the dropshipping / FBM model on eBay

- Experience with AppScenic or similar dropshipping platforms

- Solid grasp of eBay SEO including titles, descriptions, and category selection

- Comfortable preparing and presenting product research for approval

- Reliable, detail-oriented, and able to work independently

- Clear and consistent communication skills



Preferred Skills:

- Familiarity with the UK eBay marketplace and UK suppliers (Cost-wise, Value 2 You)

- Experience with eBay promoted listings and campaign setup

- Understanding of eBay analytics and performance metrics

- Skill in identifying trending and high-margin dropshipping products

- Track record of helping grow eBay stores from a low base

- Ability to juggle multiple sourcing lanes and workflows



Why Join Us:

This is a strong opportunity to help launch and scale an eBay store with a solid foundation already in place. You will work directly with a hands-on business owner who values quality and clear thinking. If you love product research and listing strategy, this role gives you space to make a real impact.

title: Viral Social Media Content Creator and Editor
description:
We're looking for a creative, trend-obsessed content creator and video editor who knows how to stop the scroll. If you eat, sleep, and breathe short-form content — and you actually know why some videos blow up and others don't — keep reading.



What you'll do

Concept, script, film (or source), and edit short-form videos for Instagram Reels, TikTok, and YouTube Shorts

Monitor trends daily and move fast — apply trending sounds, hooks, and formats before they peak

Write compelling captions and hooks that drive clicks, saves, and shares

Edit raw footage into clean, branded, high-retention videos (captions, transitions, text overlays, music sync)

Maintain consistent brand voice and aesthetic across all content

Deliver content on schedule with minimal revisions — clear communication when timelines shift



What we're looking for

Proven track record — you have videos that have hit 10K+ views (at minimum). Show us the receipts.

Proficient in CapCut, Adobe Premiere, DaVinci Resolve, or similar editing tools

Deep understanding of short-form content psychology — hooks, retention, pattern interrupts

Strong grasp of platform-specific best practices (TikTok vs. Reels vs. Shorts are not the same)

Self-starter — you don't need to be micromanaged to produce great work

Bonus: experience in the creator economy, personal branding, or business/tech niches



Please send work and resume when you apply.

We leverage the power of Amazon to reach our target market and are committed to excellence in online retail. title: Ecommerce Graphic Designer – Toy Lifestyle Compositing Specialist (Photoshop Expert)
description:
Location: Remote (Full-Time)



Flybar is looking for a detail-obsessed Graphic Designer who specializes in toy packaging design and instruction manuals.

Your job is to make our products stand out on the shelf and be incredibly easy to understand once opened. You combine strong design fundamentals with Photoshop expertise and smart use of AI tools to create visuals that are both attractive and functional.



You understand that great packaging sells the product, and great instructions prevent returns.



Key Responsibilities

- Design toy packaging boxes that are visually engaging, brand-aligned, and retail-ready.

- Create clear, easy-to-follow instruction manuals using strong layout, icons, and visual hierarchy.

- Use Adobe Photoshop to enhance product images and create compelling packaging visuals.

- Generate and refine images using AI tools (Weavy, NanoBanana, etc), while ensuring accuracy and consistency with the actual product.

- Develop packaging layouts based on dielines and prepare files for print production.

- Ensure all designs appeal to both kids (fun, exciting) and parents (clear, trustworthy, safe-looking).

- Revise designs based on feedback and production requirements.

- Maintain organized files and ensure all outputs meet print and digital specifications.



Required Skills & Experience

- Strong experience in packaging design, preferably for toys or consumer products.

- Advanced skills in Adobe Photoshop (image editing, compositing, layout support).

- Experience designing instruction manuals or user guides with clear visual communication.

- Familiarity with AI image generation tools and ability to refine outputs professionally.

- Understanding of print production, dielines, bleed, color profiles, and packaging constraints.

- Strong layout and typography skills.

- Ability to simplify complex instructions into clean, visual steps.

- High attention to detail and consistency.



Bonus Skills

- Experience working with toy brands or children-focused products.

- Basic illustration skills (icons, diagrams, characters).

- Experience with Adobe Illustrator or InDesign.

- Knowledge of Amazon packaging requirements or retail compliance.

- 3D mockups or packaging visualization experience.



How to Apply:

Please send your resume and portfolio, along with sample work relevant to packaging and toys.

title: AI-Driven TikTok Creator for Emotional Gifting Brand
description:
Hi! I'm hiring an AI-driven short-form video creator for **Hug Letters** (
) — a subscription service that turns family photos and stories into a monthly printed newspaper, mostly given as a gift to grandparents. Emotional, sentimental, gift-niche.



This is **not** a button-pushing editor role. You will own the entire creative process end-to-end: hook ideation ? AI generation ? editing ? captions ? hashtag/sound strategy. I will give you the brand, the angle, and feedback. You bring the executions.



---



**What you'll do**

- Produce 1 TikToks per day for our brand account

- Drive the creative: hooks, scripts, visual concepts — not wait for me to feed you ideas

- Use AI tools as your main production engine (HeyGen, Veo 3, Sora, ElevenLabs, Runway, Kling, Midjourney, CapCut AI — whatever you're best at)

- Edit in CapCut with native TikTok pacing, captions, trending audio

- Track what works and double down on winning formats



**Required — do not apply without these**

1. **Portfolio with real view counts.** Send links to videos you personally created/edited that hit 100K+ views. Screenshots of analytics preferred. "I worked on this account" is not enough — I need videos *you* made.

2. **AI workflow.** Tell me which AI tools you use and why. Show me 1–2 videos where AI was central to production.

3. **CapCut mastery.** Non-negotiable.

4. **Strong English** for caption writing — our audience is US-based.

5. **Reliable internet + machine** that handles 4K without crashing.



**Bonus points**

- Experience with emotional/gifting/UGC niches (Storyworth, personalized gifts, reaction content)

- You can also write hooks/scripts, not just edit

- You watch TikTok for fun and can name 3 viral formats from this week



**Compensation**

- $400–$600/month , depending on your portfolio

- Performance bonuses on videos that cross 500K and 1M views

- Long-term role — I want to grow this with one person, not rotate freelancers



**How to apply (read carefully)**

Reply with:

1. Three links to your best-performing videos with view counts

2. Your AI tool stack and a 2-sentence answer: *"If you were making a TikTok for a brand that helps grandkids surprise grandparents with a printed family newspaper, what's your opening hook?"*

3. Your monthly rate for 30 videos

4. The word **grandma** somewhere in your reply so I know you read this



Applications without view-count receipts will be ignored. I'd rather hire one person with proven hits than ten generic editors.



Thanks — looking forward to seeing your work.

Martin

title: Bookkeeper / Accountant
description:
We are looking for a part-time (30 hours/week) Bookkeeper / Accountant to take ownership of day-to-day financial operations, ensure accuracy across systems, and maintain clean, reliable financial records.



This role requires hands-on experience with:

* QuickBooks

* ServiceTitan



Key Responsibilities:

1. Daily Responsibilities

* Perform accurate data entry of all financial transactions

* Categorize expenses and income correctly in QuickBooks

* Maintain up-to-date and organized financial records

* Monitor incoming payments and expenses



2.Weekly Responsibilities

* Reconcile transactions and review for discrepancies

* Ensure alignment between ServiceTitan and QuickBooks

* Track accounts payable and accounts receivable

* Flag any inconsistencies or issues proactively



3. Monthly Responsibilities

* Perform full bank and credit card reconciliations

* Prepare end-of-month financials (P&L, cash flow, etc.)

* Ensure all transactions are properly recorded and categorized

* Support financial reporting for leadership



4. ServiceTitan Financial Coordination

* Review job costing and revenue tracking

* Ensure invoices and payments are properly reflected

* Identify and resolve discrepancies between systems



5. Operational & Financial Support

* Maintain clean, audit-ready books at all times

* Organize and maintain financial documentation

* Support leadership with accurate financial insights



Core Requirements (Non-Negotiables): 

* Proven experience with QuickBooks

* Proven experience with ServiceTitan

* Strong bookkeeping and accounting fundamentals

* High attention to detail and accuracy

* Reliable, organized, and consistent





Preferred Experience: 

* Experience with plumbing, HVAC, or field service businesses

* Familiarity with job costing and service-based revenue models

* Experience independently managing books



Ideal Candidate Profile:

* Extremely detail-oriented and numbers-driven

* Proactive in identifying discrepancies and solving issues

* Strong sense of ownership and accountability

* Clear communicator and dependable



Position Details:

* Full-time: ~30 hours per week (with potential to grow over time)

* Remote

* Long-term opportunity



Success in This Role Looks Like: 

* Fully reconciled, accurate books at all times

* Timely and reliable monthly financial reporting

* Seamless alignment between ServiceTitan and QuickBooks

* No backlog in data entry, categorization, or reconciliation

title: Senior Executive Assistant
description:
The Company is a family owned, operated and Texas-based automotive services company. This role will report to the CEO/Owner.



Position Overview



We are seeking a Senior Executive Assistant to serve as a trusted operational partner to the CEO and executive team. The CEO is a fast-moving, visionary leader with an entrepreneurial mindset. This role is fundamentally about executive support at a high level: anticipating needs, removing friction, and ensuring the leadership team can focus on what matters most. A meaningful part of that support involves financial oversight, but the core function is enabling excellent decision-making and execution across the organization.

The ideal candidate is someone who finds deep satisfaction in mastering a system thoroughly, produces highly accurate work, and takes personal ownership of their area of responsibility. You are methodical by nature, self-directed, and comfortable working independently with minimal oversight. You thrive when you can develop genuine expertise in a domain and build processes that hold up over time.





Key Responsibilities

Executive & Leadership Support: Proactively manage the CEO’s schedule, ensuring full preparation for meetings, travel, and key decisions. Prepare briefings, summaries, and reports that give the CEO and executive team the clarity they need to act. Serve as a trusted communication bridge between the CEO and internal or external stakeholders. Maintain a well-organized, accessible system for documents, records, and institutional knowledge. Support HR-related functions as needed, including benefits and administrative coordination.



Executive Team Accountability. Track initiatives, deadlines, and deliverables across the full executive team, including VP-level leaders in distribution, marketing, operations, and finance. Own the meeting notes and action items from executive team sessions, translating discussions into clear ownership, timelines, and accountability. Follow up with leadership stakeholders to ensure commitments are met and escalate blockers to the CEO proactively. Maintain a running view of all active initiatives across the organization so the CEO always knows where things stand.



Financial Reporting & Analysis. Track cash flow, budgets, and financial forecasts to keep leadership informed on the health of the business. Prepare financial summaries and operational analyses in support of executive decision-making. Work closely with the accounting team to ensure data integrity and consistency across locations. Identify trends or anomalies in financial data and surface them proactively to leadership.



Project & Deliverable Tracking. Own a portfolio of operational projects from initiation through completion. Track deadlines, deliverables, and KPIs across teams to ensure alignment. Analyze business metrics and surface insights that inform strategy. Document processes, procedures, and outcomes to build institutional knowledge.



Data, Reporting, and Visualization. Build and maintain dashboards, trackers, and visual reports that allow the CEO to quickly absorb business performance across locations. Translate complex data into clean, visually clear formats that inform fast decision-making. Support marketing-related reporting and analytics as needed, given the CEO’s strong focus on marketing as a growth driver. Leverage Excel, financial modeling tools, and business intelligence platforms for ongoing reporting and analysis. Identify and implement software and AI tools that improve workflow efficiency and data accuracy.



Travel & Event Logistics. Manage complex travel arrangements with thorough attention to detail. Coordinate logistics for board meetings, executive events, and investor presentations.





Key Performance Objectives



First 2 Months:

Develop a thorough understanding of company operations, executive priorities, and key stakeholder relationships.

Build trust with the CEO and leadership team through consistent, reliable communication and follow-through.

Identify gaps or inefficiencies in current processes, documentation, or reporting and propose improvements.



First 4 Months:

Become the go-to operational resource for the CEO, managing priorities and projects with minimal direction.

Take ownership of financial reporting support for leadership reviews.



First 6 Months:

Serve as a fully embedded strategic and operational partner to the CEO and executive team.

Have established reliable systems and workflows that the business depends on.







Who Excels in this Role

This role suits someone who:

Takes genuine pride in the accuracy and quality of their work

Works well independently and does not require frequent check-ins or direction

Approaches data analytically, drawing their own conclusions before presenting findings

Values structure and consistency, and builds systems that hold up over time

Is comfortable operating alongside a fast-moving, entrepreneurial leader and can stay grounded and organized when priorities shift

Is confident holding senior stakeholders accountable to timelines and commitments, professionally and without friction

Handles sensitive financial and strategic information with absolute discretion

Communicates clearly, proactively, and concisely in writing and in person





Qualifications



Required

Bachelor’s degree in Business, Accounting, Finance, or related field.

Minimum 6 years of professional working experience.

Proven experience supporting C-suite or upper-level executives, especially Entrepreneur-led organizations.

U.S. Company experience with mid-sized or large multi-location companies.

Exceptional communication and interpersonal skills.

Highly organized, proactive, and able to manage multiple priorities with discretion

Advanced proficiency in Microsoft Excel and Word.

Comfortable working independently in a fast-paced, evolving environment, with the ability to handle ambiguity with professionalism and grace.

Strong business judgment, project management and problem-solving skills.



Preferred

Background in automotive services, retail services or real estate accounting.

Public accounting experience or exposure to executive-level reporting.

Prior experience managing sensitive or confidential projects at an executive level.





Work Environment

Full-time, remote, independent contractor status

Align to the organization’s Central time zone hours (8 AM - 5 PM CST), Monday through Friday

Candidate must agree to hold this role exclusively, with no other projects or clients, and that no sub-contracting of work will occur.

Candidate must own a personal laptop and at least one additional monitor that will be your exclusive work laptop (not used or shared by others).

Have a backup device in case of a laptop or equipment failure.

A backup internet connection (such as a secondary ISP or mobile hotspot) and power supply must be available in case of an outage to ensure work continuity.





Compensation & Benefits

Competitive independent contractor pay commensurate with experience

Vacation Pay

US Holiday pay



To Apply

Please submit a link to your resume, cover letter, and three professional references.

Please use "Senior Executive Assistant - [Your Name]" in the subject line of your application.

We encourage early applications as interviews will be conducted on a rolling basis.

title: Senior Corporate Video Editor
description:

REKT Productions is looking for a Senior Video Editor to help produce high-quality content across gaming, esports, commercial, corporate, podcast, livestream, and brand projects. This role is for an editor with strong storytelling instincts, excellent technical ability, and the creative maturity to take a brief, shape a narrative, and deliver polished content with minimal hand-holding, on time.

title: Urgent: Looking for Sr. Business Analyst for US-based company!
description:
Summary

Important Notice to Applicants:



Please note that we are only contacting and communicating with candidates through Onlinejobs PH or our dedicated company HR
 address. Any applications or direct contact made outside of these channels, including
s, social media messages, direct messages to our CEO, or messages sent to our general company
, will not be considered and will be automatically declined.



About the Company:



We are a private U.S.-based company operating across multiple departments that support legal, staffing, and client-service operations. Our teams collaborate in dynamic, fast-paced environments focused on innovation, integrity, and client success.



In this role, you’ll work closely with leadership and cross-functional teams, making a real impact in operational, legal, and client-focused projects—all from the comfort of your home. Details about our company structure and associated teams will be introduced during the interview process





Position Summary

We are seeking a Senior Business Analyst to lead requirements gathering, process analysis, and stakeholder management across our Salesforce and Litify platform. The role serves as the primary liaison between business stakeholders - internal teams and law firm clients, and our technical team, ensuring that engineering effort is directed toward well-defined, high-impact work.

This is an AI-forward role. The successful candidate will integrate AI tools such as Claude into daily workflows, artifacts, agents, or automations that improve team efficiency. We are seeking a collaborative, curious professional who actively explores emerging technologies and contributes new ideas to the team.



Key Responsibilities:



Discovery and Requirements

Conduct stakeholder interviews with internal teams and law firm clients to elicit business requirements

Produce clear, comprehensive requirements documentation that supports technical design and implementation

Validate proposed work against existing solutions and prioritize requests based on business value

User Stories and Backlog Management

Author user stories in Jira, including background, objectives, scope, acceptance criteria, and open questions

Coordinate with the technical team to ensure clean handoff between business requirements and technical design

Maintain and groom the product backlog, ensuring priorities reflect current business needs

User Acceptance Testing and Release

Develop UAT tests and coordinate testing across business stakeholders

Triage defects and feedback before escalation to engineering

Author release notes and deliver end-user training and documentation

Manage stakeholder communication throughout the development lifecycle



AI and Process Automation:



Leverage AI tools (Claude, ChatGPT, or equivalent) to support requirements drafting, transcript analysis, test case generation, and data analysis

Stay current on emerging AI capabilities and recommend applications to internal stakeholders



Technology Environment:



CRM and Matter Management: Salesforce, Litify

Marketing and Communications: HubSpot

Integration and Middleware: Zapier, 
, Direct APIs

Project Management: Jira

AI Platforms: Claude (including Projects, Skills, and Agents) and other emerging tools



Required Qualifications:



5-8 years of experience as a Business Analyst, preferably in CRM, SaaS, or legal technology environments

Demonstrated hands-on experience with Salesforce; Litify or comparable legal CRM platform strongly preferred

Working knowledge of integration and middleware tools such as Zapier or 
 or similar

Daily, practical experience using AI tools such as Claude or ChatGPT in a professional context

Demonstrated experience building with AI, examples include prompt libraries, Claude Projects, custom agents, or LLM-powered automations

Excellent written communication skills, with the ability to produce clear and authoritative documentation

Availability during US Eastern Time business hours



Preferred Qualifications

Direct experience with legal technology platforms (Litify, Filevine, MyCase, or similar) or law firm operations

Experience managing structured Jira workflows at scale, including epics, stories, and acceptance criteria

Working understanding of REST APIs, webhooks, and common integration patterns

Background in process improvement, operations research, or change management

Familiarity with agentic AI concepts including MCP servers, tool use, and agent frameworks



What We Look For:



Proactive engagement with emerging technologies, particularly in AI and automation

Strong analytical mindset with the ability to challenge assumptions and prioritize effectively

Collaborative working style and comfort working transparently with cross-functional teams

Service orientation focused on enabling team performance

Comfort operating with ambiguity and making well-reasoned, clearly documented decisions.



Application Instructions:



Qualified candidates should submit the following:

A representative work sample, such as a requirements document, user story, or process map (redacted as appropriate)

A brief example demonstrating professional use of AI tools, such as a prompt, Claude Project, agent, or automation

A short statement (under 150 words) describing the first workflow you would seek to improve or automate upon joining

title: Financial Planner (Wealth & Strategic Planning)
description:
Role Overview



We are seeking a highly analytical and client-focused Financial Planner to deliver comprehensive, strategic financial planning services across retirement planning, capital allocation, family office structuring, and tax optimization.



This role goes beyond basic financial advising — the ideal candidate will integrate long-term wealth strategy, risk management, and tax-efficient planning to support individuals, families, and high-net-worth clients in achieving sustainable financial outcomes.



Key Responsibilities

1. Comprehensive Financial Planning

Develop holistic financial plans aligned with client goals, life stages, and risk tolerance

Analyze income, expenses, assets, liabilities, and long-term financial objectives

Provide scenario modeling and forward-looking financial projections

2. Retirement Planning

Design and manage retirement strategies, including income sustainability and withdrawal planning

Evaluate pension structures, retirement accounts, and investment vehicles

Ensure alignment with longevity planning and inflation considerations

3. Capital & Investment Planning

Advise on capital allocation strategies across asset classes

Support portfolio structuring in collaboration with investment teams

Assess investment performance and recommend adjustments based on market conditions and client goals

4. Family Office & Wealth Structuring

Support high-net-worth clients with multi-generational wealth planning

Assist in structuring trusts, estates, and governance frameworks

Coordinate with legal, tax, and investment professionals to ensure integrated solutions

5. Tax Planning & Optimization

Provide tax-efficient financial strategies and planning recommendations

Collaborate with tax advisors to align financial plans with current tax regulations

Identify opportunities for tax deferral, minimization, and compliance

6. Risk Management & Protection Planning

Evaluate insurance needs (life, health, disability, asset protection)

Identify financial risks and recommend mitigation strategies

Ensure contingency planning is in place for unforeseen events

7. Client Relationship Management

Build and maintain strong, trust-based client relationships

Translate complex financial concepts into clear, actionable insights

Conduct regular client reviews and adjust plans as needed

8. Financial Analysis & Reporting

Prepare detailed financial reports, dashboards, and recommendations

Track progress against financial goals and KPIs

Use data-driven insights to support decision-making



Qualifications & Experience

Bachelor’s degree in Finance, Economics, Accounting, or related field

Professional certifications preferred (e.g., CFP, CFA, CPA or equivalent)

5+ years of experience in financial planning, wealth management, or family office environments

Strong knowledge of retirement planning, investment strategies, and tax frameworks

Experience working with high-net-worth individuals or complex financial portfolios is highly desirable



Core Competencies

Analytical Thinking: Ability to interpret complex financial data and develop strategic recommendations

Strategic Planning: Long-term, forward-looking financial modeling and decision-making

Attention to Detail: High accuracy in financial analysis and reporting

Communication: Clear, concise, and client-friendly communication style

Relationship Management: Strong interpersonal and stakeholder management skills

Ethical Judgment: High integrity and adherence to regulatory and compliance standards



Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)

Quality and accuracy of financial plans

Client satisfaction and retention rates

Effectiveness of tax optimization strategies

Achievement of client financial goals and milestones

Timeliness and clarity of reporting and recommendations



What Success Looks Like in This Role

Clients receive proactive, well-structured financial strategies — not reactive advice

Financial plans are integrated across tax, investment, and estate considerations

Complex financial concepts are simplified into actionable steps

Strong collaboration exists between financial, legal, and tax stakeholders

Measurable improvement in client financial outcomes and long-term wealth preservation

title: Senior Social Media Video Editor
description:
THIS ROLE IS AN IMMEDIATE START



SENIOR ROLE - ONLY SERIOUS INQUIRIES WILL BE CONSIDERED



REKT Productions is looking for a Senior Social Media Video Editor to help create high-quality social content across gaming, esports, podcasts, livestreams, events, branded content, and commercial projects.



This role is for someone who understands how to turn footage into engaging, platform-ready content. You should be confident editing short-form videos from scratch, repurposing long-form content, improving existing edits, and making creative decisions around hooks, pacing, captions, music, sound design, and visual style.



You’ll work with REKT’s creative team and project managers to produce social-first content for both internal channels and client campaigns. REKT is actively expanding beyond gaming into commercial, corporate, brand, agency, podcast, hybrid event, and livestream work, so this role needs someone who can adapt content for different audiences and platforms.



Responsibilities

- Edit high-quality short-form videos for TikTok, Instagram Reels, YouTube Shorts, LinkedIn, X,
, and other social platforms.

- Repurpose podcasts, livestreams, interviews, event footage, long-form edits, and client content into strong social media clips.

- Identify the best hooks, 
nts, soundbites, emotional beats, jokes, highlights, and story points from longer content.

- Create captions, text callouts, basic motion graphics, punch-ins, reframes, transitions, and platform-native edits.

- Reformat content into 9:16, 1:1, 4:5, and 16:9 depending on the platform and brief.

- Improve existing edits by tightening pacing, restructuring clips, adding stronger openings, or making them more social-friendly.

- Maintain consistent visual quality across REKT’s internal content and client-facing deliverables.

- Work from briefs, creative direction, brand guidelines, and feedback from the creative team or project manager.

- Help build repeatable editing templates and workflows for recurring content.

- Support content packages for campaigns, sponsorships, case studies, podcasts, live shows, esports shows, and social media deliverables. REKT already has partnership-style content needs across videos, shorts, photos, blogs, BTS, case studies, and social visibility, so this role should be comfortable creating reusable assets from larger productions.



What you need to apply:

- Proficient and expert capability in Adobe Premiere or Davinci Resolve // NO CAPCUT OR CANVA

- Availability to start ASAP

Circle of Greatness is seeking a highly strategic and performance-driven Copy Director to lead all copy across our
, SMS, funnel, and website marketing ecosystem.



This role is responsible for owning messaging across the entire customer journey — from first touchpoint to conversion. You will manage and mentor junior copywriters, collaborate directly with partners, and ensure every piece of communication aligns with both brand voice and revenue goals.



The ideal candidate is both creative and analytical — someone who understands how to craft compelling messaging and optimize it across funnels, campaigns, and web experiences.



Key Responsibilities

Copy Leadership & Strategy



Own and oversee all copy across
, SMS, funnels, and website pages

Define messaging frameworks, campaign angles, and conversion strategies

Guide and develop junior copywriters on tone, structure, and execution

Set clear standards for what “high-performing” copy looks like





Quality Control



Review, edit, and approve all outgoing copy across campaigns and web assets

Ensure consistency in brand voice across all platforms and partners

Maintain a high bar for clarity, persuasion, and conversion effectiveness





Performance & Optimization



Analyze performance across campaigns and funnels (open rates, CTR, conversions, revenue)

Identify winning messaging patterns and scale them

Continuously test, iterate, and optimize copy across
, SMS, and web pages

Use data to inform creative and strategic decisions





Client & Partner Management



Act as the primary copy lead for 4–5 key partners

Collaborate on campaign, funnel, and offer strategy

Ensure all deliverables align with partner goals and expectations





Campaign & Funnel Execution



Work closely with junior copywriters to produce high-quality campaigns and funnel assets

Oversee copy for landing pages, sales pages, and key website touchpoints

Support launches for promotions, events, and marketing initiatives

Ensure all copy is delivered accurately and on time





Requirements



Proven experience in copywriting and managing copy teams, preferably in digital marketing

Strong expertise in
, SMS, funnel, and website copywriting

Track record of writing or directing copy that drives measurable results (revenue, conversions)

Experience mentoring or managing junior tea
mbers

Ability to balance creative direction with data-driven decision-making

Strong communication and stakeholder management skills

High attention to detail and commitment to quality





Nice to Have



Experience working in fast-paced, high-growth or entrepreneurial environments

Experience managing multiple brands or partners simultaneously

Familiarity with tools like GoHighLevel, Klaviyo, Postscript, Attentive, or similar platforms

Understanding of direct response marketing and funnel strategy



What Success Looks Like



Campaigns and funnels consistently improve in open rates, CTR, conversions, and revenue

Website and funnel copy clearly communicates value and drives action

Messaging is consistent, compelling, and aligned across all channels

Junior copywriters are producing higher-quality, conversion-focused work

Copy becomes a core driver of revenue growth for Circle of Greatness





Apply

description:

title: Data entry, web designer, and marketing person
description:
A Data Entry Clerk updates, and inputs information into company computer systems, databases, and typically using data from paper documents or digital files. Key responsibilities include maintaining data integrity, ensuring high-speed/accuracy, and securing confidential information.



A web designer is responsible for the visual appearance, layout, usability, and overall "look and feel" of a website. They create wireframes, prototypes, and final designs, ensuring sites are responsive (work on mobile/desktop), user-friendly, and align with brand identity, often utilizing tools like Word Press or Adobe Creative and or Amazon Web Service.



Marketing staff member will execute promotional strategies, campaign development, and manage day-to-day marketing tasks to boost brand visibility and drive customer acquisition. Key responsibilities include managing social media, conducting market research, assisting with
 and phone calls, and also creating content, usually reporting all work on a spread sheet with notes.

title: Team Lead, Customer Onboarding
description:
Team Lead, Customer Onboarding



Important Notice: To be considered for this role, you must submit an introductory video via a Loom link (
) along with a personalized message explaining why you are a good fit for the role. Once you pass the first interview round, you will be given an assignment and a rigorous test to complete before advancing to the second interview. Please do not apply unless you meet the following experience and skill requirements without exception:



KEY REQUIREMENTS (Do not Apply if you don’t satisfy the following skills):

- High Pressure and Detail Orientation: This role demands the ability to work well under pressure, juggle multiple projects with near perfection, and navigate uncertainty and ambiguity. Creativity, critical thinking, and the ability to think abstractly about optimization are crucial. This is not a routine copy-and-paste job; it requires meticulous attention to detail.

- Communication Excellence: You must have proven written and verbal communication skills. You will be responsible for developing official communications for government websites and business owners, as well as designing tax return language.

- SaaS Implementation Experience: Previous experience with SaaS implementation at tech firms is mandatory.

- Management Experience: At least five years of management or equivalent experience is required.

- Project Management Certification: A project management certification or equivalent experience is necessary.



Overview:

As a Customer Onboarding Lead at Azavar, you will play a pivotal role in integrating customers into our diverse product offerings, including our municipal audit program and Localgov Tax & Licensing platform for businesses to maintain compliance with local governments. This role combines project management, technical acumen, critical & design thinking, consultation, and a customer-centric focus to ensure a seamless transition from onboarding to full utilization of our services.



Key Responsibilities:



Onboarding Optimization & Process Management:

- Customer Relationship Initiation: Facilitate the handoff from sales to onboarding, initiating the customer relationship.

- Onboarding Process Management: Manage the complete onboarding process for all Azavar products and services, ensuring a streamlined experience.

- Program Design and Optimization: Analyze customers’ current administrative assets and procedures. Optimize and design new programs, digital forms, documentation, communication collateral, and the overall program experience. This requires high-level attention to detail, creativity, multitasking, technical acumen, and abstract thinking. You will be responsible for creating an optimized program and experience in preparation for handoff to production and secure deployment for the Localgov platform.

- Project Coordination: Oversee and manage all aspects of onboarding projects, including timelines and task coordination, while maintaining constant communication with stakeholders.

- Account Setup and Data Intake: Ensure that account setup and data intake processes are completed accurately for all customers.



Technical Expertise and Training:

- Industry Knowledge: Gain proficiency in local government finance management, tax administration, and business licensing processes to optimize and digitize government programs and filing forms.

- Product Knowledge: Maintain a high level of technical understanding of our software products and audit processes to enhance process efficiency and customer experience.

Collaboration and Communication:

- Serve as the authority in optimizing customer programs during onboarding by gathering insights from key company stakeholders.

- Provide expert consultation to customers during the onboarding process, addressing all inquiries and presenting tailored solutions for unique issues.

- Translate customized program procedures into clear documentation for the internal team.

- Work collaboratively with the onboarding implementation specialist and other tea
mbers to ensure all tasks are completed effectively.

- Develop and refine communication collateral, tailoring it to meet customer needs and organizational standards.

Project Management and Quality Assurance:

- Bring professional project management experience, handling enterprise-level projects with a sharp eye for detail.

- Implement and oversee quality assurance measures, ensuring all onboarding processes meet the highest standards.

- Regularly review and enhance team-developed deliverables and communications before customer delivery.



Customer Success and Engagement:

- Prioritize customer satisfaction, transforming their experience into an efficient and streamlined process/program.

- Facilitate a smooth transition to production teams after onboarding completion.

- Manage the secure deployment of customer software portals.



Data Management and Reporting:

- Handle customer data and resources efficiently.

- Track and report key metrics such as customer onboardings, average onboarding time, and scheduling of welcome calls within contract start periods.



Professional Development and Skills:

- Develop and maintain conflict resolution and leadership skills to effectively lead teams.

- Demonstrate professional writing skills.



Qualifications:

- Proven experience in professional project management, particularly in managing enterprise-level projects.

- Exceptional detail orientation and critical thinking abilities.

- Strong interpersonal and communication skills.

- Proficiency in relevant software tools (HubSpot, Jira Work Management, Excel, Google Suite).

- Demonstrated ability in cross-functional technical understanding and process optimization.

- A commitment to maintaining high quality standards in every aspect of the onboarding process.

- Bachelor's degree.

- At least five years of experience in a team lead or managerial role with implementation and customer onboarding at a technology or SaaS company.



Additional Requirements:

- This role demands excellent writing skills, multitasking abilities, and abstract and critical thinking.

- Professional project management certification required.

- Candidates must exhibit attention to detail, a strong value for soft skills, creativity, communication, emotional intelligence, and teamwork.

- Must be ambitious, committed to excellence, and willing to accept responsibility and accountability.

- Ability to handle VERY fast-paced and high-pressure work environments, take feedback constructively, and remain respectful and assertive.

- Candidates will undergo testing for culture fit, attention to detail, project management, communication, and IQ or equivalent assessments.

- Shortlisted candidates will complete a rigorous assignment to demonstrate skills.

- This is a full-time, graveyard shift on Central Standard Time (Chicago) position with some flexibility, offering $15 USD/hr ($2,400/month), and two weeks of paid vacation + 1 week paid sick time to start. 



Application Instructions:

Interested candidates should submit their resume along with a cover letter outlining their suitability for the role. Automated messages will not be accepted. Only candidates who send an introductory video via Loom explaining why they are a good fit for this position and why they want to work at Azavar will be considered for an interview. If you are not a good fit for this position, please share this job posting with someone who might be.



To confirm you have read the entire job posting, add the word ORANGE to the subject line of your submission.

title: Urgent Hiring: Looking for a Senior Salesforce Developer
description:
Summary

Important Notice to Applicants:



Please note that we are only contacting and communicating with candidates through ONLINEJOBS PH or our dedicated company HR
 address. Any applications or direct contact made outside of these channels, including
s, social media messages, direct messages to our CEO, or messages sent to our general company
, will not be considered and will be automatically declined.



About the Company:



We are a private U.S.-based company operating across multiple departments that support legal, staffing, and client-service operations. Our teams collaborate in dynamic, fast-paced environments focused on innovation, integrity, and client success.



In this role, you’ll work closely with leadership and cross-functional teams, making a real impact in operational, legal, and client-focused projects—all from the comfort of your home. Details about our company structure and associated teams will be introduced during the interview process



Position Summary

Department: Technology

Employment Type: Full-time

Location: Remote

Working Hours: 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM Eastern Time



Position Overview



We are seeking a Senior Salesforce Developer to design, develop, and maintain custom solutions on the Salesforce platform. Reporting to the Tech Lead & Tech Director, the successful candidate will serve as the sole dedicated developer on the Salesforce team and will be responsible for the implementation, and ongoing support of platform customizations and integrations.



In addition to development responsibilities, the role provides administrative backup to the Salesforce Administrator, contributing to flow design, reporting, and user management as needed. The position requires a senior practitioner who applies modern AI-assisted development tools to enhance productivity while maintaining the engineering rigor expected of a senior developer. We are seeking for a collaborative, curious professional who actively explores emerging technologies and contributes new ideas to the team.



Key Responsibilities



Design, develop, test, and deploy Salesforce customizations using Apex, Lightning Web Components (LWC), and declarative tools.



Architect and implement integrations between Salesforce and external systems using REST and SOAP APIs, Named Credentials, and Platform Events.



Develop and maintain automated workflows, including triggers, batch processes, queueable jobs, and asynchronous patterns.



Apply AI-assisted development tools (e.g., Claude Code, Codex, MCP-based agentic workflows) to improve development velocity and code quality.



Provide administrative support to the Salesforce Administrator (approximately 25% of the role), including the configuration of flows, validation rules, reports, dashboards, permission sets, and user management.



Conduct code reviews and contribute to the team's engineering standards, including documentation, testing, and version control practices.



Monitor system performance and proactively address technical debt, governor limit issues, and integration failures.



Maintain comprehensive technical documentation for all developed solutions.



Collaborate with the Tech Lead, Tech Director, and stakeholders to translate business requirements into scalable technical solutions.



Required Qualifications



Experience: 5–8 years of professional Salesforce development experience.



Apex Development: Demonstrated proficiency in Apex, including classes, triggers, batch and queueable processing, asynchronous patterns, and governor limit management.



Lightning Web Components: Production experience designing and deploying LWCs.



Query Languages: Strong command of SOQL and SOSL, including query optimization.



Integrations: Hands-on experience implementing integrations using REST and SOAP APIs, Named Credentials, Platform Events, and webhooks, with appropriate error handling and retry strategies.



Certifications: Salesforce Platform Developer I certification required; Platform Developer II strongly preferred.



AI-Assisted Development: Demonstrated, hands-on experience with AI development tools, including Claude Code, Codex (or comparable OpenAI tooling), and MCP servers or agentic workflows.



Prompt Engineering: Working knowledge of prompt engineering principles, with the ability to evaluate and refine model outputs.



Engineering Discipline: A proven track record of writing tested, maintainable, production-grade code. The candidate must be capable of independently evaluating AI-generated code rather than deploying it without review.



Adaptability: A demonstrated history of proactively learning and adopting emerging technologies and development practices.



Preferred Qualifications



Experience with Litify or other vertical SaaS platforms.



Experience designing or contributing to MCP servers.



Proficiency with Salesforce DX, source-driven development, and CI/CD pipelines for Salesforce orgs.



Experience working in embedded or co-managed engagements with non-technical stakeholders.



Approach to AI-Assisted Development



We view AI development tools as a productivity multiplier for skilled engineers, not a substitute for engineering judgment. The successful candidate will use these tools to accelerate delivery while maintaining accountability for the quality, security, and correctness of all code that reaches production.



Candidates whose practice depends on accepting AI-generated output without independent review are not a fit for this position.



Performance Expectations (First Six Months)



Independently deliver a production feature from discovery through deployment.



Develop at least one reusable AI- or agent-driven workflow adopted by the broader team.



Assume end-to-end ownership of one to two integrations, including design, implementation, monitoring, and operational documentation.



Application Instructions



Interested candidates should link to a code portfolio or GitHub profile, and a brief written response describing a project they have completed using an AI coding assistant/agent - including the approach taken, the outcome, and any lessons learned.

title: Outbound Sales Specialist (Cold Calling – Appointment Setting)
description:
L’EVATE is hiring on behalf of a fast-growing Canadian financial services company.

We help businesses build high-performing remote teams and we’re looking for a strong outbound sales professional to support senior leadership by booking qualified meetings.



If you are not comfortable being on the phone every day starting conversations with strangers, this is not for you.



We’re hiring someone who can confidently call mortgage brokers and agents across Canada, build interest, and book meetings for senior leadership.



This is not a script-reading role.

This is about thinking, listening, and guiding conversations.



What you’ll be doing:

- Making 50+ outbound calls per day 

- Calling mortgage brokers, agents, and banking professionals across Canada 

- Building rapport quickly and sounding confident on the phone 

- Handling objections and keeping conversations moving 

- Booking 2–3 qualified meetings per day 

- Following up via
 and LinkedIn 

- Keeping CRM notes clean and up to date



What we’re looking for:

- Strong spoken English (clear, confident, easy to understand) 

- 3-5 years' experience in cold calling, sales, or appointment setting 

- Ability to handle rejection and stay consistent 

- Someone who can think on their feet (not just read scripts) 

- Strong work ethic and reliability



Nice to have:

- Mortgage or financial services experience 

- Experience booking meetings for executives 

- CRM or LinkedIn Sales Navigator experience



This role is for you if:

- You enjoy talking to new people every day

- You are competitive and results-driven

- You don’t lose energy after hearing “no”

- You take ownership of your numbers



IMPORTANT — READ THIS

We will ONLY review applicants who follow the instructions below.

Step 1: Include the word “Closer” at the top of your application  (This tells us you actually read the post)

Step 2: Submit a 2 minute video answering:

1.  Give a quick introduction of your background in outbound sales and cold calling

2. Role-play exactly how you open a cold call in the first 10 seconds.

3. Handle this objection:

 “I’m not interested — just send me something.”

title: Recruiter
description:
Our company is on a mission to redefine the way job seekers embark on their next career adventure. As a Reverse Recruiter, you will be at the heart of this transformation. This unique role is designed for someone who wants to make a significant impact on individuals' professional lives, by bridging the gap between talent and opportunity. You'll partner closely with job seekers, diving deep into their professional backgrounds, aspirations, and preferences to proactively identify and secure opportunities that resonate with their career goals. Your expertise will turn the traditional job search process on its head, creating a personalized, supportive journey for each candidate.





Key Responsibilities:

Foster strong relationships with job seekers, becoming their trusted advisor and advocate in the job market.

Leverage your understanding of the candidates’ skills and goals to identify and secure job opportunities that align with their aspirations.

Develop and maintain a dynamic pipeline of eligible job posts for your client.

Assess job postings to ensure they meet the clients criteria and potential for success.

Act as the primary point of contact for clients, offering guidance and answering questions throughout their job search journey.

Achieve daily targets relating to job postings and applications processed.



Qualifications:

A Bachelor's degree or higher is preferred, showcasing your commitment to learning and professional development.

Exceptional proficiency in English, with the ability to convey complex ideas.

Outstanding organizational skills, with a knack for juggling multiple priorities seamlessly.

Innate interpersonal abilities, with a genuine passion for connecting with and supporting others.

Proficiency in Microsoft Office suite, demonstrating your ability to navigate and utilize software to enhance productivity.

A track record of meeting and exceeding quotas, showing your dedication to achieving goals.

At least 2 years of experience in recruiting, indicating your understanding of the job market and talent acquisition strategies.

title: 2D Animator
description:
2D Animator | Adobe Animate or Toon Boom Harmony | Per-Minute Rate | Remote

What the Job Is

The client produces high-quality, character-driven animated videos for a family and children's YouTube audience. They are expanding their animation team and need skilled 2D animators who can match their existing style and deliver full scenes consistently and on time.

You will receive pre-built character rigs and backgrounds. Your job is to animate scenes where characters move, react, and interact in a way that looks and feels identical to the client's existing published YouTube videos. Model consistency and style-matching are critical.

Software used: Adobe Animate and Toon Boom Harmony. You must be proficient in at least one of these tools.

About the Animation Test

All candidates who pass the initial screening will be required to complete a short animation test before being officially onboarded.



Your Responsibilities



Animate 2D character scenes using pre-provided rigged assets in Adobe Animate or Toon Boom Harmony

Produce full scenes that match the client's established YouTube animation style exactly

Deliver smooth, expressive character animation including walk cycles, acting, facial expressions, and dynamic sequences

Animate object interactions and breakage with realistic physics and secondary motion

Maintain model consistency throughout every scene you produce

Work within production timelines and deliver completed files on schedule

Communicate clearly with the client's team in English





Requirements

Must-Have (Non-Negotiable):



Production-level skill in Adobe Animate and/or Toon Boom Harmony

Strong 2D character animation portfolio showing walk cycles, expressive animation, and fluid motion

Ability to match and maintain an established character style consistently

Experience animating on 1s

Strong English communication skills, written and spoken, required for working with the US-based team

Experience in YouTube or digital entertainment animation

Comfortable with children's and family-friendly animation styles

Ability to maintain high quality under production deadlines

Experience with rigged character animation workflows





Compensation

This role is paid per minute of finished animation. Rates vary based on experience and output quality. There is no fixed rate. As part of your application, you will be asked to submit your preferred rate per minute of finished animation in USD. Both experienced and emerging animators are welcome to apply.



How to Apply

Submit your application via OnlineJobs.ph and include the following:



Updated resume in English

Links to at least 2 to 3 animation samples related to the client's niche, character animation preferred (YouTube, Vimeo, Google Drive, etc.)

Confirmation of your software: Adobe Animate, Toon Boom Harmony, or both

Your preferred rate per minute of finished animation in USD

A short intro covering your animation background, experience level, and why you are a strong fit



Applications without animation sample links will not be reviewed, no exceptions.

Shortlisted candidates will go through a screening process before receiving the animation test details. The client's identity and full project information will be shared at that stage.

Please note that this is a direct hire with the client.

title: Marketing & Business Development Executive
description:
JOB TYPE: Full-Time



JOB SUMMARY



We are looking for a proactive and results-driven Marketing & Business Development Executive to support our US-based clients, primarily in the home care industry. This role focuses on lead generation, cold outreach,
 communication, and relationship building.



The ideal candidate should be comfortable working in a client-facing role, engaging with prospects through calls and
s, and consistently driving new business opportunities through structured outreach and follow-ups. Experience with CRM tools is preferred, but the primary focus is on traditional marketing and business development efforts.



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES



Generate new business opportunities through cold calling,
 outreach, and prospecting

Build and maintain strong relationships with prospects, clients, and referral partners

Conduct regular follow-ups to nurture leads and move them through the pipeline

Communicate professionally with US-based clients via phone,
, and virtual meetings

Understand client requirements and align outreach strategies accordingly

Prepare and share presentations, proposals, and outreach messages when required

Identify potential partnerships and referral sources to drive consistent lead flow

Maintain accurate records of leads, interactions, and follow-ups using CRM tools (e.g., Salesforce, Zoho, HubSpot, or similar)

Track daily/weekly outreach activities and report progress to internal teams

REQUIRED SKILLS AND QUALIFICATIONS

2–5 years of experience in marketing, lead generation, or business development roles

 outreach, and lead generation

Ability to handle client conversations confidently and professionally

Experience using CRM tools (Salesforce, Zoho, HubSpot, or similar)

PREFERRED SKILLS

Familiarity with
 marketing tools or outreach platforms

Full-time position

Subject line must be formatted exactly as: Last Name, First Name – Marketing Executive

Only 10 application points will be accepted

Applications that do not follow these instructions will be disregarded

title: Long-Term Remote Office Manager for Property Management Firm
description:
Bangor Home Rentals is a second-generation, family-owned property management company in Maine, 15+ years in business. Hundreds of units across greater Bangor; all maintenance, plumbing, electrical, leasing, and landscaping done in-house. Full picture at 



--- What this role is: ---

You're the first voice tenants and prospects hear when they call, and the person who keeps small but important things from slipping. Some processes are built; some you'll help build. Primarily:



- Inbound communications. Every call answered within three rings during business hours. Every
 to 
 handled within 15 minutes. Routine questions you handle directly; maintenance and owner calls go to the right person. Over time you'll write the SOPs so the next hire isn't starting from scratch.

- The Google reviews engine. Reviews drive a lot of our growth. You'd reach out personally at the 
nts tenants are most likely to be happy (move-in day, after a maintenance request closes, at renewal) and ask for a review. Respond to new reviews within six hours, sounding like a person and not a chatbot.

- Leasing and tenant ops. Canceling showings when units lease, sending receipts for cash and check rent (Maine law requires it), chasing renter's insurance renewals, fixing bounced
s, and a daily cross-reference of recent local arrests against our tenant list. None of it is hard. All of it slips if no one owns it.

- Marketing rhythm. One to two Google Business Profile posts per week, the same to
 (lightly reworded for the platform), and one AI-assisted blog post per workday using a workflow we've built. The blog work isn't writing from scratch — it's choosing topics, running prompts, fact-checking, and cleaning up formatting. Judgment on accuracy matters more than typing speed.

- A super secret project I'll tell you about if you ask.

- When the queue is light, there's always AppFolio cleanup: standardizing contacts, renaming files so searches find them.





--- What this pays: ---

$9/hr flat-rate. Full-time, that's roughly $1,560/month USD (?97,000 PHP, or R26,000 ZAR). Competitive for the Philippines, Mexico, South Africa, and similar markets, and at the higher end for the scope of work.



But the pay isn't the pitch.



I'm Nate, and until late 2025, I ran a virtual assistance staffing firm called The People Company. I sold it last year and stepped into a leadership role at our family business. I know what makes a remote job good or terrible. The complaints I heard most often from VAs at other firms:



- Pay that comes late, or doesn't come at all

- A manager who ghosts for three days, then dumps urgent work at midnight

- No feedback, no growth, no idea if you're doing well or about to be fired

- Being treated as interchangeable



We don't run that way. Pay is on time. Hours are predictable. Feedback is regular. My longtime Director of Operations from that company, based in Cebu, has agreed to stay on as a consultant to train and support whoever takes this role. She's managed remote teams for two decades — clear, direct, known for looking out for her people.



Growth path is real. The next role up is a leasing or operations coordinator — broader scope, more pay. I'd rather promote from inside.



--- You'll probably like this job if: ---

- You take quiet pride in never dropping a ball

- You have opinions about when AI tools help and when they're a crutch

- You want to work somewhere small enough that decisions are visible

- You'd rather have a steady role for years than a flashy one for months



--- You'll probably hate this job if: ---

- You want passive work where you wait to be told what to do

- You don't like the phone (this role is on the phone a lot)

- You're not interested in American customer service standards

- You want to clock in, do the minimum, clock out. That's fine, just not here.



--- Hard requirements: ---

- Strong, clear spoken English — phone work is the hardest part for non-native speakers. Don't apply if you're not confident on calls with North Americans.

- Reliable internet (100mbps primary), working headset, quiet workspace, backup plan for power and connectivity outages.

- Available 8 AM–4 PM US Eastern, Mon–Fri.

- Comfortable with AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude, or similar). We use them daily.

- Four+ years of customer-facing remote work OR property management experience — either one is fine.



--- Not required, but nice to have: ---

- Experience with AppFolio or another property management platform

- Familiarity with Google Business Profile or
 Pages

- Property management or real estate background



--- To apply (consider this a first test of how well you follow an SOP. Don't skip steps!) ---

-
: 

- Subject line: 'Application for Remote Office Manager - {YOUR NAME}'

- Body: Greeting and/or any questions about the role

- Attachments: Resume in PDF + link to an introduction video
