title: Healthcare Lead Generation VA - Cold Calling + Social Media Manager (PCP & Pain Management)
description:
JOB OVERVIEW (Please read the whole job description before applying)



We are a growing Primary Care and Pain Management medical practice in the New Hampshire / Massachusetts area. We are looking for a reliable, high-energy Virtual Assistant to generate new patient leads through outbound cold calling and organic social media management.



This is not a customer service role. You will be actively generating leads for our practice every day by calling local businesses, building referral partnerships, and growing our social media presence to attract patients within 20 miles of our clinic.



COLD CALLING RESPONSIBILITIES (60% of your time)



Call local businesses within 20 miles to offer corporate health screenings, employee wellness packages, workers compensation evaluations, and pain management consultations for their staff.



Call insurance agents and brokers to get our practice added to their provider referral lists.



Call chiropractors, physical therapists, gyms, orthopedic offices, and urgent care clinics to establish cross-referral partnerships.



Call community organizations, churches, and senior centers to offer free blood pressure screening events and health education sessions.



Follow up with interested contacts who requested more information.



Log every call outcome in a shared Google Sheet: business name, contact person, phone,
, outcome, follow-up date, and notes.



You will be provided with: A call script for each type of outreach (businesses, referral partners, community orgs) A lead list to start with (Google Maps scraped businesses in the area) Training on our services so you can speak confidently about what we offer A Google Sheet tracker to log all activity



SOCIAL MEDIA MANAGEMENT (40% of your time)



Create and post 3-5 times per week on
 and Instagram for the practice.



Content includes: health tips, doctor and staff introduction posts, clinic photos, patient testimonials (with permission), pain management education, seasonal health reminders, community event announcements.



Use local hashtags and location tags to reach people within 20 miles.



Respond to comments and DMs on social media (or route to our AI system for booking).



Post weekly Google Business Profile updates with photos, offers, and service highlights to improve our Google Maps ranking.



Monitor and suggest content ideas based on what is performing.



You do not need to run paid ads. This is organic social media only.



WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR



Required: Strong spoken English with a clear, professional phone voice (you will be calling US businesses) Previous cold calling or telemarketing experience Comfortable making 40-60 outbound calls per day Basic social media skills 
, Instagram posting and scheduling) Reliable internet and quiet work environment Organized and detail-oriented for call logging Self-starter who does not need constant supervision Available during US business hours (Eastern Time)



Nice to Have: Experience in healthcare, medical, or wellness industry Experience with Canva for social media graphics Experience with social media scheduling tools (Later, Buffer, Hootsuite) Experience with Google Business Profile management



WHAT SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE



Week 1: Trained on scripts and services, making 20+ calls per day, first social media posts live Week 2: 40-60 calls per day, 5+ interested contacts logged per week, 3-5 posts per week consistent Month 1: 20+ referral partnerships established, 100+ businesses contacted, social media posting consistent with growing engagement Month 2: Leads flowing from cold calls and social media into our booking system consistently



WORK DETAILS



Part-time: 20-hours per week Schedule: US Eastern Time business hours (flexible within that window) Pay: $3-$5 per hour depending on experience Payment: Weekly via Wise Long-term role with potential to grow as the practice scales



HOW TO APPLY (Send a WhatsApp Text to
)



Send the following:



A short voice recording (Vocaroo or similar) introducing yourself and explaining your cold calling experience. This is how we assess your phone voice.

Your experience with cold calling or telemarketing (who you called, how many calls per day, what you were selling)

Examples of social media accounts or pages you have managed (links or screenshots)

Your available hours and timezone

Your expected hourly rate

title: Senior Google Ads Manager
description:
Senior Google Ads Manager, Collision Repair and Auto Body Specialty Full-Time, Remote, Central Standard Time

Read this entire job description carefully. There is a specific instruction near the bottom that, if missed, will mean we don't review your application. We want to know you actually read this.



About BodyShop Marketing



We're a US-based digital marketing agency focused exclusively on collision repair and auto body shops. We currently manage online marketing for around 30 clients across the United States, and we're growing. Our specialty niche means we've developed deep playbooks for what works in this industry, and we're looking for a Senior Google Ads Manager to take ownership of our paid search department, sharpen what we do, and help us build the systems that will let us scale.

We exist to help independent auto body shops dominate online, and to serve every client, teammate, and community with love, grit, and integrity. We believe every shop has a dream worth fighting for, and every interaction is a chance to do meaningful work. We build more than marketing. We build people. Our faith and values shape how we lead, how we work, and how we grow together.



This is our first dedicated full-time PPC hire. You'd be joining at a foundational 
nt.



How We Work and What We Value



These aren't words on a wall for us. They show up in the day-to-day:

Love. We treat each other, our clients, and the people we work with with kindness and respect. There's no room for ego or politics here.



- Integrity. We do what we say we'll do. If something goes wrong, we own it. If we don't know something, we say so.

- Service. We're here to serve our clients well. That means caring about their results as if they were our own.

- Compassion. We assume good intent, listen carefully, and lead with empathy, especially when things are hard.

- Grit. We persevere when problems are messy. We don't quit when an account is tough.

- Energy. We bring positivity and 
ntum to the work. We want people who lift the team up, not drain it.

If these values resonate with you, you'll fit in well here. If they don't, this probably isn't the right place for you, and that's okay.



The Role



You will own Google Ads strategy and execution across our portfolio of collision repair and auto body shop clients. Your job is to make our clients' phones ring with qualified collision repair leads, profitably, every single month, and to help us build the systems that make this repeatable as we grow.



You will report to Sebastian, our Operations Manager. You will not be client-facing. We have Account Managers who own client communication. Your job is to do excellent work and communicate clearly internally so they can do theirs.



What You'll Actually Do



- Manage Google Search campaigns for around 18 collision repair and auto body clients, with capacity to grow as we add accounts.

- Own campaign strategy, including keyword research, ad copy, bidding strategy, geo-targeting, negatives, and audience layering.

- Audit existing accounts when you start and identify where we're leaving performance on the table.

- Hit and beat Cost Per Lead targets while pacing budgets responsibly at 85 to 105 percent of monthly spend.

- Run Local Services Ads campaigns where applicable.

- Be proactive about identifying issues before anyone has to ask, and bring solutions, not just problems.

- Document what works. Help us build SOPs, templates, and playbooks specific to the collision repair niche.

- Collaborate with our internal team on tracking, landing pages, and reporting. You don't have to be a master of these, but you need to understand them well enough to ask the right questions.

- Push back when you think we're wrong. Seriously. We mean this.



What We're Looking For



You will be a great fit if:



- You have at least 3-5 years of hands-on Google Ads experience managing local lead generation accounts (home services, auto, legal, medical, or similar local service verticals).

- You can speak fluently about Search campaign strategy, Quality Score, match types, bidding strategies, and conversion tracking.

- You are fluent in both written and spoken English. Your manager needs to be able to understand you clearly on video calls without difficulty.

- You are naturally analytical. Spreadsheets and conversion data energize you, not drain you.

- You have opinions about Google Ads best practices, and you're willing to share them, even when they disagree with your manager.

- You love to learn. You read industry blogs, follow PPC people on LinkedIn, watch YouTube tutorials on your own time, and you're excited about working at an agency that will invest in your growth.

- You are organized, deadline-driven, and proactive. You don't need to be reminded to do your job.

- You can work Central Standard Time hours.



You will not be a good fit if:



- You prefer to be told exactly what to do and don't like making judgment calls.

- You're uncomfortable disagreeing with people, especially your manager.

- You see Google Ads as just executing a checklist.

- You inflate your experience or use AI to write your application.



Compensation and What We Offer



- Starting base salary of $2,000 USD per month.

- 10 days paid time off per year, plus select US holidays.

- Performance-based path to raises and bonuses for top performers.

- Investment in your growth, including courses, tools, and certifications for high performers.

- Real career path. As we grow, you'll have the opportunity to lead a team of PPC specialists under you.



The Hiring Process



We move thoughtfully because we want to find the right person, and we want you to be confident in your decision, too. Here's what to expect:



1. Submit your application and cover letter through OnlineJobs.ph

2. Skills questionnaire if shortlisted (approx. 30-40 min)

3. DISC personality assessment (free, we'll send the link)

4. Initial 30-minute video call with Sebastian

5. Paid audit project of about 3 hours

6. Final video interview with Daniel and Sebastian

7. 30-day part-time paid trial with 5 to 6 real accounts

8. Full-time offer



How to Apply



Apply directly through OnlineJobs.ph by sending your cover letter and resume.

Important: Begin your application with the word "Mustang." Applications that do not start with this word will not be reviewed. This is how we know you actually read the job post.



We're excited to meet you.

title: Digital Web Graphic Designer
description:
We’re looking for a multi-year, experienced, full-time web-focused graphic designer who understands how design actually gets used, not just how it looks.



This is not a junior or concept-only role. You’ve worked in real environments, with real clients, imperfect inputs, deadlines, and expectations.



This role sits between design, marketing, and development. You need to be comfortable creating assets that perform, scale, and translate cleanly into real websites (WordPress especially), while also supporting ongoing marketing and social media efforts.



You have a portfolio that clearly reflects this level of experience.



You’ll be working on a mix of website design, light web updates, marketing graphics, social media production, UI components, and brand assets, supporting both internal projects and client work.



What You’ll Be Doing

* Designing website visuals, landing pages, and UI components in Figma

* Supporting light web development tasks (WordPress updates, implementing designs, content layout, image optimization)

* Creating marketing assets (ads, social media,
, banners) that align with campaigns

* Producing and adapting social media graphics and content for ongoing marketing efforts

* Preparing and exporting web-ready assets (proper formats, sizes, compression)

* Working with developers to ensure design-to-code accuracy

* Maintaining and contributing to design systems and asset libraries

* Adapting designs across web, social,
, and light print use

* Managing revisions, feedback, and version control in shared files



What We’re Looking For



Core Skills

* Strong experience with Figma (components, auto layout, shared libraries)

* Proficiency in Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator, etc.)

* Solid understanding of web design principles and responsive behavior

* Experience designing for marketing and conversion (not just aesthetics)

* Ability to prepare production-ready web assets



Real-World Experience

* Proven experience designing for businesses across a range of industries, including manufacturing, professional services, and local businesses

* Comfortable working with imperfect inputs—low-quality logos, inconsistent branding, unclear direction—and turning them into clean, effective design

* Strong grasp of layout, hierarchy, and messaging; you know how to communicate clearly even when inputs are weak

* Experience working in environments where speed, clarity, and usability matter more than perfect visuals

* You understand the difference between portfolio work and production work—and you’re comfortable operating in the real world



Design Thinking & Execution

* You think in systems, not just screens—reusable components, consistency, and scalability matter

* You know when to design in detail and when to leave flexibility for development

* You can make practical design decisions that hold up across web, mobile,
, and social channels

* You’re comfortable making judgment calls without overdesigning or overcomplicating



Tools & Workflow

* Comfortable using modern online tools, platforms, and feature sets to support design and marketing workflows

* Able to move between tools and environments efficiently without slowing down production

* Organized with files, naming, and structure so others can easily work with your designs



Bonus (Strongly Preferred)

* Experience working directly inside WordPress (implementing designs, updating pages, optimizing images)

* Familiarity with Canva or Adobe Express for scalable marketing and team workflows

* Understanding of design systems and reusable components

* Experience collaborating with developers and marketers



How You Work

* You don’t just design what you’re given, you think about how it will be used

* You understand the difference between one-off design vs scalable systems

* You’re comfortable with feedback and can iterate quickly

* You can push back when something doesn’t make sense long-term

* You care about organization, naming, and consistency in files and work product



What Success Looks Like

* Designs translate cleanly into development without rework

* Website updates and assets are implemented efficiently and correctly

* Social and marketing assets are consistent, on-brand, and delivered on time

* You help reduce design debt, not create it

* You contribute to building systems—not just screens



Compensation

* Competitive, based on experience

* PTO benefits

* Full-time, long-term role

* Remote EST Zone with a stable workflow and consistent project pipeline

title: WFH Part-Time Outbound Sales Hunter / B2B Appointment Setter
description:
We are a fast-growing US-based agency providing a premium, high-ticket Digital Marketing Service platform specifically for roofing contractors in the United States.



We are NOT looking for general virtual assistants. We are looking for an aggressive, resilient Sales Hunter and Appointment Setter who loves cold calling, knows how to bypass strict gatekeepers, and wants to earn serious commissions.



You do not need to close the sale. Your only goal is to pique the business owner's interest, ask 4-5 quick qualifying questions, and book a 30-minute Strategy Call directly into our CEO’s calendar.



Shift Schedule (Philippine Time - PHT):

This is a fixed, part-time schedule of 22 hours per week. Please review these exact hours before applying, as it features a mid-week shift change:



Tuesday – Thursday: 4:00 AM – 8:00 AM PHT (Early Morning Shift)



Friday – Saturday: 11:00 PM – 3:00 AM PHT (Late Night Shift)



Sunday: 11:00 PM – 1:00 AM PHT (Weekend Follow-up) Every Second Weekend



Compensation & Perks:

Base Salary: Competitive fixed monthly retainer (Paid on time, twice a month).



Uncapped Commissions: Generous USD dollar bonuses paid out for every single client signed from your booked calls.



Perk: 100% Remote Work-From-Home setup.



What We Require (The "Rockstar" Checklist):

Native-Level / Neutral English: You must have a clean, neutral, easily understood accent. No strong regional accents or heavy "robotic" call-center tones.



Experience: Minimum 1-2 years of solid Outbound Cold Calling experience (B2B, Lead Generation, or high-pressure US financial/telecom/home services campaigns).



Thick Skin: US contractors and roofers are direct and busy. You must be resilient, professional, and excellent at overcoming objections.



Technical Setup (Strictly Enforced):



Reliable Fiber internet connection (Minimum 20 Mbps Download / 10 Mbps Upload).



Hardwired setup only (Must use an Ethernet cable, no Wi-Fi allowed during shifts).



High-quality USB Noise-Canceling Headset with a boom mic (No AirPods/Bluetooth).



Power backup solution (UPS or Inverter) to ensure 100% uptime during local power outages.



A fast laptop/PC capable of handling GHL and a web dialer simultaneously.



How to Apply (Read Carefully):

To filter out automated applications, we will only review candidates who follow these exact instructions:



Start your response/message with the exact phrase: "I have verified my ping to the US."



To be considered, you must attach a 30-60 second voice recording (or link to a Vocaroo/Loom) introducing yourself and describing your experience in outbound sales. Applications without a voice sample will be automatically declined.



We require a screenshot of a US server ping test from your device

The Instructions: 1.  Go to Speedtest.net.

2.  Click "Change Server" (usually located below the "GO" button).

3.  Type in a US city (e.g., "New York" or "Los Angeles").

4.  Select a reputable server like Verizon or AT&T.

5.  Run the test and send the result link or screenshot.



Also send a screenshot of your internet speed on your device

title: Operations Associate
description:

Sales Support:?Organize and assist with customer sales, including order processing and relationship management.

 and phone, addressing inquiries and resolving issues. 



For Operations Manager Candidates: Leading a team of operations and customer services personnel  



 



?Skills & Requirements

Strong experience of 3PLs, Warehouse Management Systems, International Shipments, Customs & Duties, Inventory Management, Supply Chain, Order & Returns Processing and Customer Services 



For Operations Manager Candidates: Experience leading a team of operations and customer services personnel  



Familiarity with project management tools, related SOPs and workflows. These include ASANA, MONDAY, ClickUp, Trello, Coda or a similar tool 



Familiarity with the following systems is a bonus: Shopify, Amazon, Linnworks, Mintsoft, Shiphero, Zendesk and ASANA. 



Numerate, with strong analytical skills. 



Process-driven, reliable, and calm under pressure 



Excellent written and verbal communication.

Proactive, with the ability to take initiative and solve problems independently.

Please don’t apply if your profile matches the below: 



VA only experience 



Customer services only experience

Reliable & fast internet, a laptop (with camera for video meetings), headset, and a quiet working environment are required. 



We will require direct WhatsApp access to the hire. 



Working hours (UK Time) Monday – Friday: 9am – 5pm; or 9am – 6pm inclusive of a 1-hour lunch break

title: Funnel Project Manager
description:
About the Role:

We're looking for a detail-obsessed Funnel Project Manager to own the end-to-end execution of our marketing funnels. You won't be building funnels yourself, you'll be the person making sure every funnel that ships is launched on time, fully integrated, and working correctly across every component: pages,
s, payments, pixels, memberships, and automations.



This is a coordination and quality-control role. You'll manage our funnel builders, work alongside our graphic designer, and partner with copywriters and media buyers to keep projects moving. If

something's broken, late, or half-built, it's your job to catch it before it goes live.



What You'll Do:

1. Project & Team Management

- Own the funnel build pipeline from kickoff to launch

- Manage and coordinate funnel builders (in-house and contractors), ensuring deadlines are hit and quality stays consistent

- Brief and collaborate with the graphic designer on funnel imagery, banners, product mockups, and video thumbnails

- Run regular standups, track progress in our project management tool, and flag blockers early

- Keep stakeholders updated with clear, no-fluff status reports

2. Funnel QA & Technical Oversight

- Audit every funnel before launch — desktop and mobile

- Verify payment integrations (Stripe, PayPal), including order bumps, upsells, downsells, and trial flows

- Test all
 automations and sequences (welcome, abandoned cart, post-purchase, nurture)

- Confirm tracking pixels are firing correctly (Meta, Google, TikTok) and conversion events are mapped

- Ensure membership funnels deliver correctly — access, login, content drip, cancellations

- Validate domain setup, SSL, redirects, and thank-you page logic

3.
 & Automation

- Set up and QA
 flows in our ESP (ActiveCampaign / Klaviyo / ConvertKit / etc.)

- Coordinate with copywriters on
 sequences and make sure they're properly tagged, segmented, and triggered

- Monitor deliverability and flag issues early

4. Continuous Improvement

- Maintain SOPs and pre-launch checklists for every funnel type

- Document recurring issues and build systems to prevent them

- Stay current on ClickFunnels updates, integrations, and best practices



Must Haves:

- 2+ years hands-on experience with ClickFunnels (1.0 and/or 2.0)

- Proven track record managing or coordinating funnel projects from start to launch

- Working knowledge of Stripe,
 service providers, and pixel/conversion tracking

- Comfortable in project management tools (Asana, ClickUp, Trello, Notion)

- Detail-obsessed — you spot the broken link, the unfired pixel, the missing UTM

- Excellent written communication; clear, fast, no fluff

- Self-managing — you don't need someone hovering to keep moving



Nice to Haves:

- Experience with membership platforms (Kajabi, Memberium, MemberMouse)

- Familiarity with Zapier or 

- Background working with info products, online courses, or coaching businesses

- Light HTML/CSS for quick tweaks

- Experience hiring and managing freelancers



What Success Looks Like:

- Day 30: Fully onboarded; you've audited our current funnels and documented gaps

- Day 60: Running the build pipeline independently; clear SOPs in place

- Day 90: Reduced average launch time per funnel; zero major QA misses post-launch



What We Offer:

- Flexible working arrangement – part-time or full-time positions available

- Remote work opportunity with flexible hours

- Competitive compensation based on experience

- Opportunity to work on diverse projects across multiple product lines

- Collaborative and creative team environment

- Room for growth as our company expands

- 13th month pay

- PTO



To Apply kindly fill out this form:

title: Customer Service - Team Leader
description:

 above.

title: Senior Graphic Designer
description:
NOTE:



Minimum of 5 Years Experience Required. 

Applications without a portfolio will not be considered. 

Applications by VAs will not be considered.



We are North American Marketing Agency, seeking a Senior Graphic Designer to join our team. In this role, you will play a crucial role in creating visually appealing and impactful designs across multiple mediums, including digital, video and print. Your creativity and expertise will contribute to enhancing client brand identities, marketing materials, and overall visual communication.



Responsibilities

- Develop and design creative graphics and video content aligned with client objectives and brand guidelines.

- Create visual concepts, graphics, and layouts for digital and print media (including newsletters and UX design).

- Collaborate with clients and internal tea
mbers to understand design requirements and deliver compelling visual solutions.

- Ensure all designs are visually appealing, on-brand, and effectively communicate the intended message.

- Stay up to date with design trends, tools, and best practices to ensure high-quality and innovative output.

- Provide revisions and refinements based on client feedback to achieve desired results.



Requirements

- Proven experience of 5 years or over as a Senior Graphic Designer or in a similar role, supported by a strong portfolio of successful design projects.

- Mandatory experience with the following tools is a must: Figma (Website UX Deisgn), Capcut, Adobe Suite platforms (Graphic Design), Canva.

- Experience with video editing, motion graphics and illustration is a plus.

- Experience across the full Adobe Suite is required.

- Strong understanding of typography, colour theory, layout, and visual composition.

- Excellent problem-solving skills with strong attention to detail.

- Ability to work independently in a remote environment with minimal supervision.



Location

- Remote position - only candidates based in the Philippines will be considered.



Schedule

- Part-time or Full-time



Benefits

- Competitive compensation based on experience and project scope.

- Opportunity to work with diverse clients and industries.

- Professional growth and development within a creative agency environment.

- Flexible work schedule and fully remote setup.



How to Apply

Depending on the interview we may also share a test project which you can submit with your own watermark.

title: Service Desk Technician (Work from Home)
description:
Role Summary:

We are looking for a skilled and motivated L2/L3 Support Desk Technician to join our fast-paced Managed Services Provider (MSP) team. In this fully remote role, you'll support a mix of cloud and on-prem environments, helping diverse clients manage their IT infrastructure efficiently and securely.

This role is ideal for a tech-savvy, customer-focused professional who thrives in multi-tenant environments and enjoys working with a variety of technologies across industries.



Key Responsibilities

- Tier 2 Technical Support

- Respond to and resolve complex technical i
 escalated from L1 support

- Troubleshoot and resolve issues with servers (Windows/Linux), networking, cloud platforms, and end-user systems

- Perform root cause analysis and implement preventative solutions

- Provide support for Windows 10/11 desktop environments

- Manage and troubleshoot RDP connections and virtual desktops/environments



Cloud & Infrastructure

- Support Microsoft 365, Azure AD, Entra ID, Exchange Online, OneDrive, SharePoint

- Manage and troubleshoot hybrid cloud environments (Azure / AWS + on-prem Windows Servers)

- Administer backups (Axcient, Datto), storage, and disaster recovery solutions

- Deploy and manage virtual machines (Hyper-V, VMware)



Network & Security

- Troubleshoot issues with firewalls, VPNs, DNS, DHCP, VLANs, routers/switches

- Work with security tools (EDR, AV, MFA, conditional access policies)

- Monitor and troubleshoot networks using tools like Auvik and RMM platforms

- Assist with implementing cybersecurity best practices across environments



Client Management & Documentation

- Manage support tickets via PSA tools (ConnectWise, etc.)

- Maintain accurate documentation of systems, procedures, and client environments

- Communicate clearly with clients, keeping them updated on issue resolution and project progress

- Collaborate with L1 team and mentor junior techs as needed



Requirements

- Completion of a college or university program in IT management, network administration, computer science, computer programming, or computer networking, BSc/BA in IT, Computer Science or relevant field

- Certification or training provided by recognized hardware/software vendors

- Strong customer service and troubleshooting skills

- Customer-oriented and cool-tempered

- Previous working experience as an IT Help Desk Technician for a minimum of 5 years

- In-depth knowledge of computer systems and mobile devices

- Hands on experience with diagnosing and resolving advanced technical issues



Excellent interpersonal skills

- 2–5+ years of experience in a technical support or sysadmin role, ideally in an MSP

- Proficiency in supporting Microsoft environments:

- Windows Server (2012R2–2022), Active Directory, Group Policy

- Windows 10/11 desktop environments

- Microsoft 365 (Exchange, SharePoint, OneDrive, Teams)

- Azure AD, Intune, Conditional Access, MFA

- Experience with virtualization (VMware or Hyper-V)

- Solid understanding of networking fundamentals (firewalls, DNS, DHCP, NAT, etc.)

- Experience supporting RDP and virtual desktop environments

- Familiarity with Auvik for network monitoring and other RMM tools ( Datto RMM, Atera)

- PSA platform experience (e.g., ConnectWise, Autotask)



Soft Skills

- Strong communication and customer service skills

- Ability to manage time and priorities independently in a remote setting

- Analytical mindset and attention to detail.



Working Conditions

- Remote role with core hours from 10:00 AM to 6:00 PM EST

- Must be able to work independently with minimal supervision

title: Senior Wix E-commerce Developer
description:
Hi, I’m looking for a professional Wix expert who really knows what he’s doing. Not someone basic, but someone who understands how to build modern, high-quality websites, especially for clothing brands. Design is very important to me, so I need someone who has a strong eye for visuals, branding, and overall customer experience.

I don’t just need someone who follows instructions. I’m looking for someone who can think with me, come up with ideas, and suggest improvements. Someone who understands customer flow, knows how to increase conversions, and can say “if we change this, it will perform better.” I want a real professional who sees the bigger picture.

The goal is to improve and upgrade my current Wix website so it looks more premium, performs better, and converts more visitors into buyers. I also want someone who can guide me and explain things clearly when needed.

If you have strong experience with Wix and you’ve built high-level e-commerce or fashion websites before, then we can work together long-term.

If you believe you’re the right person, I want to see websites you’ve built.

title: Senior Conversion-Focused Web Designer Needed
description:
We are looking for a senior-level web designer who can build and design a modern 2026-ready online course platform. This is not for a junior or someone who only makes “nice looking” websites. We need a true expert who understands design, user psychology, and conversion at a high level.



The project involves designing the full experience of an online education platform: the public-facing website, high-converting sales pages, the user profile area, student dashboard, and the admin interface. Everything must feel premium, clean, modern, and strategically structured. The design should not only look strong, but guide the user naturally toward taking action and completing payment.



You must deeply understand customer flow. From the 
nt a visitor lands on the homepage until they purchase and access their course, every step must be intentional. Layout, spacing, typography, hierarchy, call-to-actions, and user journey must be optimized for clarity and conversion. The interface should remove friction, build trust instantly, and create 
ntum toward buying.



We only want to work with experienced professionals who have worked on serious projects before. If you have built high-level SaaS platforms, course platforms, or high-converting e-commerce funnels, we want to see it. Show us your portfolio and real case studies. Social proof is required.



If you understand how design directly increases revenue, improves retention, and strengthens brand positioning, then you are the type of expert we are looking for.

title: Senior Growth & Revenue Expert – Scaling Payments & Conversions
description:
I am looking for a senior growth and revenue expert who can significantly increase the number of successful payments and overall revenue of my business. The objective of this role is very clear: more conversions, more completed payments, and scalable growth.



This is not a general marketing role and not a position for juniors. I am only interested in working with experts who have already operated at a high level and who have experience with large or well-established companies. If you have not worked with serious businesses or high-volume environments, this role is not a fit.



The person I am looking for fully understands the complete flow of an online business: from traffic and first impression, to website structure, messaging, user behavior, checkout flow, and payment completion. You must be able to analyze my website and funnels in detail and clearly explain what needs to change to increase conversion rates and reduce drop-offs during the payment process.



I expect you to be able to look at my business objectively and say exactly where money is being lost, why users are not converting at maximum potential, and what concrete steps are required to fix this. This includes improvements in UX, CRO, funnels, and payment optimization. The focus is not theory, but real, measurable impact on revenue.



I want to work with someone who thinks strategically, communicates directly, and is focused on results. Someone who understands how scaling works at a professional level and who can contribute insights that actually move the business forward.



This role is intended for experts only. I am not interested in experiments, generic advice, or surface-level marketing tactics. I am looking for proven experience and clear value.



Social proof is required.

When applying, you must clearly show:

Companies or brands you have worked with (preferably well-known or high-revenue businesses)

Concrete results you have achieved (growth, conversion increases, revenue impact)

Any relevant case studies, portfolios, or references



Compensation will be aligned with expertise and results, and a long-term collaboration is possible for the right person.

If you are an experienced growth professional who knows how to increase payments, optimize conversion flows, and scale online businesses, you are invited to apply.

title: Experienced Webflow Developer Needed for High-End Course Platform
description:
I am looking for a highly professional Webflow developer to build a complete course platform for my business. I sell online courses and need a fully functional, modern learning platform built entirely in Webflow, using a premium template and a clean, high-end 2026-style design. The platform must look professional, trustworthy, and optimized for conversions.



The platform will host approximately eight courses, with all video content securely hosted on Vimeo and embedded into the course environment. Each customer must have their own account. After a one-time payment, the customer receives access to the purchased course for 21 days only. Once this access period expires, the course must automatically be removed from the user’s account, and the customer must purchase again to regain access. This is strictly a one-time payment model, not a subscription.



I am looking for someone who truly understands how to build a scalable and secure course platform in Webflow. You must not only build the platform, but also teach me how everything works after delivery, including where and how content is managed, how access is controlled, and how I can make changes independently in the future. A proper handover and clear explanation are mandatory.



I only want to work with developers who have already built course platforms before. If you have not built a real course platform in Webflow, this project is not a fit. If you have experience, you must provide examples of course platforms you have built. I want to see live websites or real projects that demonstrate your experience and quality of work.

If you are confident that you are the right person for this project, respond to this job post with your strategy, explain how you would structure the platform, and include links to previous course platforms you have built. Only experienced and professional Webflow developers should apply.

title: Website Takedown Specialist (Impersonation Case)
description:
I am looking for a specialist who can help me immediately stop an impersonating scam website. There is an active website using my name, my face, and my brand, pretending to be me and my business. This site is misleading visitors and causing serious reputational damage. This is a clear case of impersonation and trademark infringement.



I am looking for someone with proven experience in handling scam and impersonation websites, who understands this process and can act quickly and effectively.



If you have experience with similar cases and can take immediate action, please explain how you would approach this and share examples of cases you have successfully resolved.

title: Payment Specialist (iDEAL & Bancontact)
description:
We are looking for an experienced payment specialist who can help us successfully set up and activate iDEAL and Bancontact for our business.

We run an online course website focused on theory exam preparation. We sell digital theory courses for exams such as car, motorcycle, and other driving-related theory exams. Payments are a critical part of our business, especially for the Dutch and Belgian markets, which is why iDEAL and Bancontact are essential for us.

We have already tried multiple providers, including Stripe and Mollie, and most parts are set up correctly. However, activating and keeping iDEAL and Bancontact fully operational has not been successful so far. We are therefore looking for someone who truly understands payment processors, acquirers, and onboarding requirements, and who knows how to get these payment methods approved and running without issues.

Your role is to help us secure a working payment processor that supports iDEAL and Bancontact for our specific use case. This includes guiding us through the correct setup, compliance, communication with PSPs or acquirers if needed, and making sure everything works smoothly for a course-based business.

If you are able to arrange this successfully for us, we are very open to a strong collaboration and are willing to offer a good financial reward for the result. This is a result-driven role: if you deliver, we pay well.

We are looking for someone professional, experienced, and reliable, who knows how payment systems work in practice, not just in theory.

If you believe you can help us solve this and get iDEAL and Bancontact live, we would like to hear from you.

title: Senior Full-Stack Laravel Developer (Online Course Platform)
description:
We are looking for a senior, professional full-stack Laravel developer to work on our online course platform. This is a serious project and we are not interested in junior developers or amateurs.

Our website is built in Laravel and serves paid online courses. Users purchase access, receive an account, and can access the course content for 21 days, after which access automatically expires and the user must purchase again. You must fully understand this type of access logic and be able to maintain and improve it without issues.

You will be responsible for maintaining and improving the existing codebase, integrating and maintaining payment systems, and ensuring that the checkout and payment flow work flawlessly at all times. You must be comfortable working with API integrations, especially payment APIs, and understand how to implement them securely and reliably.

In addition to backend work, you should also be able to handle the frontend at a high level. The platform must look modern, clean, and professional (2026-level design). We expect strong UX and UI skills, not basic layouts.

The website is in Dutch, so experience working with Dutch companies or Dutch-language platforms is a strong plus. Professional communication and a serious working attitude are required.

We work with FastPanel for server, so familiarity with FastPanel or similar control panels is expected.

Before starting any collaboration, signing an NDA is mandatory.

If you are a senior developer with real experience in Laravel-based platforms, online course or membership systems, payment integrations, and modern frontend design, and you are looking for a serious long-term project, we invite you to get in touch with your experience and relevant work.

title: Senior Developer – Business Intelligence & ETL Experience in Pharma or CRO
description:
We are looking for a Senior Developer with strong experience in Business Intelligence (BI) and ETL development. This is a full WFH role and will be responsible for designing, building, and maintaining data pipelines, data warehouses, and reporting solutions that support business decision making. The ideal candidate has a solid background in data architecture, performance optimization, and transforming complex data into meaningful insights.



Key Responsibilities

Design, develop, and maintain ETL processes to extract, transform, and load data from multiple sources

Build and optimize data pipelines and workflows for reliability and scalability

Develop and maintain data warehouse solutions and data models (star and snowflake schemas)

Create and support BI dashboards, reports, and analytics tools

Collaborate with business stakeholders to gather requirements and translate them into technical solutions

Ensure data quality, integrity, and consistency across systems

Monitor and troubleshoot ETL jobs and data pipelines

Optimize database performance, queries, and data storage strategies

Implement best practices for data governance, security, and compliance

Mentor junior developers and provide technical leadership

Required Qualifications

Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Systems, or related field

5 to 8+ years of experience in software development with a focus on BI and ETL

Strong experience with ETL tools (such as Informatica, Talend, or Microsoft SQL Server Integration Services)

Advanced SQL skills and experience with relational databases (SQL Server, Oracle, PostgreSQL, etc.)

Experience with data warehousing concepts and dimensional modeling

Proficiency in at least one programming language (Python, Java, or C#)

Experience with BI tools such as Power BI, Tableau, or similar

Strong problem solving and analytical skills

Preferred Qualifications

Experience with cloud platforms such as Amazon Web Services, Microsoft Azure, or Google Cloud Platform

Knowledge of big data technologies (Spark, Hadoop, etc.)

Experience with data lakes and modern data architecture

Familiarity with DevOps practices and CI/CD pipelines

Experience working in Agile environments

________________________________________

title: Real Estate Cold Caller / Lead Generation Specialist
description:
Location: Remote 

Work Schedule: Monday – Friday, 8:30 AM – 4:30 PM EST



Overview:  We're looking for a high-energy, results-driven Cold Caller / Lead Generation Specialist who thrives in a fast-paced environment and isn't afraid to pick up the phone or slide into a DM. This role is critical to our growth. Your primary responsibility is to identify potential clients, initiate contact through outbound calls, and nurture those relationships through consistent social media follow-ups until prospects convert into qualified leads and paying customers.



If you're confident, resilient, and motivated by hitting targets (and earning incentives for doing so), this role is built for you.

 follow-ups working in sync

Performance Expectations

-High-volume outbound calling with consistent daily call targets

-Active and professional social media follow-up activity across multiple platforms

-Strong conversion rates from outreach to qualified leads

-Achievement of set quotas and KPIs

-Measurable contribution to overall sales pipeline growth



Incentives & Compensation

-Competitive base pay

-Performance-based incentives for meeting and exceeding quotas

-Bonuses tied to conversions and revenue impact



Qualifications

-Proven experience in cold calling, telemarketing, or sales (preferred but not required for highly driven candidates)

-Excellent verbal AND written communication skills — you sound just as sharp on the phone as you do in a DM

-Comfort and confidence using social media platforms (LinkedIn, Instagram,
) for professional outreach

-Strong resilience and the ability to handle rejection without losing 
ntum

-Goal-oriented mindset with a strong work ethic

-Ability to think quickly and adapt conversations in real time

-Basic computer skills and familiarity with CRM tools (or willingness to learn)



What We're Looking For

-A "rock star" caller who brings energy and confidence to every conversation

-Someone equally comfortable on the phone and behind a keyboard

-A person who sees rejection as part of the process, not a setback

-Self-motivated individuals who take ownership of their performance and pipeline

-Team players who can also operate independently



Why Join Us

-Supportive and performance-driven environment

-Clear expectations and measurable success metrics

-Real earning potential through incentives

-Opportunity to develop valuable sales, communication, and digital outreach skills



If you're ready to turn conversations  on the phone and online — into real opportunities and get rewarded for your results, we want to hear from you.  Apply now and show us why you're the Cold Caller who can drive real growth.

title: Medical Virtual Assistant (Scribing + Insurance Verification)
description:
We are a private podiatry (foot and ankle) practice in the United States seeking a highly detail-oriented Virtual Assistant to support clinical documentation and insurance verification.



This is a long-term role with structured systems and clear expectations.



**Responsibilities:**



**Scribing (during clinic hours):**



* Real-time documentation in EMR (DrChrono or similar)

* Prepare charts prior to patient visits

* Update treatment flags (EMTT, orthotics, follow-ups)

* Ensure documentation is complete and accurate



**Insurance Verification (non-clinic hours):**



* Verify patient eligibility and benefits

* Document copays, deductibles, and coverage details in EMR

* Identify referral or authorization requirements

* Flag any issues prior to patient appointments



**Administrative Support:**



* Assist with end-of-day chart and billing checks

* Ensure all services (X-rays, procedures, products) are properly documented

* Maintain clear communication with in-office and virtual tea
mbers



**Requirements:**



* Experience as a medical scribe (required)

* Experience with insurance verification (required)

* Strong attention to detail and accuracy

* Ability to follow structured workflows and checklists

* Good written English

* Ability to work during U.S. clinic hours when needed



**Nice to Have:**



* Experience with podiatry, orthopedic, or physical medicine practices

* Familiarity with DrChrono or similar EMR

* Basic understanding of CPT/ICD-10



**Hours & Pay:**



* Part-time: 20–30 hours per week

* Hourly: $6–$9/hour based on experience



**To Apply:**

Please include:



1. Description of your scribing experience

2. Description of your insurance verification experience

3. Example of what information you document during verification

4. Your availability (including overlap with U.S. clinic hours)



We are looking for someone reliable, detail-oriented, and committed to accuracy and consistency.

title: Operations Virtual Assistant
description:
Note: Interested applicants must submit their application exclusively through the OnlineJobs platform. Do not
 the company directly. Any candidate who contacts the company outside of the OnlineJobs system will be disqualified from consideration.



Operations Virtual Assistant

(Process-Driven | High-Precision | Behind-the-Scenes Operations)



Job Overview



Maid In America Cleaning Services is hiring an Operations Virtual Assistant to protect schedule integrity, data accuracy, and operational consistency.



This is a behind-the-scenes execution role. You will not be customer-facing. You will work inside defined systems and SOPs to ensure our operational engine runs cleanly and efficiently every day.



If you enjoy structured work, moving quickly without sacrificing accuracy, and taking pride in clean execution, this role will feel natural to you.



What You’ll Do:



1. Scheduling & Job Management (Primary Responsibility)

You will own scheduling preparation and system accuracy for our TN locations.



This includes:

- Creating and modifying clients, jobs, and visits in Jobber

- Preparing future-day schedules for review and approval

- Creating training tasks in Jobber for new tea
mbers

- Re-sequencing jobs and rebalancing teams within defined guardrails

- Maintaining week-to-week schedule consistency whenever possible

- Flagging and correcting conflicts or inefficiencies early

- Executing same-day scheduling adjustments exactly as directed



2. Data Accuracy & System Integrity

You will ensure operational data is accurate, complete, and reliable.



This includes:

- Updating customer notes, job frequencies, and service details

- Invoicing customers promptly after service completion

- Calculating cost-of-service data after jobs

- Preparing timesheet and tips reports for payroll

- Logging complaints and rectified cleans accurately

- Creating and publishing weekly operational reports

- Manual KPI data entry

- Verifying work-to-labor ratios using company tools



3. Administrative Support

You will support operational structure and remove administrative friction.



This includes:

- Supporting the Assistant Operations Manager with administrative execution

- Maintaining internal trackers and shared documents

- Following established documentation and checklists consistently



What This Role Requires

- High pace with high accuracy

- Comfort with structured, repeatable tasks

- Strong attention to detail

- Clear communication when issues arise

- Strong adherence defined systems and guardrails

- Ability to work independently within clear expectations



This role involves a high volume of operational tasks that must be completed correctly and consistently. As the company grows, volume will increase — and this role grows with it.



Who We’re Looking For



Detail-Oriented & Reliable

You take pride in doing things correctly and thoroughly.



High Throughput Executor

You can handle volume without losing structure or focus.



Process-Driven

You work well inside defined systems and appreciate clear expectations.



Accountable Communicator

You flag issues early, own mistakes quickly, and ask for clarification when needed.



Tech-Comfortable

You’re comfortable using tools like Slack, Google Suite, Chrome extensions, and scheduling platforms. Experience with Jobber is a strong plus.



Experienced in Fast-Paced Admin or Scheduling

Background in administrative, dispatch, logistics, scheduling, or operations-heavy roles is

preferred.



Work Requirements

- Monday–Friday, 8AM–5PM U.S. Central Time

- Reliable internet with backup

- Dedicated workspace

- Backup power options in case of outages

- Fluent written English



Our Core Values

- Communication

- Connection

- Quality

- Service

- Teamwork



If these values resonate with you, we want to hear from you.



Important Screening Step (Read Carefully)



SERIOUS APPLICANTS ONLY:

1. Complete our Culture Index survey: 

2. Submit your application with the subject line beginning with the core value you most resonate with (ALL CAPS).

3. Use a minimum of 5 Apply Points when applying

4. In your application message, include one sentence describing the most repetitive task you have performed at a high standard for 6+ months.



Applications that do not follow all instructions will not be reviewed.

title: Remote VA / Operations Manager
description:
About Us:



Hey there! We’re a growing exterior cleaning company based in Florida, and we’re looking for someone to step in as a key player on our team. This isn’t just a basic VA role, we want someone who can help run day-to-day operations and grow with us long-term.

title: Assistant Editor
description:
Title: Assistant Video Editor — Full-Time, Salaried (Personal Brand / Creator Content)



Salary: $450 USD/month



Hours: 40 hrs/week | Monday–Friday | 7am–3pm EST



Type: Full-time, salaried, long-term



Location: Remote (Philippines-based)



---



About the role



We're hiring an Assistant Video Editor to support a growing personal brand in the lifestyle, travel, and finance space. You'll work directly under our Lead Editor — executing edits, applying revisions, and producing volume at the brand standard.



This is a clean execution role. The strategy is built. The brand voice is built. The Lead Editor will brief you on every piece. Your job is to edit well, edit fast, and follow direction precisely.



You'll be cutting both short-form (Reels, TikToks, YouTube Shorts, podcast clips) and long-form (full podcast episodes, YouTube videos) content for one brand only.



---



What you'll do



- Edit short-form and long-form pieces from raw footage based on briefs from the Lead Editor

- Pull from Google Drive, save first-pass edits, hand off for review

- Apply revisions promptly and accurately

- Maintain naming conventions and folder organization

- Communicate daily via WhatsApp on progress, blockers, and questions

- Hit weekly output volume



---



What we're looking for



You should already be doing this work professionally and ready to commit to one client full-time.



- 2+ years of paid video editing experience

- Experience with both short-form and long-form editing

- Portfolio showing clean cuts, on-brand captions, smart pacing

- Solid English (written and spoken)

- Premiere Pro, DaVinci Resolve, or CapCut Pro fluency

- Reliable internet, dedicated workspace, capable editing machine

- Available to work 7am–3pm EST consistently — non-negotiable

- Coachable, asks good clarifying questions, doesn't guess



---



What we offer



- $450 USD/month, paid monthly

- Full-time stable salary

- Long-term role

- One brand, one client

- Clear briefs, clear feedback loop

- Direct mentorship from the Lead Editor



---



How to apply



Send your application via [OnlineJobs.ph] internal messaging. Applications missing any of the items below will be auto-rejected.



Your message must include:



1. The first word of your message: vantage

2. Your resume or OnlineJobs profile link

3. Portfolio of 3–5 edits you personally cut. Include both short-form AND long-form examples if you have them. 

4. A short written answer (3–5 sentences): *"What separates a good edit from a great one in your view?"*

5. Confirmation that you can work 7am–3pm EST, Monday–Friday

6. Your current full-time commitments

7. A short answer (3–5 sentences): *"Why do you feel you'd be a good fit for this role?"*



We review every complete application. Thank you for not skipping steps.

title: Digital Marketing & Ads Manager (Construction Lead Generation)

title: Regional Manager
description:
We do not monitor Indeed messages or applications. If you are interested in this opportunity, please apply at the link below!



Are you a leader with a proven track record of leading teams, handling escalations with tact and professionalism, and driving operational success? We’d love to hear from you. Apply today to join Serenity Clean and become a key leader in shaping the future of our operations!



Apply Here: 
/application-regional-manager



Job Title: Regional Manager

Location: Remote

Pay: $7/hour

Department: Operations

Reports to: CEO of the Company



Position Overview:

Serenity Clean is seeking a highly motivated and experienced Regional Manager to lead and manage a dynamic team of Area Managers across multiple locations. This role is crucial for ensuring smooth operations, driving performance excellence, and delivering exceptional service to our clients. The Regional Manager will be responsible for overseeing the entire Area Management team, ensuring that each tea
mber aligns with the company's core values, and maintaining consistent operational standards across all areas. You will handle escalations, ensure the resolution of complex issues, and be accountable for the success of the regions under your management.



Key Responsibilities:

Leadership & Team Management:

>Lead, mentor, and hold Area Managers accountable for their performance across multiple regions.

>Foster a collaborative culture based on Serenity Clean’s core values and ensure alignment with company goals.

Escalation Management:

>Handle escalated client issues and operational challenges, ensuring prompt resolution and preventing recurrence.

>Provide support to Area Managers in resolving complex situations to maintain client satisfaction.

Performance Oversight:

>Monitor and ensure that all regions meet key performance metrics, including client satisfaction, efficiency, and profitability.

>Conduct regular reviews of Area Managers to track progress and provide feedback.

Training & Development:

>Oversee training programs and ensure Area Managers are equipped to lead their teams effectively.

>Foster career growth and succession planning for Area Managers.

Client Success:

>Ensure high-quality service delivery and maintain strong, long-term client relationships across all regions.

>Address potential client issues proactively to ensure ongoing satisfaction.

Reporting & Accountability:

>Provide regular performance reports to senior leadership, ensuring transparency and accountability across regions.

>Take full responsibility for regional success and ensure goals are met.

Process Improvement:

>Continuously improve operations, identifying opportunities for increased efficiency and service consistency.

Crisis Management:

>Resolve crises swiftly and decisively, maintaining service continuity and client trust.



Qualifications:

Experience:

>Minimum of 5 years in leadership roles, with at least 3 years of experience managing Area Managers or multi-location teams.

>Strong experience in Client Success, with a track record of managing escalations and improving customer satisfaction across regions.

>Proven ability to manage complex operations, including resolving client complaints and operational challenges.



Skills:

>Exceptional leadership and team management skills, with the ability to inspire and motivate a diverse team.

>Strong problem-solving skills and the ability to make decisions under pressure.

>Excellent communication and interpersonal skills, with the ability to build relationships at all levels of the organization.

>Proven ability to manage multiple regions simultaneously while driving accountability and performance.

>Strong analytical skills, with the ability to track and report on performance metrics and KPIs.



Attributes:

>Strong sense of responsibility and accountability, with a focus on delivering results.

>Ability to manage and resolve escalations calmly and effectively.

>Highly organized and detail-oriented, with the ability to prioritize competing tasks and demands.

>A solutions-oriented mindset, always looking for ways to improve operations and service delivery.

>Alignment with Serenity Clean’s core values and a passion for creating a positive impact on the team and clients.



What We Offer:

>A competitive salary with performance-based incentives.

>Unlimited Paid Time Off (PTO) after 90 days of full employment.

>Opportunities for professional development and career advancement.

>A collaborative and positive work environment that values personal growth and team success.

>The chance to make a significant impact in a rapidly growing company.



If you have a proven track record of leading teams, handling escalations with tact and professionalism, and driving operational success, we’d love to hear from you. Apply today to join Serenity Clean and become a key leader in shaping the future of our operations!



Apply Here: 
/application-regional-manager

title: Cold Caller / SDR for AI Receptionist Sales
description:

title: Squarespace SEO Specialist
description:
Job Title: Squarespace SEO Specialist



Overview:

I’m hiring someone who knows how to make a Squarespace site rank and convert. Not surface-level SEO. I need someone who understands strategy, execution, and how to turn traffic into actual results for my clients. 



Responsibilities:

• Optimize a Squarespace website for on-page SEO (titles, meta descriptions, structure)

• Conduct keyword research aligned with business goals

• Improve site structure, internal linking, and user experience

• Identify and fix SEO issues specific to Squarespace

• Track performance and adjust strategy based on data

• Provide clear recommendations to improve rankings and conversions



Requirements:

• Proven experience with SEO on Squarespace (not just WordPress)

• Strong understanding of keyword strategy, on-page SEO, and technical basics

• Ability to audit a site and clearly explain what needs to change

• Familiarity with tools like Google Search Console and analytics platforms

• Experience improving rankings, traffic, and conversions



What I’m Looking For:

• Someone who focuses on results, not just reports

• Can take ownership and execute without constant direction

• Understands both SEO and user behavior

• Communicates clearly and works efficiently



To Apply:

Send the following: SUBJECT LINE MUST BE - SALTWATER SEO



Examples of Squarespace sites you’ve optimized

Results you’ve achieved (rankings, traffic, conversions)

Your SEO process in brief

Your availability and timezone



If you only know basic SEO or rely on generic checklists, this isn’t the role. I’m looking for someone who can actually move the needle for my clients.

title: Talent Acquisition Specialist (Recruiter)
description:
Location: Fully Remote (Philippines)

Schedule: Graveyard Shift (Start time between 6:00 PM - 8:00 PM PH Time)

Employment Type: Full-Time



Role Overview

We are looking for a charismatic, high-energy Talent Acquisition Specialist to join our recruitment team. This is not a "behind-the-scenes" administrative role; you will be the face and voice of our company.

The ideal candidate possesses a pleasing personality—someone who is naturally approachable, professional, and persuasive. Your primary mission is to meet with potential candidates daily, accurately assess their English language capabilities, and lead inspiring information sessions that make people excited to join our team.



Key Responsibilities

1. Language Proficiency Assessment

- Conduct live verbal and written English assessments for applicants.

- Utilize your ESL background to evaluate grammar, pronunciation, fluency, and comprehension.

-Provide detailed feedback and scoring to determine if a candidate meets our communication standards.

2. Dynamic Information Sessions

- Lead daily group and individual information sessions (virtual or in-person).

- Present the company’s vision, culture, and benefits in a way that is engaging and infectious.

- Act as a "Brand Ambassador," converting hesitant applicants into enthusiastic new hires through persuasive communication.

3. Candidate Relationship Management

- Maintain a warm and welcoming presence in all candidate interactions to ensure a "best-in-class" candidate experience.

- Serve as the primary point of contact for candidates throughout the early stages of the hiring funnel.

- Follow up with high-potential talent to encourage them to complete the onboarding process.

4. Collaborative Recruitment

- Partner with hiring managers to refine language requirements for different roles.

- Report on candidate pipelines and conversion rates from information sessions.



Required Qualifications & Skills

The "Spark": A naturally pleasing, friendly, and professional personality. You should be someone people feel comfortable talking to immediately.

ESL Expertise: Previous experience in ESL teaching, tutoring, or English proficiency testing (e.g., IELTS, TOEFL, or CEFR standards).

Public Speaking: Excellent presentation skills with the ability to "command a room" (or a Zoom call) and keep an audience engaged.

Linguistic Mastery: Near-native English proficiency is a must. You must be able to spot subtle nuances in language use.

Empathy & Patience: The ability to put candidates at ease, especially those who may be nervous about their language assessment.

Sales Mindset: A background in recruitment or sales is a plus, as you will need to "sell" the career opportunity to top talent.



Why Join Us?

This is a unique opportunity to combine your love for the English language with a fast-paced career in talent acquisition. You will have a direct impact on the quality and culture of our growing team while interacting with diverse individuals every single day.



Interested applicants may apply by completing the Google Form at the link below:

title: E-commerce Assistant Store Manager
description:
We operate three profitable E-commerce stores and are currently launching our fourth. As we continue to scale, we’re looking for a highly experienced E-commerce Assistant Store Manager to handle day-to-day operations, support customers across multiple channels, and help keep our systems running smoothly.



This is a senior-level role with long-term potential for the right candidate. Please read the full job description and answer all questions for your application to be considered.



IMPORTANT: Please read the entire job description and follow the application instructions carefully to be considered.



Responsibilities

• Manage customer inquiries via phone,
, and chat with professionalism and accuracy.

• Handle RFQs, returns/exchanges, complaints, disputes, and negative reviews.

• Collect and maintain positive customer reviews and overall satisfaction.

• Support sales-related tasks and assist in improving store performance.

• Collaborate with the CS, Orders, and Product teams to share insights and ensure a consistent customer experience.

• Identify process gaps, recommend improvements, and contribute to SOP updates.

• Perform daily administrative tasks, including EOS reports and operational updates.

• Proactively manage assigned tasks without waiting for instructions.



What You Need to Succeed -



Required Experience:

• 2+ years in E-commerce operations (customer service + order management + product management).

• Proven Shopify experience (listings, inventory, bulk updates, app usage).

• Strong phone communication skills and ability to handle challenging conversations calmly.

• Ability to manage multiple priorities in a fast-paced environment.

• Strong attention to detail (include the word mushroom in your application).



Technical Requirements:

• Proficiency in Shopify, ClickUp, Airtable, CRM tools, and Google Workspace.

• Reliable computer + 20 Mbps+ internet.

• Backup solutions for both power and internet outages.



Work Style:

• Self-directed - you take initiative and solve problems independently.

• Detail-oriented with a focus on accuracy.

• Customer-focused - complaints are opportunities to improve systems.

• Process-minded - you document and refine workflows naturally.



Work Schedule:

• Full-time, 40 hours/week

• US business hours: 9 PM–6 AM or 10 PM–7 AM PHT

• 1-hour break

• Five days per week



You're NOT a Fit If:

• You need micromanagement or detailed daily task lists

• You can't work 9 PM–7 AM PHT consistently

• You experience frequent power/internet outages without backup solutions

• You view this as temporary income between other opportunities



Before You Apply - Please Confirm:

• Weekly payments for the first 4 weeks (starting from week 3), then bi-monthly every other Tuesday.

• Full-time role, US hours.

• Must be open to a two-month trial period.

• Daily End of Shift (EOS) report answering:

a) What did you do today? (detailed description)

b) What issues did you run into?

c) Anything you need help with?

If you agree to all terms, write “I AGREE TO ALL TERMS” and answer the questions below.



Application Instructions (Follow Exactly) -



Subject Line:

[Your First Name] – I Am Your New E-commerce Assistant Store Manager

Example: Kevin – I Am Your New E-commerce Assistant Store Manager



Submit:

• Cover letter (focused on relevant e-commerce experience)

• Resume



Answer These Questions (Complete Sentences Required):

1. Describe your most relevant e-commerce operations experience (platforms used, team size, order volume, responsibilities).

2. What specific Shopify tasks have you performed?

3. What are your current work commitments and availability?

4. Provide your internet speed (include screenshot), computer specifications, and backup solutions for power & internet issues.

5. Provide one example of a difficult customer situation you handled and how you resolved it.

6. Why are you interested in this specific role instead of other VA positions?



Important: AI-generated or template responses will be immediately disqualified. We're looking for thoughtful, specific answers that demonstrate you read and understood this posting.
