title: Controller
description:
**PLEASE CAREFULLY READ ALL THE DETAILS BEFORE APPLYING***



JOB TITLE: Controller

Work Type: Remote/WFH, Full-time

Rate: TBD

Duration: This is for a long-term hire (3–5+ years minimum) to ensure stability and avoid turnover.

Working Hours : Central Time

Start Date: Target start date is early MAY



NOTE:



--> This role will begin as an Assistant Controller, with the opportunity for promotion to Controller if everything goes well.

--> This is an assistant role, not the main Controller position. The focus is more on providing support rather than leading or owning the full Controller function.

--> Client Interview Stage:

           There will be a live Excel skills test.

           There will be a business overview ? candidate reiterates to confirm comprehension.



JOB OVERVIEW:



The Controller will manage all fund, corporate, and property-level accounting and reporting across the client's real estate investment platform. This role oversees cash management, capital activity, investor operations, financial reporting, audit/tax support, and coordination with fund administrators and property managers. The ideal candidate is organized, detail-oriented, and comfortable operating in a fast-paced, multi-entity private equity environment.



JOB ROLE & RESPONSIBILITIES:



Treasury & Cash Management



Maintain LOC, draw, and cash activity trackers; process transfers, wires, and invoice payments.

Complete bank reconciliations, classify cash activity, and monitor liquidity.

Manage distributions, NACHA uploads in KeyBank, and quarterly cash-flow analysis.



Fund & Investor Accounting



Maintain investor records in Juniper Square; process sub docs, capital calls, rebalancing, and distributions.

Enter capital, GAV/NAV, and asset data into Juniper Square; create new entities as needed.

Prepare capital call amounts, distribution analysis, and quarterly reporting support.



Financial Reporting



Review monthly property financials and capital activity.

Prepare HEP Manager and selected SPV financials; compare actuals to forecasts.

Support quarterly fund reporting, PCAP reviews, and coordination with fund administrators.



Audit & Tax Support



Provide PBCs, schedules, valuation support, and respond to auditor requests.

Assist with annual tax workpapers, K-1 review/distribution, 1099 processing, and municipal/state filings.



Entity Administration



Maintain annual state filings, insurance renewals, and corporate compliance.

Manage intercompany billing, legal invoice approvals, and post-closing S&U/proration tracking.



Systems & Process Management



Work extensively in Juniper Square, QuickBooks, KeyBank, and Yardi.

Implement best practices with fund admins and improve internal workflows.



JOB REQUIREMENTS:



Qualifications:



Bachelor’s in Accounting or Finance; CPA preferred.

Ideally with 5–10+ years in real estate private equity, fund accounting, or property accounting. (can consider 3–4 years of experience, as long as you have the right experience)

Strong Excel and systems skills.

Excellent communication, organization, and deadline management.

Must have Private Equity Real Estate (PERE) experience.

Familiarity with complex fund structures.

Capable of and willing to commit to a long-term engagement (minimum of 3–5+ years) to ensure stability and minimize turnover.



Why Work with us?



We are committed to supporting our consultants and creating an environment where people can grow and succeed.



We uphold our core values:



EXTRA MILE: We do more than what’s expected of us.

RELIABLE: We do what we say we’ll do. No follow-ups are needed.

TEAM PLAYER: We collaborate with each other to achieve our goals.

GENUINE CARE: We do what we do because we want to, not because we have to.

HUNGRY TO LEARN: We strive to be better every day.

title: AI-Savvy Virtual Assistant / Digital Operations Assistant
description:
We are looking for a highly organized, detail-oriented Virtual Assistant to help with daily business, digital, research, and operational tasks.



This role is perfect for someone who is fast, reliable, smart with online tools, and able to follow instructions exactly while also thinking independently when needed.



The ideal candidate should have strong experience in online research, digital tools, AI tools, task management platforms, social media support, purchasing tasks, and general admin operations.



Main Responsibilities



You will help with different types of manual and digital tasks, including:



1. Online Research & Digital Searching

Research products, services, suppliers, tools, software, companies, competitors, influencers, and trends.

Compare prices, features, reviews, and options.

Find the best solutions based on clear instructions.

Collect and organize information in Google Sheets, Notion, Airtable, or other tools.

Summarize research clearly and provide useful recommendations.

2. AI Tools & Automation Support

Use tools like ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Perplexity, Midjourney, Canva AI, Notion AI, and other AI platforms.

Help generate ideas, summaries, documents, captions, product research, and reports using AI.

Follow AI prompts and improve results through clear instructions.

Test tools and workflows when needed.

Help organize AI-generated outputs into clean formats.

3. Social Media & Content Support

Help with social media research, posting, scheduling, and organizing content.

Find trends, viral ideas, creators, competitors, hooks, and content examples.

Prepare captions, hashtags, content ideas, and simple content plans.

Support with Instagram, TikTok, LinkedIn,
, YouTube, and other platforms.

Organize content assets, files, links, and references.

4. Purchasing & Online Tasks

Search for products or services online.

Compare suppliers, delivery options, prices, and quality.

Help with buying items, tracking orders, organizing receipts, and following up.

Find the best option based on budget, quality, and delivery time.

Keep clear records of purchases and updates.

5. Admin & Operations

Manage simple daily tasks and follow-ups.

Organize documents, folders, links, files, and information.

Update spreadsheets, CRMs, project boards, and internal systems.

Follow SOPs, checklists, and instructions accurately.

Communicate progress clearly and on time.

Required Skills



The right candidate must have:



Strong experience as a Virtual Assistant, Executive Assistant, Operations Assistant, or similar role.

Excellent internet research skills.

Good understanding of AI tools and how to use them effectively.

Good knowledge of Google Workspace: Google Docs, Sheets, Drive, Gmail, Calendar.

Experience with management tools such as Notion, Trello, ClickUp, Asana, Monday, Airtable, or similar.

Good understanding of social media platforms.

Ability to follow instructions exactly.

Strong attention to detail.

Fast learning ability.

Good written English.

Clear communication and daily updates.

Ability to work independently without needing constant supervision.

Nice to Have



These are not mandatory, but they are a plus:



Experience with Canva.

Experience with ChatGPT prompting.

Experience with n8n, Zapier, Make, or automation tools.

Experience with e-commerce, product sourcing, or online buying.

Experience with influencer research.

Experience with basic content creation or video editing.

Experience with CRM tools.

Experience working with agencies, founders, or startups.

Who This Role Is For



This role is for someone who:



Loves solving problems.

Is very good at searching online.

Can take a task and complete it properly.

Is comfortable using AI every day.

Can learn new tools quickly.

Can follow instructions without missing small details.

Is honest, organized, and reliable.

Can give clear updates without being chased.

Who This Role Is NOT For



Please do not apply if:



You do not like using digital tools.

You are not comfortable with AI tools.

You need constant supervision for every small step.

You often miss details.

You are not responsive.

You cannot organize information clearly.

You are not serious about long-term work.

Work Details



Position: Virtual Assistant / Digital Operations Assistant

Type: Remote

Schedule: Part-time or full-time depending on experience

Working hours: Flexible, but must be available for daily communication

Start date: As soon as possible

Payment: Based on experience and skill level



What We Expect



We are looking for someone who can become a reliable right hand for digital and operational tasks.



You should be able to receive a task like:



“Find the best AI tools for this use case, compare pricing, summarize the top 5, and recommend the best one.”



And return a clean, organized result with links, notes, pros, cons, and a clear recommendation.



You should also be comfortable with tasks like:



“Research 20 content ideas from competitors and organize them into a Google Sheet.”



Or:



“Find the best supplier for this product, compare options, and prepare the purchase details.”



How to Apply



Please send:



Your CV or short work experience summary.

A short introduction about yourself.

The AI tools you already use.

The management tools you have experience with.

Examples of research, admin, social media, or VA tasks you have done before.

Your expected monthly or hourly rate.

Your availability and time zone.

title: Regional Manager for a Residential Cleaning Company
description:
We do not monitor messages or applications here. If you are interested in this opportunity, please apply at the link below!



Are you a leader with a proven track record of leading teams, handling escalations with tact and professionalism, and driving operational success? We’d love to hear from you. Apply today to join Serenity Clean and become a key leader in shaping the future of our operations!



Apply Here: 
/application-regional-manager



Job Title: Regional Manager

Location: Remote

Starting Pay: $7/hour

Department: Operations

Reports to: CEO of the Company



Position Overview:

Serenity Clean is seeking a highly motivated and experienced Regional Manager to lead and manage a dynamic team of Area Managers across multiple locations. This role is crucial for ensuring smooth operations, driving performance excellence, and delivering exceptional service to our clients. The Regional Manager will be responsible for overseeing the entire Area Management team, ensuring that each tea
mber aligns with the company's core values, and maintaining consistent operational standards across all areas. You will handle escalations, ensure the resolution of complex issues, and be accountable for the success of the regions under your management.



Key Responsibilities:

Leadership & Team Management:

>Lead, mentor, and hold Area Managers accountable for their performance across multiple regions.

>Foster a collaborative culture based on Serenity Clean’s core values and ensure alignment with company goals.

Escalation Management:

>Handle escalated client issues and operational challenges, ensuring prompt resolution and preventing recurrence.

>Provide support to Area Managers in resolving complex situations to maintain client satisfaction.

Performance Oversight:

>Monitor and ensure that all regions meet key performance metrics, including client satisfaction, efficiency, and profitability.

>Conduct regular reviews of Area Managers to track progress and provide feedback.

Training & Development:

>Oversee training programs and ensure Area Managers are equipped to lead their teams effectively.

>Foster career growth and succession planning for Area Managers.

Client Success:

>Ensure high-quality service delivery and maintain strong, long-term client relationships across all regions.

>Address potential client issues proactively to ensure ongoing satisfaction.

Reporting & Accountability:

>Provide regular performance reports to senior leadership, ensuring transparency and accountability across regions.

>Take full responsibility for regional success and ensure goals are met.

Process Improvement:

>Continuously improve operations, identifying opportunities for increased efficiency and service consistency.

Crisis Management:

>Resolve crises swiftly and decisively, maintaining service continuity and client trust.



Qualifications:

Experience:

>Minimum of 5 years in leadership roles, with at least 3 years of experience managing Area Managers or multi-location teams.

>Strong experience in Client Success, with a track record of managing escalations and improving customer satisfaction across regions.

>Proven ability to manage complex operations, including resolving client complaints and operational challenges.



Skills:

>Exceptional leadership and team management skills, with the ability to inspire and motivate a diverse team.

>Strong problem-solving skills and the ability to make decisions under pressure.

>Excellent communication and interpersonal skills, with the ability to build relationships at all levels of the organization.

>Proven ability to manage multiple regions simultaneously while driving accountability and performance.

>Strong analytical skills, with the ability to track and report on performance metrics and KPIs.



Attributes:

>Strong sense of responsibility and accountability, with a focus on delivering results.

>Ability to manage and resolve escalations calmly and effectively.

>Highly organized and detail-oriented, with the ability to prioritize competing tasks and demands.

>A solutions-oriented mindset, always looking for ways to improve operations and service delivery.

>Alignment with Serenity Clean’s core values and a passion for creating a positive impact on the team and clients.



What We Offer:

>A competitive salary with performance-based incentives.

>Unlimited Paid Time Off (PTO) after 90 days of full employment.

>Opportunities for professional development and career advancement.

>A collaborative and positive work environment that values personal growth and team success.

>The chance to make a significant impact in a rapidly growing company.



If you have a proven track record of leading teams, handling escalations with tact and professionalism, and driving operational success, we’d love to hear from you. Apply today to join Serenity Clean and become a key leader in shaping the future of our operations!



Apply Here: 
/application-regional-manager

title: Roblox Codes Verifier - 2 Month Fixed-term Gig
description:
About us:



We run one of the largest Roblox content websites. Our biggest section is our game codes directory, and we need a reliable person to keep it accurate and up-to-date.



Job details:



- 30 hours/week minimum (6 hours/day × 5 days, flexible hours, work whenever suits you)

- 2-month gig to start, with strong potential to convert to long-term part-time for the right person

- $10/hr USD

- Remote, anywhere with good English



What you'll be doing:



You'll work from a custom dashboard (the "CUN") that automatically detects new 
 codes from
, 
, etc and creates alerts for you to review. Your job is to verify each one. For every alert, you'll:



1. Open the relevant Roblox game

2. Test the code to confirm it works

3. Lightly edit the auto-generated description if needed (clear, well-written English)

4. Approve it (or reject it if invalid).



You'll handle 100+ codes/day, so this is a high-volume role where efficiency matters. The work runs in daily batches. No need to be always-on or respond to alerts in real time.



You'll have full authority to approve or reject codes yourself. For edge cases, you are expected to communicate with the team to work out the best way to handle these. We'll figure out the right call together.



What we need from you:



- Roblox familiarity: you don't need to know every game, but you should be comfortable with the platform, navigating games, and redeeming codes

- Strong written English: you'll be lightly editing code descriptions, so your English needs to be clean and natural

- Gaming-capable PC: Roblox needs to run smoothly for you to test codes efficiently. A laggy machine will make this job miserable

- Stable, fast internet: you'll be loading games all day

- Comfortable with computers: keyboard shortcuts, copy/paste, switching between tabs/games quickly. We shouldn't need to explain the basics

- Good judgment and attention to detail: wrong codes ending up on the site is the worst-case outcome we're trying to avoid

- Reliability: hitting your 30 hours and showing up consistently matters more than working specific hours



Nice to have:



- An established Roblox account with playtime history (preferred but not required)



Tools and reimbursements:



- We'll communicate via Slack with occasional video calls

- If a game ever requires Robux to test a code, we'll reimburse you, never spend your own money on this



Why this is worth applying for:



This starts as a 2-month gig, but we're explicitly looking for someone we can keep on long-term as a part-time role. If the initial contract goes well, this becomes a stable, ongoing position. You'll be working directly with me and a small remote team on one of the biggest Roblox websites in the world.



Please answer the following questions in your cover letter:



1. Describe your computer specs and your internet speed (run a speedtest.net test and paste the result)

2. What hours of the day do you usually work? (Just so we know your timezone/availability)

3. In one short paragraph, why do you think you'd be good at this role?

4. What's your favourite Roblox game?

5. Have you ever claimed codes in Roblox games, and if so, what's a code you remember claiming?

title: Procurement & Bid Writing Virtual Assistant — UK Construction Main Contractor
description:
About us

Buildtonic is a UK main contractor delivering commercial and residential projects: fit-out, conversion, new build, refurbishment, and renovation. We are growing our procurement and bid-writing capability and looking for a sharp, organised VA to own the day-to-day of finding, qualifying and drafting responses to UK construction tenders on Constructionline.

The role

This is not a generic admin role. You will become the operational owner of our procurement and bid-writing pipeline, working directly with the company director. You will:

• Search Constructionline daily for tender opportunities matching our criteria, qualify them against a checklist, and log them into our Notion pipeline database.

• Draft answers to UK Pre-Qualification Questionnaires (PQQs) using a bid library and Claude, then submit to the director for review.

• Maintain our bid library — keeping insurances, accreditations, policies, case studies and standard answers current and well organised.

• Track submission deadlines, manage clarification questions, and chase post-submission feedback.

• Provide light supporting admin: enquiry triage into our Notion pipeline, scheduling, document formatting.

Hours and rate

• 40 hours per week, ongoing engagement.

• Working hours: flexible, but at least 4 hours per day must overlap with UK 8am–6pm (midnight to 6am Manila time will not work).

• Rate: $5–$7/hr depending on experience, paid weekly via Wise or Payoneer.

• Initial 90-day trial period at agreed rate, then a permanent rolling engagement.

You are a strong fit if

• Your written English is excellent — not just functional, but clear, careful, and capable of formal business writing.

• You have 2+ years of remote work experience for UK, US, or AU clients.

• You are comfortable working independently with daily check-ins.

• You are comfortable learning a domain (UK construction procurement) — you don't need to know it on day one, but you must be able to learn it fast.

• You are diligent, detail-oriented, and treat deadlines as sacred.

• You are comfortable using AI tools (Claude or ChatGPT) as part of your workflow.

Bonus, not required

• Prior experience working with a UK construction, surveying, architecture or engineering firm.

• Experience with Notion, Slack, Microsoft 365, and AI-assisted workflows.

• Experience drafting bids, proposals, or formal business documents in English.

Tools you will use

• Notion (project pipeline and bid library)

• Slack (daily comms with the director)

• Microsoft 365 / Google Workspace 
, files, calendar)

• Claude Pro or Teams (AI drafting and review)

• Constructionline (tender search and submission portal)

• Hubstaff or Time Doctor (time tracking with screenshots — required)

title: Virtual Assistant – Shop Performance & Reporting (Auto Repair)
description:
About Us

We are a growing multi-location auto repair company focused on high-quality work, strong systems, and consistent performance across every shop. We use systems like Tekmetric to track operations and are building a team that helps us stay organized and accountable.



Role Overview

We are hiring a Virtual Assistant to review daily shop performance and report on what is happening across our locations. No experience with Tekmetric is required. We will train you. This role is focused on reviewing data, identifying patterns, and communicating insights clearly. You are not responsible for making decisions, only for reporting what you see.



Responsibilities

Review daily performance for multiple shop locations

Track key numbers such as car count, sales, and average repair order

Identify unusual changes in performance, both positive and negative

Flag missed opportunities such as declined work

Review notes for clarity and completeness

Track trends over time on a daily and weekly basis

Submit a clear daily report summarizing findings



What You Will Be Looking At

Car count, which is how many vehicles came in

Average repair order, which is the average value per vehicle

Declined work, which is potential revenue not approved

Productivity, which reflects how efficiently work is completed



What We Are Looking For

Strong attention to detail

Ability to spot patterns and inconsistencies

Clear written communication

Comfortable working with numbers and reports

Organized and consistent with daily tasks

Coachable and open to feedback



What This Role Is Not

This role does not involve managing employees

This role does not involve making business decisions

This role is not responsible for fixing problems

The responsibility is to observe, analyze, and report clearly

title: Grant Writer + Executive Assistant (Remote | Full-Time)
description:
L’EVATE Inc. is hiring on behalf of our client for a highly organized, proactive, and

resourceful Grant Writer + Executive Assistant to support senior leadership while helping

secure Canadian grants and funding opportunities.



Our client is a fast-growing technology company in the retail and payments space, helping

businesses streamline operations through modern POS systems, payment solutions, and

business technology services. They work closely with businesses across Canada to

improve efficiency, customer experience, and day-to-day operations through smart,

scalable solutions.



This role is a hybrid of grant writing, business research, and executive support for the CEO

and COO. You will play a key role in identifying funding opportunities, preparing grant

applications, managing deadlines, and helping leadership stay organized and focused on

growth.

We are looking for someone who is sharp, detail-oriented, and highly dependable—

someone who takes ownership, thinks ahead, and knows how to use tools like ChatGPT

and automation platforms to work smarter and faster.



What You’ll Be Responsible For

Grant Writing + Funding Research

• Research Canadian grants, government funding programs, and business incentive

opportunities

• Identify grants relevant to the company’s operations and future growth plans

• Prepare grant applications, proposals, and supporting documentation

• Track deadlines, reporting requirements, and follow-up actions

• Maintain a clear pipeline of active and upcoming funding opportunities

• Work closely with leadership to gather information needed for submissions

Executive Assistant Support

• Manage calendars, meetings, scheduling, and follow-ups for the CEO and COO

• Organize reports, presentations, files, and internal business documents

• Assist with inbox management and communication coordination



• Handle business research and special projects

• Support internal operations and help improve workflows

• Use AI tools and automation to improve efficiency and reduce manual work

• Provide day-to-day executive support and task management



What We’re Looking For

• Previous experience in grant writing, proposal writing, or funding applications

• Strong executive assistant or administrative support experience

• Excellent written and verbal English communication

• Strong research, organization, and time management skills

• High attention to detail and ability to manage deadlines

• Strong proficiency in Microsoft Office (Word, Excel, PowerPoint, Outlook)

• Comfortable using ChatGPT and AI tools to improve productivity

• Strong problem-solving ability and independent thinking

• Familiarity with Canadian grants is a strong advantage

• Experience with workflow automation tools is a plus



The Ideal Candidate

• Highly proactive and self-managed

• Professional, dependable, and trustworthy

• Strong sense of ownership and accountability

• Able to prioritize and manage multiple moving parts

• Thinks ahead and solves problems before they happen

• Always looking for better systems and smarter ways to work



Position Details

• Remote

• Full-Time

• Monday to Friday 9am to 5pm EST



How To Apply

Please send:

1. Your resume

2. A short introduction about your experience with grant writing and executive support

3. Examples of grants, proposals, or similar work you’ve completed (if available)



Subject Line: Grant Writer + Executive Assistant – [Your Name]

We are looking for someone exceptional who wants to grow long-term with a fast-moving

business and make a real impact.

title: Full-Time Operations Manager (Short-Term and Mid-Term Rentals)
description:
Location: Remote (PH preferred)

Schedule: Full-time with coverage across 8am–10pm ET (rotating), on-call escalation as needed

Tools: Guesty, QuickBooks Online, ClickUp, Google Workspace



Mission

Own daily operations and lead the remote ops team to deliver zero missed cleans, <10-minute guest replies, and >98% turnover pass rate while keeping owners informed and delighted.



Leadership Scope

Directly manage: Ops Associate/Guest Experience Associates (as hired), cleaners/vendors, and Field QA (local, PT).

Partner closely with Systems Manager on PMS automations and reporting.



Core Responsibilities

Guest Operations: Monitor inbox SLAs; resolve issues; coach team on tone and macros; handle escalations calmly.

Turnovers & QC: Ensure cleans are assigned at booking; T-48/T-12 confirmations; enforce photo-proof and re-clean workflows; coordinate Field QA spot checks.

Vendor Management: Recruit/scorecard cleaners and handymen; negotiate rates; maintain surge coverage for events; enforce SOP compliance.

Maintenance & I
: Create/track work orders; dispatch techs; manage smart lock access; drive fast MTTR.

PMS & Automations (Guesty): Maintain tasks, tags, pipelines, templates; keep calendars/data pristine; collaborate on pricing rule execution.

ClickUp Ops Hub: Maintain boards, SLAs, and risk logs; run daily standup and end-of-day audit; close loops.

Reporting & Owner Updates: Publish daily ops digest; weekly KPI scorecard (SLAs, turnover pass/re-clean %, i
); contribute to monthly owner reports.

SOPs & Training: Build and iterate SOPs; onboard/train new ops staff; lead post-i
 reviews and improvements.



Required Experience (Must-Haves)

2+ years leading STR operations for a property manager or co-host (multi-unit portfolio required).

Deep hands-on with Guesty (or Hostfully/OwnerRez) inbox, automations, tasks, and calendar hygiene.

Proven track record coordinating cleaners/vendors with photo-based QC and re-clean workflows.

Strong written English; guest-centric communication; stakeholder management with owners.

Process discipline: checklists, deadlines, evidence-based task closure; comfortable with metrics.

Proficient in ClickUp (or Asana/Monday) and Google Sheets dashboards.



Nice-to-Haves

Smart locks (Yale/Schlage/August), noise monitoring (Minut/NoiseAware), and basic PriceLabs competence.

Built on-call schedules and i
 playbooks; experience with compliance/permits.

Familiarity with owner statements and clean ops ? QuickBooks Online handoff.



Hiring Process & Work Sample

30-min interview

90-min paid simulation (inbox triage, assign turnovers, write owner update, create daily digest)

References.



How to Apply

Apply here:

title: Video Editor & 3D Motion Designer (Faceless Documentaries)
description:
The Project

Lead post-production for a high-end YouTube channel producing one 12-minute investigative business documentary per week. We provide the script (Gemini), voiceover (ElevenLabs), and key visual assets (Midjourney).



Your Role

• Assembly: Sync ElevenLabs voiceovers with Gemini-generated scripts and visual instructions.

• 3D Enhancement: Transform Midjourney assets and "Business Autopsy" data into 3D environments and structural models.

• Motion Design: Use Mogrts for efficiency, but create custom 3D/2D animations for complex data visualizations.

• Polishing: Finalize atmospheric sound design and cinematic pacing to ensure a premium documentary feel.

• Hybrid Template Use: Proficiency in customizing Mogrts so they blend seamlessly with custom 3D elements without appearing generic.



Requirements

• Software Mastery: Adobe Premiere Pro, After Effects, and Cinema 4D (or Blender).

• AI Integration: Experience working with AI-generated assets (Midjourney, ElevenLabs).

• Efficiency: Ability to follow detailed visual instructions while maintaining a strict 1-video-per-week schedule.

• Experience: 4+ years in professional video editing and 3D motion design.

• Asset Compositing: Expertise in "cleaning" and color-grading Midjourney assets to ensure a uniform visual style throughout the 12-minute video.

• Sound Design: Skill in layering atmospheric audio to support the serious, investigative tone of the video.

• Rhythmic Pacing: Skill in timing visual cuts precisely to the cadence of ElevenLabs voiceovers.

• 3D Scene Projection: Ability to transform static Midjourney images into 3D environments or "parallax" scenes.

• Structural Modeling: Skill in building 3D models (using Cinema 4D or Blender) to visualize complex business infrastructure or data.

• Camera Animation: Mastering virtual camera movements within After Effects to create a cinematic documentary feel.

title: Tekmetric Auditor (Multi-Location Auto Repair Group)
description:
Position Overview

The Tekmetric Auditor is responsible for monitoring, auditing, and reporting on shop performance across all locations. This role ensures accuracy, accountability, and profitability by identifying inconsistencies, missed revenue opportunities, and operational issues within Tekmetric.

This is a detail-driven role focused on data integrity, financial performance, and operational discipline across the company.



*Core Responsibilities*

Reporting & Cadence

Maintain daily reporting visibility across all locations

Compile and deliver weekly L10 performance numbers

Prepare monthly executive-level performance reports

Ensure all data pulled from Tekmetric is accurate and consistent



Weekly Audits (All Locations) Audit each shop for the following:

Repair Order Integrity

Review deleted repair orders

Identify and flag zeroed-out repair orders

Audit saved estimates (unapproved work / LOP)



Profitability Checks

Review gross profit per repair order

Flag low-margin or inconsistent tickets

Monitor discount usage and patterns



Parts & Inventory Control

Track parts returns

Identify unusual or excessive return behavior



Operational Efficiency

Monitor vehicles with extended stays

Flag workflow bottlenecks and delays



Service Consistency

Audit diagnostic charges per RO

Ensure diag time is being billed consistently





Customer Data Quality Control

Ensure every RO meets company standards:

Customer name is complete and correct

Customer phone number is valid

Lead/source tracking is properly filled out



Key Performance Indicators (What Success Looks Like)

Reduction in deleted or zeroed ROs

Increased captured revenue from previously missed work

Improved gross profit consistency across locations

Reduction in parts return issues

Improved data accuracy in customer profiles

Faster identification of shop-level issues



Skills & Requirements

Experience with Tekmetric (preferred)

Strong understanding of:

Repair orders

Shop workflow

Auto repair operations

High attention to detail

Ability to identify patterns, inconsistencies, and red flags

Strong organizational and reporting skills

Comfortable holding managers accountable through data



Role Expectations - This role is not passive reporting

This person is expected to:

Spot problems early

Call out inconsistencies

Bring clear findings, not just data



Think of this role as:

???? “If money is leaking, they find it”

???? “If a process is broken, they expose it”

title: OPERATIONS ASSISTANT / COORDINATOR (INSURANCE AGENCY | RIGHT-HAND ROLE | )
description:
ABOUT US



We are a fast-growing life insurance agency focused on helping families and developing agents into leaders. We are looking for someone who can become a true RIGHT HAND to the agency owner. This is not a basic VA role. This is an operations role for someone who wants to grow with a business and eventually move into a full-time position.





*ROLE OVERVIEW*

Your job is to keep the business organized, accurate, and moving forward.



That means:

-> Nothing falls through the cracks

-> Systems stay clean and updated

-> Problems are caught early and handled



If you prefer waiting to be told what to do, this role is not a fit.



You are not expected to know everything on day one. We value problem-solving, communication, and ownership more than perfection.





*WHAT YOU’LL BE RESPONSIBLE FOR*



FINANCIAL / COMMISSION TRACKING

-> Reconcile business written vs commissions received

-> Track discrepancies and chargebacks

-> Monitor overrides and production

-> Flag issues proactively



POLICY & CLIENT OPERATIONS

-> Track all submitted applications

-> Check carrier portals for updates

-> Follow up with clients for missing requirements

-> Ensure policies move from submission to issue



AGENT SUPPORT

-> Track agents through recruiting and onboarding

-> Follow up on contracting, licensing, and production

-> Help maintain accountability systems



SYSTEMS & PROCESS MANAGEMENT

-> Maintain Notion (clients, agents, tasks)

-> Improve workflows and systems

-> Build and refine SOPs



COMMUNICATION & FOLLOW-UP

-> Support inbox management

-> Follow up with clients and agents

-> Keep communication clear and timely





*WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR*

-> Extremely detail-oriented (with real examples)

-> Highly proactive (you take action without being told)

-> Strong organizational and systems thinking

-> Comfortable working with numbers

-> Strong written communication

-> Able to manage multiple priorities without losing track





*STRONG PLUS (NOT REQUIRED)*

-> Accounting or bookkeeping experience

-> Insurance or financial services experience

-> Experience building SOPs or workflows

-> Experience with Notion or CRMs





*WHAT SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE (FIRST 90 DAYS)*

-> Inbox is handled without constant direction

-> Policies are tracked with no missed follow-ups

-> Notion is accurate and up to date

-> Commission tracking is clean and reliable

-> You identify and fix inefficiencies proactively





*WORK DETAILS*

-> Starting at least 15–20 hours per week

-> Hours will increase as the business grows

-> Opportunity to move into a full-time role

-> Must have overlap with Eastern Standard Time (EST)

-> Daily communication via WhatsApp

-> Daily end-of-day updates required





*COMPENSATION*

-> Starting at $6/hour

-> Increase to $7/hour after 90 days (based on performance)

-> Generous quarterly performance bonuses based on KPIs

-> Opportunity for increased pay and responsibility over time  (we want you to grow as we grow)





*VIDEO INCLUDEDED IN APPLICATION (STRONGLY PREFERRED)*

To stand out, submit a short video (2–4 minutes) answering:



-> Your background and experience

-> A time you identified a problem and fixed it without being told

-> How you stay organized managing multiple tasks

-> Why this role specifically interests you



Include the video link in your application.







*ATTENTION TO DETAIL CHECK*

At the top of your application, include this exact phrase: "I take ownership." Applications without this will not be considered.





*FINAL NOTE*

We are a company who puts God first and we want to be a blessing to both the clients and agents we bring aboard. We are looking for someone long-term who wants to grow with the business. If you enjoy ownership, structure, and improving systems, this could be a great fit.

4. Brand Building & Trust

 posts

 campaigns (1–2 per week)

???? What We’re Looking For

Experience

 groups (posting + engagement)

New family inquiries (placements)

Nanny applications

Sitter applications

Community engagement

Consistent daily activity

???? Compensation & Performance Structure

Base Pay

$8–$10 USD per hour (based on experience)

Full-time or part-time options available

Performance Bonuses



This role includes performance-based incentives tied directly to results.



Lead-Based Bonuses

Bonus for every set number of qualified family inquiries

Bonus for sitter and nanny applications generated

Monthly Performance Bonus



Additional bonuses based on achieving targets such as:



Family inquiries

Membership growth

Caregiver applications



(Exact bonus structure will be discussed during onboarding and aligned with clear targets.)



Growth Opportunity



This is a long-term role with opportunity for:



increased compensation

leadership responsibilities

growth within the company



???? Application Questions (REQUIRED)

What would you post to attract high-quality families looking for a nanny?

How would you attract both sitters and nannies to join our platform?

If you needed to bring in 10 new families this week, what would you do?

How would you build trust with caregivers so they want to work with us long-term?



Final Note



This role is for someone who:



takes initiative

thinks strategically

If you are looking for a role where you are given step-by-step instructions daily, this position is not the right fit.

title: Platform, Social Media & Operations Specialist
description:
Full-Time · 40 hrs/week

$700–$900/month

9am–2pm ET overlap required

Long-Term · Growth Path

Start: Immediately



About The MTR Co

The MTR Co is the national mid-term rental platform serving military families, travel nurses, insurance-displaced residents, and corporate relocators. We manage furnished homes near major military bases and hospital systems across the US and are building the national workforce housing marketplace.



White Glove Stays is our tenant-facing hospitality brand. Every guest experience, every social post, every listing photo, and every platform interaction carries the White Glove Stays name. You are the person who makes that brand real every day.



The Role — What You Actually Do

Your role has three equally important functions: keeping all platform listings operational and optimized, running the social media presence across four platforms, and managing all operational systems that keep the business running. You are the person who makes sure everything works without the founder having to touch it.



You are organized, detail-oriented, and brand-conscious. You understand that a poorly formatted post damages the brand as much as a bad review. You respond to tenant inquiries within one hour because response time is a trust signal. You send a daily report because the founder needs to know what happened today without asking.



SOCIAL MEDIA (40% OF TIME)

LinkedIn scheduling × 3/week — take founder's drafted posts, format in Buffer with optimal timing, schedule for 7:30am or 12pm ET

TikTok upload daily — receive video from founder, add caption with market-specific hook, add hashtag set, publish immediately

Instagram Reels repurposing daily — take published TikTok, trim if needed, add Instagram caption, schedule in Buffer same day

Instagram static posts × 2/week — create market data graphics in Canva using brand templates, schedule in Buffer

 Group posting daily — post educational content in 5 landlord groups per market and 3 travel nurse housing groups

Social inbox monitoring daily — check LinkedIn, Instagram, TikTok, and
 
, flag landlord and tenant inquiries to founder within 30 minutes

Weekly social metrics — track reach, follower growth, and inbound DMs across all platforms, log in Airtable tracker



PLATFORM MANAGEMENT (35% OF TIME)

New listing creation in OwnerRez — photos, description, amenities, house rules, pricing, minimum stay, calendar for every new signed management client

Channel syndication — push listings to Furnished Finder, set up iCal sync, confirm Airbnb and VRBO connections through OwnerRez

Tenant inquiry responses — respond to all inquiries within 1 hour using approved templates, escalate non-standard requests to founder

PriceLabs monitoring — daily check for pricing anomalies, flag any listing running below market floor or above ceiling for founder review

Listing optimization — monthly review of photos, descriptions, and pricing against comps on each channel, flag underperforming listings

Monthly owner report preparation — compile OwnerRez data for each managed property into the branded report template for founder review and send



OPERATIONS AND ADMIN (25% OF TIME)

Airtable CRM maintenance — update all pipeline stages, log social metrics weekly, maintain owner database, track listing performance

Notion SOP maintenance — update process documentation weekly as systems evolve, add new market profiles and vendor contacts

Vendor coordination support — maintain cleaner and photographer contact lists per market, coordinate photography for new listings

Content calendar management — maintain 2-week forward content schedule in Notion, source market data for upcoming posts

End-of-day report — daily Slack summary to founder covering all platform activity, social metrics, tenant inquiries, and operational flags



REQUIRED

Fluent written English — clear, professional, on-brand tone

Social media management experience — scheduling, content creation

Canva experience — can work within brand templates confidently

Experience with Buffer, Later, or any social scheduling tool

Organized and detail-oriented — nothing slips, nothing is late

Responsive — tenant inquiries answered within 1 hour without prompting

Available 9am–2pm ET minimum for US timezone overlap

BONUS POINTS

OwnerRez, Guesty, Hostaway, or any PMS experience

PriceLabs, Beyond Pricing, or dynamic pricing tool experience

Furnished Finder, Airbnb, or VRBO listing management

CapCut or video editing for social media content

Knowledge of MTR, STR, or property management

Airbnb host or property manager background

SEO or blog content writing experience

title: Outreach & Lead Generation Specialist
description:
The MTR Co · White Glove Stays · Full-Time · Remote · Long-Term—40 hrs/week

$700–$900/month

9am–2pm ET overlap required

Long-Term · Growth Path

Start: Immediately



About The MTR Co

The MTR Co is the national mid-term rental platform serving military families, travel nurses, insurance-displaced residents, and corporate relocators. We manage furnished homes near major military bases and hospital systems across the US. We are building the national workforce housing marketplace — and you are joining the founding team.



This is not a temporary project. We are building something significant. The people who build it from Day 1 grow with it. The only ceiling here is the one you put there yourself.



The Role — What You Actually Do

Your job is one thing: contacts. 60–70 outreach messages per day across multiple platforms. You invite self-managing landlords to list their properties for free (75% of your time) and pitch warm leads on our management services (25% of your time).



This is a high-volume, high-discipline outreach role. You follow a clear playbook. You hit a daily target. You log everything in Airtable. You send an end-of-day report to the founder every evening. This role has a simple success metric — contacts sent and replies generated. If you love systematic work, hate micromanagement, and take pride in hitting a number every single day, this is your role.



TRACK 1 — FREE LISTING INVITES (75% OF TIME)

Furnished Finder DMs × 15/day — identify self-managing MTR listings in target markets and send listing invitations

Zillow new listing outreach × 15/day — contact LTR landlords with properties near military bases and hospital systems

 Marketplace × 10/day — find and message rental listings near demand anchors

LinkedIn DM outreach × 10/day — connect with real estate investors in target markets

BiggerPockets PM outreach × 5/day — reach investors with properties near military bases

Airbnb underperformer identification × 5/day — find poorly performing listings near anchors and skip-trace owners

TRACK 2 — MANAGEMENT PITCHES (25% OF TIME)

Warm lead management pitches × 10/day — LTR landlords and frustrated self-managers near demand anchors

Skip tracing × 5/day — use BeenVerified and BatchSkipTracing to find direct owner contact info

Vacasa and Evolve owner outreach × 3/day — identify managed properties, skip-trace owners, send management pitch

Day 5 and Day 10 follow-up sequences — send approved follow-up templates to all non-responding leads

DAILY NON-NEGOTIABLES

Log every contact in Airtable CRM immediately — platform, message sent, date, lead status

Flag every positive reply to founder via Slack within 15 minutes of receiving it

Drop Calendly booking link into every warm reply — never ask "when are you free?"

Send end-of-day Slack report by 5:30pm ET: contacts sent, replies, hot leads, calls booked

 ? Proficient in Canva (show me your work)

title: Research Analyst | Private Equity Research & AI Tools
description:
We’re looking for a detail-oriented Research Analyst to support industry research, company research, target identification, and data verification for private equity client mandates.



This role is a good fit for someone who enjoys researching companies, understanding industries, finding decision-makers, organizing accurate data, and using AI tools to work faster and smarter.



IN THIS ROLE, YOU WILL:



• Research industries and private companies that match client-specific investment criteria

• Identify and qualify target companies based on private equity client mandates

• Use research tools such as Grata, PitchBook, ZoomInfo, LinkedIn Sales Navigator, Claude, and other AI tools

• Find and verify key decision-makers, including founders, owners, CEOs, presidents, and leadership contacts

• Gather, clean, and organize company and contact data in Salesforce and internal trackers

• Use Claude and other AI tools to streamline research, automate repetitive tasks, and improve research quality

• Support founding partners with active research projects, deal tea
etings, and ad hoc data gathering tasks



YOU’LL SUCCEED IN THIS ROLE IF YOU:



• Have strong research skills and enjoy digging into company, industry, and market information

• Are detail-oriented and careful when verifying company and contact data

• Can qualify companies based on specific criteria, not just collect basic information

• Are comfortable using spreadsheets, CRM systems, and online research tools

• Have experience in business research, market research, lead research, deal sourcing, or sales intelligence

• Are curious about AI tools and open to learning automation, scripting, or “vibe coding”

• Can work independently, stay organized, and communicate research findings clearly



NICE TO HAVE:

• Experience with private equity, M&A research, investment research, or market mapping

• Familiarity with Salesforce, Grata, PitchBook, ZoomInfo, LinkedIn Sales Navigator, Apollo, or Crunchbase

• Basic exposure to Python, SQL, scripting, automation, or AI-assisted workflows



HOW TO APPLY:



Please send your resume and a short note about your experience with company research, market research, lead research, deal sourcing, CRM work, or AI tools.



If you’ve used tools like Salesforce, LinkedIn Sales Navigator, ZoomInfo, PitchBook, Grata, Claude, ChatGPT, Python, SQL, or automation tools, please mention them in your application.

title: Recruiter Success Manager — US Direct Hire Staffing Agency (Remote, PH-Based)
description:
Recruiter Success Manager US Direct Hire Staffing Agency (Remote, PH-Based) Philippines

Salary: 1,500-1,800

Schedule: Full-time, US Eastern Time business hours (8 AM – 5 PM ET)

Type: Independent Contractor



About the Role

We are a U.S.-based direct hire staffing agency placing talent across technology, healthcare, accounting, and construction sectors. We are scaling our recruiter team and hiring a Recruiter Success Manager to lead recruiter onboarding, screening, and pipeline oversight.

This is not a junior support role. We are looking for a seasoned recruiting leader who has personally managed teams of recruiters, closed direct hire deals, and can credibly represent our brand to U.S. clients in interviews and discovery calls.

You will be the first line of quality control for every recruiter we onboard and every candidate we submit. You will speak on behalf of our company in client-facing situations alongside our recruiters. Your success will be measured by team production and recruiter retention.



What You Will Do

1. Screen and Validate Incoming Recruiters

 ? Interview recruiter applicants who claim to have their own books and clients

 ? Verify their claimed placements with proof (signed agreements, references, prior fees)

 ? Run our 2-week recruiter evaluation period and score performance

 ? Recommend hire/no-hire decisions to the CEO

2. Oversee Recruiter Pipelines

 ? Review every candidate submission before it goes to a client (you authorize endorsements)

 ? Audit daily activity in our ATS (Manatal) and CRM (GoHighLevel)

 ? Catch quality issues early and coach recruiters to fix them

 ? Approve fee negotiations and MSA terms before they go out

3. Support Recruiters in Workflows and Tools

 ? Help recruiters navigate GoHighLevel pipelines, automations, and sequences

 ? Build and refine workflows for the recruiter team

 ? Troubleshoot issues or escalate to our tech team

 ? Ensure activity is logged correctly across all systems

4. Represent the Company in Client-Facing Calls

 ? Join discovery calls and pitches with new recruiters who are still ramping

 ? Step in to close deals when a recruiter needs senior support

 ? Speak on behalf of the company in client interviews and pitches

 ? Handle escalations between recruiters and clients

5. Drive Team Performance

 ? Run weekly 1:1s with each recruiter

 ? Train new recruiters during onboarding (Loom library + live sessions)

 ? Hold the team accountable to activity benchmarks

 ? Surface top performers and underperformers to the CEO



What You Must Have

Required:

 ? 7+ years in agency or BPO recruiting with U.S. clients

 ? 3+ years managing or leading a team of recruiters (5 or more direct reports)

 ? Personally closed direct hire deals must provide examples with details

 ? Native or near-native English (spoken and written)  C1 or C2 level

 ? Strong on video calls confident, professional, and clear under pressure

 ? Comfortable using ATS systems (Manatal, Bullhorn, JobAdder, Ceipal, or similar)

 ? Experience with GoHighLevel, HubSpot, or similar CRM workflow tools

 ? Stable internet connection and quiet professional workspace

 ? Available U.S. Eastern Time business hours

Preferred:

 ? Experience at firms like Manila Recruitment, John Clements, KMC Solutions, Sapient Global Services, Cielo, Cloudstaff, 
, Virtual Coworker, or similar

 ? Experience in healthcare, technology, accounting, or construction recruiting verticals

 ? Background in workflow automation (Zapier, 
, GHL automations)

 ? Prior experience screening and onboarding recruiters





What We Offer

 ? Competitive PH-leadership-tier base ($1,500-1,800 month) + uncapped override commission

 ? Full tech stack provided: Manatal, GoHighLevel, Apollo, Instantly.ai, Google Workspace

 ? Direct access to CEO and senior team

 ? Real ownership of a growing recruiter team

 ? Long-term role with growth potential as we scale

 ? 13th month bonus consideration based on performance

 ? Paid time off after 90-day evaluation period



How to Apply (Read Carefully Applications Not Following These Steps Will Be Skipped)

To apply, send the following:

 1. Updated resume (PDF format)

 2. A 2-3 minute Loom or video introduction answering:

 ? Walk us through your recruiting career  where, how many recruiters you led, and what verticals

 ? Describe one direct hire deal you personally closed: company, role, fee, and timeline

 ? How would you screen a recruiter who claims to have a book of business? What proof would you require?

 3. Written answers to these questions:

 ? How many recruiters have you directly managed at one time?

 ? What is the largest direct hire fee you have personally closed?

 ? Are you currently bound by any non-compete or non-solicit with a current employer?

 ? What is your current monthly rate expectation?

 ? Confirm you can work U.S. Eastern Time business hours

 4. Three references managers or business owners you reported to (we will contact them)



Selection Process

 1. Resume + video review

 2. 30-minute video interview with our CEO

 3. 45-minute deep-dive interview with CEO and Operations Lead

 4. Live mock client call exercise (you pitch our agency to a simulated U.S. client)

 5. Live mock recruiter screening exercise (you screen a simulated recruiter applicant)

 6. Reference checks

 7. Offer + signed Independent Contractor Agreement + 90-day evaluation period



Important Notes

 ? This role is for U.S. business hours and will require you to be on calls with U.S. clients regularly. Strong English and professional video presence are non-negotiable.

 ? Background check (NBI clearance + employment verification) required before start.

 ? This is an independent contractor role under U.S. company. Florida governing law.

 ? Compensation is paid on collected revenue for commission portion. Base is paid monthly and paid weekly via wise.

 ? 90-day initial evaluation period before full role confirmation.



Ready to lead a recruiter team and grow with us? Apply today.

title: Membership Quoting Specialist
description:
ABOUT US

At Hodge Industrial Technologies, we believe great companies are built by people who care deeply about their work and each other.

We are a fast-growing U.S.-based industrial service company with multiple branches across the country. We service and maintain mission-critical industrial air compressor systems for commercial and manufacturing clients—meaning what we do truly matters.

We operate from a center of caring, with high standards, clear expectations, and a commitment to doing things the right way.



WHY HODGE INDUSTRIAL TECHNOLOGIES

Stable, Essential Industry

Our customers rely on compressed air systems to keep their operations running. What we do isn’t optional—it’s critical.

Growth-Focused Environment

We are expanding across multiple U.S. markets, creating long-term opportunities for our team.

Clear Expectations

We believe great people do their best work when expectations are clear. You will always know:

What success looks like

How you’re measured

Where you stand

Center of Caring

We operate from a center of caring—for our customers and our team.

That means:

Respect in communication

Accountability in performance

Support in growth

Built for A-Players

We hire people who:

Take ownership

Care about details

Want to be part of a team that wins



WHY THIS ROLE MATTERS

This role sits at the intersection of accuracy, speed, and revenue support.

Every quote you build directly impacts:

Our ability to win business

Our customer experience

Our operational efficiency

You are not just building quotes—you are supporting the engine that drives our growth.



ROLE OVERVIEW

As a Membership Quoting Specialist, you will own the process of building and tracking preventative maintenance membership quotes inside our systems.

This is a behind-the-scenes, execution-focused role

You will not speak with customers

You will communicate internally with our U.S.-based team using clear, professional written English



RESPONSIBILITIES

Own Quote Creation

Receive equipment details from sales reps

Review compressor specifications (HP, PSI, voltage, model, etc.)

Determine correct service frequency (quarterly, semi-annual, annual)

Build quotes using pricing templates in ServiceTitan

Ensure labor, travel, and materials are included

Complete quotes within 24–48 hours



Own Quote Tracking & Visibility

Track every quote created—nothing falls through the cracks

Update status in 
 and ServiceTitan

Monitor aging quotes

Notify sales reps when follow-up is needed

Maintain full visibility across all quotes



Protect Accuracy & Systems

Follow pricing guidelines precisely

Identify missing or incorrect information before building

Keep CRM clean and organized

Communicate clearly and professionally via Slack



TOOLS YOU’LL USE

Slack (team communication)

ServiceTitan (quoting platform)


 (pipeline tracking & CRM)

Training is provided, but comfort with systems is critical.



HOW SUCCESS IS MEASURED (BIG 3)

We operate with clear accountability and measurable expectations.

You will be evaluated weekly on:

Speed: 95%+ of quotes completed within 48 hours

Accuracy: 98%+ quote accuracy

Ownership: 100% of quotes tracked in CRM

WORK STRUCTURE (PHILIPPINES-BASED ROLE)

Fully remote (work from home)

Fixed U.S. schedule (night shift PH time)

Internal-facing role (no customer calls)

Structured workflow with defined responsibilities

Performance measured weekly

REQUIREMENTS

Excellent written English communication (required)

Strong attention to detail

Experience with CRM or quoting systems (preferred)

Ability to learn new software quickly

Strong Excel or Google Sheets skills

Must have:

Reliable high-speed internet

Backup power source

Quiet, professional work environment

Ability to consistently work U.S. Eastern hours

IDEAL CANDIDATE

Organized and highly process-driven

Detail-obsessed

Strong ownership mindset

Comfortable working behind the scenes

Calm, professional written communicator

EMPLOYMENT STRUCTURE

This role supports a U.S.-based company

Work is performed remotely from the Philippines

Payment structure and classification will be discussed during the hiring process

Candidates must be comfortable working U.S. hours long-term



HOW TO APPLY

To be considered, include:

A short paragraph explaining why you are a strong fit for a detail-heavy, process-driven role

Your experience using CRM or quoting software

The word “DISCIPLINE” in the subject line

Applications missing the required word will not be reviewed.

title: Finance Manager at KingCaller AI & SimpliScale
description:
Finance Manager Position at KingCaller AI



Who We Are:



KingCaller AI is a growing automation company helping service-based businesses operate 24/7 AI sales machines. We specialize in helping high-ticket B2B service providers convert their existing lead sources into booked appointments on autopilot through AI-powered, multi-channel outreach. By leveraging advanced sequencing of calls, texts, and
s, we enable businesses to engage with prospects faster and more effectively, while maintaining full compliance and a human touch.



Simpliscale is a lean, fast-moving automation company founded in 2022. We've grown to a remote team of 10+ by doing one thing exceptionally well: building custom automations that get real results. Our secret? We move fast, think business-first, and let data drive our decisions.



We're looking for a Finance Manager to build financial infrastructure that supports rapid growth while maintaining the margins that fund our expansion.



This isn’t just a bookkeeping role. This is your opportunity to:



• Engineer financial systems that scale with our AI ecosystem

• Maintain razor-sharp margins while supporting bold growth initiatives

• Partner with leadership to forecast, optimize, and report with precision

• Shape the financial narrative of a company poised to become an industry standard



What You’ll Do



Own the Numbers That Drive Our Growth



• Process payroll and contractor payments with precision using Excel and Wise

• Maintain detailed payroll summaries and reconcile bank and credit card transactions

• Prepare and analyze weekly project profitability reports

• Track monthly burn rate and maintain 40 percent margins per project

• Manage 10 percent budgeting for growth initiatives and develop quarterly forecasts

• Create special project reports and perform ad-hoc financial tasks as needed

• Knowledgeable of US Tax policies and preparing tax files (not mandatory but a plus)



Build Scalable Financial Systems



• Implement and optimize QuickBooks workflows

• Maintain clean, audit-ready records and reporting

• Support leadership with data-driven insights and financial modeling

• Ensure compliance and clarity across all financial operations



The Right Fit



You’re perfect for this role if:



• You’re obsessed with accuracy and driven by outcomes

• You think in spreadsheets but communicate like a strategist

• You understand project-based budgeting and margin management

• You’re proactive, self-motivated, and thrive in remote environments

• You bring both technical fluency and operational foresight to the table



Skills and Experience



• Graduate of Accounting or Finance-related course.

• Professional certifications in Accounting or Finance are highly preferred: Certified Public Accountant (CPA), Certified Management Accountant (CMA), Certified Internal Auditor (CIA). Other accounting / finance certifications will also be considered.

• Two or more years of QuickBooks experience (ProAdvisor certification preferred)

• Advanced Excel and spreadsheet modeling skills

• Experience with financial forecasting and margin tracking

• Strong organizational and communication skills

• Project management experience preferred



What Success Looks Like



Within 90 days, you will have:



• Built a rhythm of weekly profitability reporting

• Maintained 40 percent margins across all active projects

• Delivered accurate forecasts and burn rate tracking

• Contributed to financial systems that scale with our client base

• Become a trusted partner to leadership in strategic planning



Why Join KingCaller AI



We’re building the future of business communication. Our vision is to become the industry standard for automated multi-channel outreach, expanding our client base and ecosystem of AI solutions with precision and purpose.



This is your opportunity to:



• Shape the financial foundation of a fast-scaling AI company

• Work with a visionary founder and operations team that values excellence

• Be part of a mission-driven culture focused on transformation and results

• Grow professionally as we scale from startup to industry leader



How to Apply



If you’re ready to architect financial systems that fuel innovation and scale, we want to hear from you. Submit your resume, a brief explanation of why you’re excited about KingCaller AI, and examples of your financial achievements.



Message our Director via
 
 or WhatsApp -

COMPANY

(USA | Remote)



About Us



Launched in 2021 and based in Knoxville, Tennessee, Murray Marketing Services is a growing digital marketing agency that partners with service-based businesses. We specialize in Google Ads, paid social, website design (Duda, WordPress, Shopify, GoHighLevel), AI system integrations,
 marketing, and SEO. Currently run by the founder, Nathan (26), we’re expanding with a Creative Specialist to help us deliver next-level results.



Why Join Us?



Creative Focus: Work on exciting projects that include ad design, editing, and digital campaign support. Being a small team of the founder, Executive Assistant, and a Digital Marketing Support Specialist, you'll have a great mix of clients and creative work that keeps your days interesting and hopefully fun.



Ground-Floor Opportunity: Collaborate directly with the founder and be part of a fast-growing agency.



Skill Growth: Gain real-world experience with tools like Eleven Labs, Canva, CapCut, and AI platforms like Ideogram and Arcads.



Flexible & Remote: Work from anywhere, flexibility to your preferred shift time, with consistent communication via Google Chat,
, and Google Meet.



Room to Grow: Opportunity to expand hours, pay, and responsibilities as the agency continues to scale.





CORE RESPONSIBILITIES:



Video & Audio Production



• Edit short-form videos (Reels, TikTok, YouTube Shorts) using CapCut Pro, Canva Pro, Premiere Pro, or similar tools.

• Add captions, music, transitions, and branding to optimize for social platforms.

Creative Strategy Support



• Brainstorm ad angles, creative hooks, and campaign themes.

• Assist in testing new creative formats and tracking what works.

• Brainstorm social media content and captions for both Murray Marketing Services LLC and our clients.

• Guidance and training provided where necessary.



Key Qualifications



• English Proficiency: Strong written/spoken communication skills.

• Video Editing: Strong experience with CapCut, Adobe Premiere, or similar.

• AI Tools: Willingness to learn AI tools like ChatGPT, Ideogram, and Arcads.

• Reliability: Must be proactive and dependable.

• Creativity: Willing to come up with ideas on your own at times.



Compensation & Hours

• Hours: 30-40 hours per week (6-8 hours/day depending on skills & experience). If you are very skilled, this will grow quickly.

• Contract Basis: Independent Contractor.



How to Apply



Please send:

2. Portfolio samples (video ads, organic social media content).

3. A short introduction explaining why this role excites you.





If it’s a fit, we’ll set up a video introduction call!

title: Automation Specialist
description:
Automation Specialist, Contract, Project-Based

Remote | Must overlap with Pacific Time | Contractor role



We are hiring a project-based Automation Specialist to help improve internal operations workflows through practical automation, workflow design, and documentation.



This is not a full-time or part-time employee role. We are looking for someone who can take a messy manual process, organize it, and build a practical solution using tools like Airtable, Zapier, APIs, webhooks, Claude Code and Codex. We are starting with a paid trial project. If it is a strong fit, this may lead to ongoing project work.



This role is a fit for someone who has:

•Built real workflow automations

•Worked with APIs, webhooks, and structured data handoffs

•Designed internal operations workflows, not just marketing automations

•Turned incomplete or messy inputs into clear, usable systems

•Created documentation and handoff materials for non-technical users

•Scoped projects clearly, including timeline, cost, and dependencies

•Experience building automations for insurance, operations, finance, service, or document-heavy workflows preferred

•Must be comfortable working from incomplete SOPs and semi-structured source material

•Please do not apply if your experience is limited to no-code tutorials or AI prompt engineering without shipped workflow builds



You’ll be working on things like:

•Streamlining proposal creation workflows

•Improving intake, handoffs, and internal task flow

•Reducing manual rework and duplicate entry

•Designing exception handling for incomplete submissions

•Documenting the final workflow clearly for internal use



Tools / skills required

•Familiar with SaaS like Airtable and Zapier

•Works with Claude Code and Codex

•APIs and webhooks

•Workflow mapping / process design

•Documentation / SOP creation

•AI-assisted workflow support where appropriate



Strong preference for candidates who:

•Have experience with service-based or operations-heavy businesses

•Think practically and avoid overengineering

•Can explain tradeoffs clearly

•Can build quickly without needing perfect inputs



This is not a fit for:

•General virtual assistants

•Applicants who do not enjoy building new tools

•People whose experience is primarily social media, admin support, or prompt writing only

•Candidates looking for a salaried role (This may become Full Time once you have demonstrated your work)



To apply, please send:

1. A short summary of your relevant experience

2. The tools used in recent automation projects in your portfolio

3. A short Loom or written walkthrough of your portfolio

4. Your project pricing approach

5. Your availability and Pacific time overlap

6. Include in the subject line of your
: “I’m ready to automate your world! ????”

title: Customer Service Representative — Pest Control & Wildlife Services (Full-Time)

This position will support both our wildlife control and pest control operations.

You will spend the majority of your day assisting customers and coordinating with technicians in the field.



Typical daily responsibilities include:

-Answering inbound customer phone calls (~50% of your day)

-Scheduling service appointments

-Responding to
s and SMS messages

-Managing customer records and tasks within our CRM

-Supporting technicians with routing and job updates

-Assisting with follow-ups and customer communication

Schedule:

-No weekends required

Requirements:

-Excellent English communication skills (spoken and written)

-Strong customer service mindset

-Reliable high-speed internet connection

-Backup internet or power solution required

-Quiet, professional work environment

-Laptop/computer and quality headset

-Strong attention to detail

-Organized and dependable

-Comfortable speaking with customers by phone all day

-Experience working night shift



Bonus (But Not Required)

-Experience with pest control or wildlife companies

-Experience with CRMs or scheduling software

-Dispatching or service coordination experience



Compensation:
